We demonstrate that these strong inductive biases allow for state-of-the-art zero-shot inpainting results (80\% missing pixels) on CIFAR-10. Our method surpasses Deep Image Prior (DIP) baselines by over 4 dB in PSNR and exhibits a characteristic "singular snap" convergence -- rapidly locking into the signal manifold. SE-UNet thus offers a data-efficient pathway for constrained generation, aligning with the ReALM-GEN goal of bridging theoretical priors with practical deployment.

</details>


### [36] [CLABTOOLKIT: An Open-Source Toolkit for Routine Processing, Manipulation, and Visualization of Neuroimaging Data](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02638)
*Yasser Alemán-Gómez,Nino Hervé,Patric Hagmann*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CLABTOOLKIT 是一个开源的 Python 工具包，用于统一处理神经影像数据（如 MRI 体积、表面网格、纤维束等），提供一致的数据结构和操作方法，简化了多格式数据的整合与分析流程。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 神经影像研究涉及多种异构数据结构（如原始 MRI 体积、体积分割、皮层表面网格、纤维束示踪、连接矩阵等），且各工具接口和文件格式不兼容，导致研究人员需要反复重新实现复杂操作。因此，需要一种统一的框架来整合这些操作，减少重复工作。

Method: CLABTOOLKIT 通过五种核心数据结构（Parcellation, Surface, AnnotParcellation, Tractogram, Connectome）将神经解剖实体封装为可互操作的 Python 对象，提供一致的方法来加载、处理和导出标准神经影像格式（如 NIfTI, GIFTI, FreeSurfer 注释, TCK/TRK）。此外，还包含辅助模块支持 BIDS 数据集管理、FreeSurfer 集成、扩散 MRI 处理、形态计量分析、图论网络分析以及基于 PyVista 的 GPU 加速多面板可视化。

Result: 该工具包包含 19 个模块，分为六层，提供 13 个面向对象的类（234 个方法）和 207 个独立函数。通过 JSON 配置系统实现无需代码修改的工作流定制。CLABTOOLKIT 兼容 Python 3.9-3.12，采用 Apache 2.0 许可证开源。

Conclusion: CLABTOOLKIT 提供了一个统一的、可互操作的框架来处理神经影像中的异构数据，将颜色和查找表管理、分割操作、多表面可视化和纤维束示踪工具整合在一起，简化了神经影像数据的处理流程，提高了研究效率。

Abstract: Neuroimaging research requires manipulating heterogeneous data structures, including raw MRI volumes, volumetric parcellations, cortical surface meshes, tractograms, and connectivity matrices, across tools with incompatible interfaces and file formats, forcing researchers to repeatedly re-implement routine but technically demanding operations. We present CLABTOOLKIT, an open-source Python package that consolidates these operations into a single, coherent framework by representing volumetric, surface, and streamline data as interoperable Python objects. Five core data structures (Parcellation, Surface, AnnotParcellation, Tractogram, and Connectome) encapsulate common neuroanatomical entities and provide consistent methods for loading, processing, and exporting data across standard neuroimaging formats (e.g., NIfTI, GIFTI, FreeSurfer annotations, TCK/TRK), including connectome generation from a parcellation and scalar-map projection onto tractogram streamlines. Complementary modules support BIDS dataset management, FreeSurfer integration, diffusion MRI processing, morphometric analysis, graph-theoretical network analysis, and GPU-accelerated multi-panel visualization via PyVista. The toolkit comprises 19 modules organised into six layers, exposing 13 object-oriented classes with 234 methods and 207 standalone functions, and a JSON-based configuration system enables workflow customization without code changes. Unlike existing neuroimaging libraries, which typically address these tasks separately, CLABTOOLKIT combines color and lookup-table management, parcellation manipulation, multi-surface visualization, and tractography utilities within a single framework. CLABTOOLKIT is compatible with Python 3.9-3.12 and released under the Apache 2.0 license. Source code, documentation, and example workflows are available at https://github.com/connectomicslab/clabtoolkit.

</details>


### [37] [BiSLW: Bi-Spectral Latent Watermarking for Generative Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02643)
*Aryan Pandit*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: BiSLW是一个可训练的双光谱潜在水印框架，通过在学习编码器和解码器中跨解码扩散潜在互补光谱带联合嵌入对齐身份信号，实现感知保真度和鲁棒性的平衡，相比现有方法PSNR提升3dB以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于扩散的生成模型易受未经授权使用，缺乏可靠归属方法。现有水印技术将潜在张量视为静态空间特征图或依赖像素域修改，未能充分利用潜在空间内部频率结构进行双频带冗余嵌入，容易受到扩散随机性和再生攻击的影响。

Method: 利用扩散潜在固有频率结构设计双频带水印框架：低频分量编码全局语义，高频分量捕捉细粒度纹理。通过学习编码器将水印独立注入两个频带，在解码前重新组合，使水印成为生成轨迹的内在部分。双光谱解码器从每个频带恢复水印，交叉频带一致性约束确保语义和纹理嵌入之间的对齐。

Result: BiSLW在感知保真度和鲁棒性之间达到良好平衡，相比现有潜在扩散水印方法PSNR提升超过3dB，在激进再生和常见失真下保持接近完美的比特精度，计算开销可忽略不计。

Conclusion: BiSLW通过利用扩散潜在内部频率结构进行双频带冗余嵌入，实现了对扩散生成模型的有效水印保护，显著提升了水印的鲁棒性和感知质量。

Abstract: Diffusion-based generative models have transformed visual content synthesis, yet they remain vulnerable to unauthorized usage and lack reliable attribution methods. Existing watermarking techniques often treat latent tensors as static spatial feature maps or depend on pixel-domain modification, and most do not explicitly leverage the internal frequency structure of the latent space for dual-band redundant embedding, leaving them susceptible to the stochastic nature of diffusion and regeneration attacks. We introduce BiSLW, a trainable bi-spectral latent watermarking framework that jointly embeds aligned identity signals across complementary spectral bands of the decoded diffusion latent using learned encoders and decoders, going beyond fixed-pattern frequency approaches. We leverage the inherent frequency structure of diffusion latents to design a dual-band watermarking framework. Low-frequency components encode global semantics, while high-frequency components capture fine texture. We exploit this structure to embed watermarks across complementary spectral bands. The watermark is independently injected into both bands via learned encoders and recombined before decoding, ensuring it becomes intrinsic to the generative trajectory. Dual spectral decoders recover the watermark from each band, while a cross-band consistency constraint enforces alignment between semantic and textural embeddings. Experiments show that BiSLW achieves a strong balance between perceptual fidelity and robustness, improving PSNR by over 3 dB compared to prior latent diffusion watermarking methods while preserving near-perfect bit accuracy under aggressive regeneration and common distortions, all with negligible computational overhead.

</details>


### [38] [EmoteGPT: 3D Human Facial Expressions from Natural Language Descriptions](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02674)
*Haoran Wang,Mohit Mendiratta,Christian Theobalt,Adam Kortylewski*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究提出了Txt2Emote基准数据集和EmoteGPT框架，用于从文本精确控制3D面部表情，解决了现有方法难以实现细粒度表情控制的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文本到3D方法通常联合生成身份、表情和纹理，难以实现细粒度的表情控制。需要一种能够从文本精确控制3D面部表情的方法，但缺乏将详细语言与精确表情参数配对的数据集。

Method: 1. 引入Txt2Emote基准数据集，使用GPT-4o和高保真面部追踪器提供细粒度文本标注；2. 提出EmoteGPT框架，基于多模态大语言模型，使用专用<Expr>令牌语义地锚定表情表示，然后解码为3DMM参数；3. 通过大规模图像到3DMM数据增强训练。

Result: EmoteGPT在情感识别指标和感知表现力方面超越了最先进的文本到3D面部合成方法。集成到虚拟化身管道中，能够从文本输入生成逼真和风格化的3D化身，以及具有3D一致性的2D面部合成。

Conclusion: 该研究通过构建配对数据集和基于MLLM的框架，成功实现了从文本到3D面部表情的精确控制，为虚拟化身、动画和人机交互提供了有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Precise control of 3D facial expressions from text is crucial for virtual avatars, animation, and human-computer interaction, yet existing text-to-3D methods jointly generate identity, expression, and texture, making fine-grained expression control difficult. We instead formulate text-driven expression synthesis as a regression problem in the disentangled parameter space of a 3D Morphable Model (3DMM). This setting, however, requires paired data linking detailed language to precise expression parameters, which are missing from existing resources. To fill this gap, we introduce Txt2Emote, a benchmark of diverse 3D facial expressions with fine-grained textual annotations obtained from GPT-4o and a high-fidelity face tracker, providing both explicit descriptions detailing facial features and implicit descriptions referencing the situational context behind the expression. Leveraging this dataset, we present EmoteGPT, a text-to-3D expression framework based on a Multimodal Large Language Model (MLLM) with a dedicated <Expr> token to semantically ground expression representations, which are then decoded into 3DMM parameters. We further improve EmoteGPT by augmenting training with large-scale image-to-3DMM data, enabling it to surpass state-of-the-art text-to-3D face synthesis methods on emotion recognition metrics and in perceived expressiveness. Integrated into avatar pipelines, our method enables photorealistic and stylized 3D avatars, as well as expressive 3D-consistent 2D face synthesis from textual input.

</details>


### [39] [K9-Bench: Evaluating Multimodal LLMs on Canine-Centric Videos](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02680)
*Khush Attarde,Yusuf Ali,Megha Thukral,Divye Bhutani,Thomas Ploetz,Zsolt Kira*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: K9-Bench是一个专注于现实世界家养狗视频的基准测试，包含约5000个问答对，用于评估多模态大语言模型在犬类动作和交互理解方面的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 动物中心场景是MLLMs的一个重要但未被充分探索的应用领域。由于动物是数百万家庭的重要组成部分，在宠物相关任务上对下一代AI模型进行基准测试至关重要，这些任务包括识别痛苦信号到实现响应式机器人伴侣等，对于构建能与人类协同工作的AI系统具有重要意义。

Method: 提出了一个可扩展的VLM/LLM驱动的数据生成管道，自动从网络挖掘犬类中心视频，并策划需要精细、多跳推理的QA对。实施了偏差缓解策略以消除VLM在数据集策划过程中引入的偏差。

Result: 前沿MLLMs在犬类中心任务上表现出有限的零样本性能：虽然最先进的闭源模型优于开源模型，但它们仍然难以在长时间跨度上对细微姿势和交互线索进行组合推理。通用的思维链提示对这类长时间跨度推理仅提供有限的性能提升。

Conclusion: K9-Bench不仅为犬类活动分析提供了一个新颖的数据集，还提供了一个通用的数据集构建管道，可以适应其他数据稀缺领域进行定量分析。

Abstract: MLLMs have shown strong zero-shot capabilities across diverse inputs such as across images, video, audio, and text. A crucial, yet underexplored, application of these models lies in understanding and modeling animal-centric scenarios. As animals are integral to millions of households, benchmarking next-generation AI models on pet-focused tasks, ranging from recognizing distress signals to enabling responsive robotic companions, is essential for building AI systems that can work alongside us. We introduce K9-Bench, a novel benchmark focused on real-world domestic dog videos, specifically targeting canine action and interaction understanding via approximately 5000 question-answer pairs across 907 videos spanning 5 distinct task categories that test long-form, canine-centric multimodal reasoning in MLLMs. To create this dataset, we propose a scalable, VLM/LLM-powered data generation pipeline that automatically mines canine-centric videos from the web and curates QA pairs requiring fine-grained, multi-hop reasoning over canine actions and temporally extended interaction sequences. We implement bias mitigation strategies designed to eliminate biases introduced by VLMs during dataset curation. Through extensive experimentation, we find that frontier MLLMs exhibit limited zero-shot performance on canine-centric tasks: although state-of-the-art closed-source models outperform open-source counterparts, they still struggle with compositional reasoning over subtle posture and interaction cues spread over long horizons. We observe that generic chain-of-thought prompting provides only modest performance for such long-horizon reasoning. Beyond a novel dataset for canine activity analysis, K9-Bench provides a general-purpose dataset construction pipeline that can be adapted to other low-data domains for quantitative analysis. Our project website is available at: https://ogmenrobotics.github.io/K9Bench.

</details>


### [40] [S-EMBER: A Large-Scale Benchmark for Streaming Egocentric Memory Retrieval](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02689)
*Xiaodong Wang,Xuanyi Zhao,Pedro Rodriguez,Devendra Singh Sachan,Barlas Oguz,Seungwhan Moon,Shang-Wen Li,Gargi Ghosh,Xin Dong,Wen-Tau Yih*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出了S-EMBER基准测试，用于评估可穿戴AI助手在流式视频中的情景记忆检索能力，发现模型规模扩大能提升语义推理但无法改善时间定位精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基准测试多采用离线评估方式，无法模拟可穿戴设备的实时流式视频处理需求，需要建立更贴近真实场景的评估框架。

Method: 创建S-EMBER基准测试，包含3,141个视频（共388小时）的有机活动记录，提供9,448个QA对，要求基于视觉事件触发进行因果、主动的回忆检索。

Result: 发现定位悖论：模型参数规模增加能提升语义推理能力，但时间定位精度成为停滞的架构瓶颈，无法通过增加模型大小、分辨率或帧密度来改善。

Conclusion: S-EMBER为下一代可穿戴AI代理开发提供了硬件真实的基准，强调需要解决时间定位精度这一关键瓶颈。

Abstract: As wearable devices enable continuous first-person recording, AI assistants must reason across long time horizons to recall past experiences-a capability known as episodic memory. Current benchmarks often rely on offline evaluation with access to entire video files, failing to simulate the streaming reality of wearable intelligence. We introduce S-EMBER (Streaming Egocentric Memory Benchmark for Episodic Retrieval), a large-scale benchmark comprising 3,141 videos totaling 388 hours of organic activity captured via Ray-Ban Meta smart glasses. S-EMBER formalizes grounded streaming episodic retrieval, a paradigm shift from global offline search to causal, active recall triggered by visual events in a continuous stream. We provide 9,448 QA pairs requiring manual visual proof through precise temporal localization and supporting flexible response lengths to simulate natural human-AI interaction. Our extensive benchmarking of frontier models uncovers a localization paradox: while semantic reasoning improves with parameter scale, temporal grounding precision remains a stagnant architectural bottleneck that does not benefit from brute-force increases in model size, resolution, or frame density. S-EMBER establishes a hardware-authentic foundation for developing grounded, reliable episodic memory in the next generation of wearable AI agents.

</details>


### [41] [An Automated Multimodal Glaucoma Detection Framework Using ViT and a Stacking-Based Ensemble](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02692)
*Ishrat Jahan,Muhammad E. H Chowdhury,Murugappan Murugappan,Kanchon Kanti Podder,Tawsifur Rahman,Shrestha Datta,Md Sakib Abrar Hossain,Md Mosarrof Hossen,Yosra Magdi Salih Mekki,Sanjiban Sekhar Roy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种用于青光眼检测的多模态自动化框架，结合眼底图像和临床数据，在样本级和患者级两种评估设置下实现高精度诊断，并部署为端到端网络平台


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 青光眼是一种进展性眼病，早期检测至关重要。传统诊断方法耗时且依赖专家解读，难以进行大规模筛查。需要开发自动化、可扩展的青光眼检测系统。

Method: 提出多模态框架，整合眼底图像和临床数据。在样本级设置下，分别使用眼底图像、临床特征及两者组合进行检测；在患者级设置下，通过聚合每个患者的多个眼底图像表示和临床信息进行预测。使用Vision Transformer (ViT)提取深度视觉特征，采用经典机器学习模型分类，并通过堆叠集成三个最佳分类器优化性能。

Result: 在公开的PAPILA数据集上取得优异诊断性能：样本级多模态分类准确率达97.47%，F1分数97.50%；患者级检测准确率和F1分数均达98.97%。框架已部署为端到端网络平台，支持自动化青光眼筛查和临床决策。

Conclusion: 该多模态框架在青光眼检测中表现出色，为大规模筛查提供了有效的自动化解决方案。端到端网络平台的部署增强了临床实用性，有望改善青光眼诊断的可及性和效率。

Abstract: Glaucoma is a progressive eye disease that can lead to irreversible vision loss if not detected at an early stage. Conventional diagnostic procedures are often time-consuming and rely heavily on expert interpretation, limiting their scalability for large-scale screening. In this study, glaucoma detection is investigated under two evaluation settings: sample-wise, where individual samples are analyzed independently, and patient-wise, where data from each patient are aggregated for final prediction. An automated multimodal framework is proposed that integrates fundus images with clinical data. Under the sample-wise setting, detection is performed using fundus images and clinical features individually, as well as through their multimodal combination. Under the patient-wise setting, predictions are obtained by aggregating multiple fundus image representations with corresponding clinical information for each patient. Deep visual features are extracted using a Vision Transformer (ViT) architecture and classified using classical machine-learning models, with a stacking-based ensemble of the three best-performing classifiers employed to optimize performance. Experiments conducted on the publicly available PAPILA dataset demonstrate strong diagnostic performance, achieving 97.47% accuracy and a 97.50% F1-score for sample-wise multimodal classification, and 98.97% accuracy and F1-score for subject-wise detection. The proposed framework is further deployed as an end-to-end web-based platform to support automated glaucoma screening and clinical decision support.

</details>


### [42] [Property-Constrained 3D Porous Media Reconstruction from 2D Images via Conditional Generative Adversarial Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02693)
*Ali Sadeghkhani,Brandon Bennett,Arash Rabbani*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）的框架，仅使用2D薄片图像生成可控孔隙度的3D多孔介质体积，无需昂贵3D训练数据。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统方法需要大量3D训练数据来生成3D多孔介质，成本高昂。本研究旨在开发仅需2D薄片图像即可生成可控孔隙度3D多孔介质的框架，降低数据获取成本。

Method: 采用条件生成对抗网络（cGAN）框架，结合属性条件生成与2D到3D重建。使用混合架构：3D生成器和2D判别器，通过多轴切片提取从2D训练数据学习3D一致结构。使用增强U-Net分割模型提取孔隙度标签。

Result: 成功生成捕捉岩性特征（如硬石膏包裹体和细晶结构）的逼真3D体积。孔隙度控制达到R²=0.93，异质和同质样品的平均绝对误差分别为0.019和0.010。

Conclusion: 该框架仅使用2D薄片图像即可生成可控孔隙度的逼真3D多孔介质，为地质建模提供高效、经济的解决方案，特别适用于3D数据稀缺的情况。

Abstract: This study presents a conditional Generative Adversarial Network (cGAN) framework for generating 3D porous media volumes with controlled porosity, trained exclusively on 2D thin section images. The key innovation lies in combining property-conditioned generation with 2D-to-3D reconstruction, eliminating the need for expensive 3D training data while maintaining control over petrophysical properties. The framework employs a hybrid architecture with a 3D generator and 2D discriminator, where multi-axis slice extraction enables learning 3D-consistent structures from 2D training data. Porosity labels are extracted using an Enhanced U-Net segmentation model. The methodology was demonstrated on two carbonate samples with different lithologies: dolomite-anhydrite and pure dolomite. Results show that the framework successfully generates realistic 3D volumes capturing lithological features such as anhydrite inclusions and fine crystalline textures. Porosity control achieved an $R^2$ of 0.93, with mean absolute errors of 0.019 and 0.010 for the heterogeneous and homogeneous samples, respectively.

</details>


### [43] [Aircraft Detection in Satellite Imagery using Deep Learning Object Detectors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02699)
*Mujahir Hussain Abbasi,S. Beghin,A. T. R. Krishna Priya,P. Jamuna,G. Anandhakumari,S. Jaanaa Rubavathy*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种结合图像增强和深度学习的卫星图像目标检测框架，通过Gabor滤波器增强特征和降噪，归一化处理数据分布，基于YOLOv11模型实现快速目标检测，在飞机检测任务上取得了优异性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卫星图像目标检测具有重要的实际应用价值，但面临噪声大、图像质量波动、背景复杂等挑战，需要更准确、鲁棒的检测方法。

Method: 1. 使用Gabor滤波器处理输入图像，突出重要特征并减少噪声；2. 应用归一化确保数据均匀分布；3. 基于YOLOv11模型快速学习并检测目标特征。

Result: mAP达到95%，精确率97%，召回率85%，F1分数91%，在卫星图像飞机检测任务上表现出优越性能。

Conclusion: 该框架能够准确识别卫星图像中的飞机，适用于实时应用，如监控、空中交通监测和遥感分析。

Abstract: The object detection in satellite imagery has garnered considerable attention due to its extensive real-world applications and the inherent challenges it presents, including noise, fluctuating image quality, and intricate backgrounds. This paper proposed a framework for object detection that combines image enhancement and Deep Learning (DL) to make detection more accurate. First, a Gabor filter is used to process the input image to bring out important features and reduce noise. Then, normalization is applied to make sure that the data is evenly distributed so that the model works properly. After that, a model based on YOLOv11 is used to quickly learn and find object features. The proposed method achieves a mAP of 95%, precision of 97%, recall of 85%, and F1-score of 91%, which demonstrates the superior aircraft detection performance. These results show the framework accurately identify aircraft in satellite imagery and is suitable for real-time applications such as surveillance, air traffic monitoring and remote sensing analysis.

</details>


### [44] [VLRC: Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency as a scalable signal for better feed-forward 3D pretraining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02707)
*Marwane Hariat,David Filliat,Antoine Manzanera*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出VLRC方法，利用冻结的视觉-语言表征作为语义多视角监督，无需额外3D标注，提升3D重建和开放词汇3D语义分割性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的前馈3D模型训练通常依赖昂贵的几何监督或自监督光度目标，这两种方法提供的学习信号都不完整。需要一种能够利用语义信息增强3D重建的方法。

Method: 提出视觉-语言重投影一致性（VLRC）作为辅助目标函数。该方法利用冻结的视觉-语言表征作为语义多视角监督，将预测的3D重建结果在不同视角间重投影密集的视觉-语言特征，并强制对应图像位置的特征一致性。

Result: 在室内外基准测试中，VLRC在3D重建精度和零样本开放词汇3D语义分割方面均取得一致提升。不仅改善了深度和相机估计，还实现了更连贯的多视角语义融合。

Conclusion: VLRC是一种可扩展的辅助目标，能够无缝集成到自监督单目重建和监督预训练的前馈3D模型中，通过将几何与语言基础特征对齐，显著提升3D场景理解能力。

Abstract: Feed-forward 3D models are commonly trained using either expensive geometric supervision or self-supervised photometric objectives, both of which provide incomplete learning signals. We introduce Vision-Language Reprojection Consistency (VLRC), a scalable auxiliary objective that exploits frozen vision-language representations as semantic multi-view supervision. Given a predicted 3D reconstruction, VLRC reprojects dense vision-language features across views and enforces feature consistency between corresponding image locations, requiring no additional 3D annotations. The objective integrates seamlessly with both self-supervised monocular reconstruction and supervised-pretrained feed-forward 3D models during unlabeled adaptation. By aligning geometry with language-grounded features, VLRC not only improves depth and camera estimation but also enables more coherent multi-view semantic fusion for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. Experiments on indoor and outdoor benchmarks demonstrate consistent gains in 3D reconstruction accuracy and zero-shot open-vocabulary 3D semantic segmentation.

</details>


### [45] [When Does Resolution Help a Frozen Backbone? Global Attention at Resolution Predicts Scalable Adaptation for Camouflaged and Marine Animal Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02708)
*Tyler Rust,Chandra Kambhamettu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究发现，在将冻结的视觉基础模型适配到细粒度分割任务时，骨干网络的选择至关重要。各向同性的ViTs（如全局注意力机制）在高分辨率下表现持续提升，而分层骨干网络（如局部窗口注意力）在较低分辨率下就达到平台期。通过SALT方法（侧干、注意力门控U-Net、低秩调优），在RGB-only的单次推理中，使用强各向同性骨干网络在多个数据集上达到了新的SOTA水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前将冻结的视觉基础模型适配到细粒度分割任务时，过度依赖骨干网络的选择。研究者希望探究不同骨干网络架构（各向同性与分层）在低秩适配下如何影响分割性能，特别是分辨率与准确性之间的关系。

Method: 1. 对六种骨干网络进行控制研究，分析全局注意力与局部窗口注意力的影响；2. 通过编辑骨干网络验证假设：池化保持性能优势，移除全局注意力则不会；3. 提出SALT方法：侧干、注意力门控U-Net和低秩调优；4. 在四个伪装数据集、海洋数据集和显著性数据集上进行评估。

Result: 1. 各向同性ViTs（全局注意力）随着分辨率提高持续改进；2. 分层骨干网络（局部窗口注意力）在较低分辨率下达到平台期；3. SALT方法在RGB-only单次推理中，使用强各向同性骨干网络在四个伪装数据集上获得最佳S-measure；4. 在海洋和显著性数据集上领先；5. 在海洋动物基准测试MAS3K上达到新的SOTA（mIoU 0.878）。

Conclusion: 骨干网络的架构选择对低秩适配的细粒度分割性能有决定性影响。各向同性ViTs的全局注意力机制使其能够充分利用高分辨率信息，而分层骨干网络的局部窗口注意力限制了这一优势。SALT方法结合强各向同性骨干网络，在多个分割任务上实现了最先进的性能。

Abstract: Adapting frozen vision foundation models to fine-grained segmentation now largely depends on backbone selection. Whether the backbone applies global attention to a high-resolution token set predicts whether a low-rank adapter turns resolution into accuracy. Isotropic ViTs attend globally over the full grid and keep improving with resolution; hierarchical backbones confine early attention to local windows and pool the grid before their global stages, plateauing at lower resolutions. A controlled six-backbone study establishes the pattern, and editing the backbone points to the cause: pooling keeps the benefit, removing global attention does not. The effect is specific to low-rank adaptation. Under one fixed pipeline, SALT (Side-stem, Attention-gated U-Net, Low-rank Tuning), one RGB-only pass on a strong isotropic backbone wins the best S-measure on the four data-matched camouflaged sets, and leads every marine and salient set. It reaches a new state of the art on both marine-animal benchmarks (MAS3K mIoU 0.878).

</details>


### [46] [RayTun3R: Online Camera Adaptation in 3D Foundation Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02711)
*Daniil Sinitsyn,Nikita Araslanov,Daniel Cremers*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RayTun3R：一种轻量级相机适配方法，通过修正预训练3D基础模型中的针孔相机偏差，使其在鱼眼相机几何下也能有效工作，仅需10752个可训练参数。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D基础模型（如DUSt3R、MASt3R等）在针孔图像上表现良好，但在鱼眼相机几何下性能急剧下降。研究发现这种失败部分源于预训练模型中位置编码的针孔相机偏差。

Method: 提出RayTun3R方法：保持预训练网络固定，仅适配与token位置和相机几何相关的轻量级组件。学习对绝对和旋转位置编码的参数高效残差修正，以及无参数的token化和预测网格坐标修正，以消除残余针孔假设。

Result: 在110°-200°视场角的多样化鱼眼数据集上，适配器将旋转误差降低2-12倍（相对于未适配模型），优于LoRA方法（使用约14倍更少的参数），在避免多视图推理成本的同时提升位姿估计，深度精度保持竞争力。

Conclusion: RayTun3R通过轻量级相机适配有效解决了3D基础模型在鱼眼相机几何下的性能下降问题，仅需少量可训练参数即可实现显著性能提升，且适配后可有效迁移到序列的其余帧而不增加运行时成本。

Abstract: Recent 3D foundation models, such as DUSt3R, MASt3R, VGGT, $π^3$, and Depth Anything 3, provide strong feed-forward depth and pose estimates on pinhole imagery, but degrade sharply under fisheye camera geometry. We show that this failure is partly caused by a pinhole camera bias in the positional encodings of pretrained 3D foundation models, and propose RayTun3R, a lightweight camera adaptation approach. It keeps the pretrained network fixed and adapts only lightweight components tied to token position and camera geometry. RayTun3R learns parameter-efficient residual corrections to absolute and rotary positional encodings, together with parameter-free tokenization and corrections to prediction-grid coordinates that remove residual pinhole assumptions. The resulting adapter contains only 10,752 trainable parameters and can be learned from a short temporal segment using geometric losses. Once adapted, RayTun3R transfers effectively to the remaining frames of the sequence without incurring additional runtime costs. Across diverse fisheye datasets with fields of view from $110^\circ$ to $200^\circ$, our adapter reduces rotation error by $2$-$12\times$ relative to the unadapted model, outperforms LoRA while using $\sim\!14\times$ fewer trainable parameters, improves pose over adaptation-free baselines while avoiding their multi-view inference cost, and remains competitive on depth accuracy.

</details>


### [47] [Global Pose Control for Generative View Synthesis in Normalized Object Coordinate Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02712)
*Zhibing Li,Amogh Gupta,Behnoosh Parsa,Dan Casas*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种在可定制归一化物体坐标空间(NOCS)中进行精确相机控制的新方法，解决了现有新视角合成方法缺乏全局姿态控制的问题，实现了从任意未定位图像生成具有准确一致方向的新视角。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有新视角合成方法要么使用输入相对相机姿态，要么只能生成稀疏全局视图，缺乏全局直观的相机控制，这严重限制了新视角合成在下游任务中的应用潜力。

Method: 将新视角合成重新定义为图像编辑问题，基于最先进的编辑模型，在可定制NOCS空间中仅使用目标视图的绝对相机姿态。通过上下文多模态条件策略将相机信息作为专用相机令牌注入，并引入文本描述明确定义物体的规范坐标系以缓解NOCS的模糊性问题。

Result: 方法能够从任意未定位图像中稳健生成具有准确一致方向的新视角，在多样类别上实现了最先进的图像质量和保真度。还构建了高质量的数据集，包含一致对齐的方向和相应的NOCS文本定义。

Conclusion: 提出的方法通过将新视角合成重新定义为图像编辑任务，在可定制NOCS空间中实现了精确的相机控制，克服了现有方法的局限性，为新视角合成的广泛应用提供了可能。

Abstract: Novel View Synthesis (NVS) enables the generation of unseen views of a scene from a single or multiple images, allowing users to freely explore an object from any viewpoint. Despite the recent impressive qualitative improvements of generative models for this task, existing methods struggle to provide global and intuitive control of target viewpoints because they either use input-relative camera poses or are limited to generating sparse global views. This lack of global pose control severely limits the number of downstream tasks potentially enabled by NVS. To address this limitation, we propose a novel approach for precise camera control in a customizable Normalized Object Coordinate Space (NOCS), requiring single or few unposed images. Our method operates solely on the absolute camera pose of the target view in NOCS, eliminating the need for a relative world frame or camera poses of the input images. Unlike previous methods that treat NVS as a standalone generation task, we formulate it as an image editing problem and build upon state-of-the-art editing models to leverage their superior generalization capability. Camera information is injected as dedicated camera tokens via an in-context multi-modal conditioning strategy. To alleviate the inherent ambiguity of NOCS, we incorporate text descriptions that explicitly define the object's canonical coordinate frame, which also enhances generalization to unseen object categories. Furthermore, we curate a high-quality dataset with consistently aligned orientations and corresponding NOCS text definitions. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method robustly generates novel views with accurate and consistent orientations from arbitrary unposed images across diverse categories, achieving state-of-the-art image quality and fidelity.

</details>


### [48] [Diagnosing Aerial-View Object Detectors with Foundational Image Generative Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02718)
*Stanislav Panev,Minhyek Jeon,Vaishnavi Khindkar,Ahish Deshpande,Celso M de Melo,Shuowen Hu,Shayok Chakraborty,Fernando De la Torre*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个用于航空视角车辆检测的合成诊断框架，通过文本引导生成、属性控制编辑和自动属性验证构建可控合成测试平台，能够预测真实域性能差距并指导高效数据收集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然大规模图像生成模型在数据增强方面已有应用，但其作为训练视觉系统诊断工具的潜力在航空和遥感领域尚未探索。现有方法难以在真实数据集中隔离不同场景类型和环境条件进行细粒度评估。

Method: 结合文本引导生成、属性控制编辑和自动属性验证构建可控合成测试平台，通过合成场景对预训练检测器进行细粒度评估，识别弱类别后针对性补充少量真实数据。

Result: 在三个检测架构和三个真实航空数据集上，合成场景性能趋势与真实世界弱点高度匹配。针对识别出的弱类别进行针对性数据补充，仅需较少样本即可实现高达13% AP50的提升。

Conclusion: 可控的合成探测能够预测真实域性能差距并指导高效数据收集。该框架是模块化的，可随着能力演进整合替代的生成或视觉语言模型。

Abstract: Recent advances in large-scale image generative models enable photorealistic scene synthesis with controllable attributes. Beyond data augmentation, their potential as diagnostic tools for trained vision systems remains unexplored in the aerial and remote sensing domains. We introduce a synthetic diagnostic framework for aerial-view vehicle detection that combines text-guided generation, attribute-controlled editing, and automated attribute verification to construct a controllable synthetic testbed. This enables fine-grained evaluation of pretrained detectors under diverse scene types and environmental conditions that are difficult to isolate in real datasets. Across three detection architectures and three real aerial datasets, synthetic scene-wise performance trends closely match real-world weaknesses. Guided by these diagnostics, targeted supplementation with small real datasets from the identified weak categories yields improvements of up to 13% AP50 while requiring substantially fewer additional samples than non-targeted augmentation. Our results show that controlled synthetic probing can predict real-domain performance gaps and guide efficient data collection. The proposed diagnostic framework is modular and can incorporate alternative generative or vision-language models as capabilities evolve. Our code and datasets are available here: https://humansensinglab.github.io/AVODDiag/

</details>


### [49] [GRCD: Grounded Region Change Detection for Multi-Finding Chest X-Ray Pairs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02719)
*OFM Riaz Rahman Aranya,Peyman Najafirad,Kevin Desai*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GRCD是一个用于胸部X光图像对的多病灶报告的生成框架，通过区域引导变化标记模块和双路径策略结合时空信息，在生成多病灶报告方面优于现有基线。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法要么只从单张图像生成报告而不建模时间上下文，要么结合时间信息但不进行空间定位。少数结合时空推理的方法仅限于单病灶描述，无法处理包含混合变化方向的多病灶报告。

Method: 首先构建经过严格清洗的时序胸部X光图像对数据集，纠正源标注中的系统标签错误。然后引入区域引导变化标记模块，编码解剖结构间的区域级时间变化，通过预置空间标记和门控交叉注意力的双路径策略将信号注入语言模型。

Result: 在多病灶测试集上，GRCD在文本生成和临床准确性指标上优于现有基线，在变化检测方面有显著提升。消融研究证实双路径设计优于单独使用任一策略，且区域级变化编码对多病灶生成是必要的。

Conclusion: GRCD框架成功解决了胸部X光图像对的多病灶报告生成问题，通过结合时空信息和区域级变化编码，在临床准确性和文本质量方面取得了显著改进。

Abstract: Radiologists routinely compare current and prior chest X-rays to track disease progression, producing follow-up reports that describe multiple findings, each localised to an anatomical region and annotated with a temporal change status. Existing automated methods either generate reports from a single image without modelling temporal context, or incorporate temporal information but do not ground their outputs spatially. The few approaches that combine temporal reasoning with spatial grounding are restricted to single-finding descriptions, leaving multi-finding reports with mixed change directions unaddressed. We present GRCD, a framework for grounded report generation from chest X-ray pairs in the multi-finding setting. We first construct a rigorously cleaned dataset of temporal chest X-ray pairs by identifying and correcting two systematic labelling errors in the source annotations. We then introduce a Region-Guided Change Token module that encodes per-region temporal change across anatomical structures and injects this signal into a language model through a dual-pathway strategy combining prepended spatial tokens with gated cross-attention. On a multi-finding test set, GRCD outperforms existing baselines on text generation and clinical accuracy metrics, with gains in change detection. Ablation studies confirm that the dual-pathway design outperforms either integration strategy in isolation on text and clinical metrics, and that region-level change encoding is necessary for multi-finding generation. Code is available at https://github.com/UTSA-VIRLab/GRCD

</details>


### [50] [Provable Pruning for Efficient 3D Gaussian Splatting via Coresets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02721)
*Waseem Mousa,Alaa Maalouf*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了第一个可证明的3D高斯泼溅(3DGS)核心集压缩方法，在保证渲染目标的理论近似下，实现高效场景压缩。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3DGS虽然能实现高质量实时新视角合成，但实际场景包含数百万高斯函数，在有限硬件上部署需要压缩。现有压缩方法大多基于启发式，缺乏理论保证，且依赖昂贵的后剪枝微调来恢复质量。

Method: 首先证明在无限制设置下不存在非平凡的多重近似核心集。然后证明在指定渲染分辨率下，多重近似是可能的。通过敏感性采样构建加权核心集，为每个高斯函数计算可证明的重要性分数。在显式有效性和对数透射率稳定性假设下，将目标保证转化为渲染保证。

Result: 该方法在需要高压缩且无或最小恢复计算的场景中表现最强。在仅剪枝和极短微调机制下，实现了最先进的性能，证明原则性的重要性估计既具有理论意义又具有实用价值。

Conclusion: 该研究为3DGS压缩提供了第一个可证明的理论保证，通过敏感性采样构建加权核心集，在保持渲染质量的同时实现高效压缩，为实际部署提供了理论支撑。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) enables high-quality real-time novel-view synthesis, but practical scenes often contain millions of Gaussians, making compression essential for deployment on limited hardware. Existing reduction methods are effective but mostly heuristic: they provide no multiplicative approximation guarantee for the rendered objective, and thus rely heavily on costly post-pruning finetuning to recover quality. We ask a basic question: can a 3DGS scene be provably replaced by a much smaller weighted subset (coreset) while preserving the objective of interest? We first show that, in the unrestricted setting, no non-trivial multiplicative 3DGS coreset exists. We then show that multiplicative guarantees are not impossible, but resolution-dependent. For a prescribed rendering resolution, such as representative views or grids of views/rays, we provide the first weighted coreset construction theorem for 3DGS. The construction samples Gaussians by sensitivity: provable importance scores measuring each Gaussian's role in the full-scene objective. Finally, under explicit validity and log-transmittance stability assumptions, we turn this objective guarantee into a rendering guarantee. Empirically, our method is strongest where deployment needs it most: aggressive compression with no or minimal recovery compute. In prune-only and very short finetuning regimes, it achieves state-of-the-art performance, showing that principled importance estimation can be both theoretically meaningful and practically useful. Open-source code is available at https://github.com/waseem-m/3dgs_provable_coresets.

</details>


### [51] [Signal from Space: Detecting Schools and Towers to Bridge the Digital Divide](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02724)
*Zakarya Elmimouni,Sandor Farkas,Fares Fourati,Vladimir Daigele,Walid Mathlouthi,Mohamed-Slim Alouini*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 一个基于卫星影像的视觉框架，用于同时检测学校和通信塔，并分析它们之间的空间关系，以评估学校互联网连接状况，特别适用于发展中国家。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在发展中国家，数百万学龄儿童因学校未接入互联网而无法获得可靠的教育资源。Giga计划旨在连接所有学校，但需要高效的方法来映射学校并评估周边基础设施，而现有第三方数据集稀疏且噪声大。

Method: 提出一个可扩展的纯视觉框架，使用高分辨率卫星影像和迁移学习。通过微调预训练的目标检测模型，使其适应新的地理区域（仅需少量标注数据），直接从卫星影像中检测学校和通信塔。然后分析检测到的学校与附近通信塔的空间关系，作为连接可用性的代理指标。

Result: 该方法在莱索托的真实卫星影像上进行了演示，显示出在该地区的强大性能。该框架能够实现大规模基础设施映射，减少对辅助数据的依赖。

Conclusion: 这种纯影像驱动的流水线支持数据驱动的连接投资优先级排序，特别适用于服务不足地区，有助于高效推进学校互联网连接项目。

Abstract: Reliable internet access is essential for modern education, yet millions of school-aged children especially in developing regions remain offline due to unconnected schools. The Giga Initiative aims to connect every school to the internet, but doing so at scale requires efficient methods to map schools and assess surrounding connectivity infrastructure without relying on sparse or noisy third-party datasets. In this work, we propose a scalable, vision-only framework that uses high-resolution satellite imagery and transfer learning to address both tasks simultaneously. By adapting pre-trained object detection models to new geographical regions with minimal labeled data, we detect schools and cell towers directly from space. We then analyze the spatial relationship between detected schools and nearby towers as a proxy for connectivity availability. This purely imagery-driven pipeline enables large-scale infrastructure mapping, reduces dependency on auxiliary data, and supports data-driven prioritization of connectivity investments in underserved areas. Our approach is demonstrated on real satellite imagery from Lesotho, showing strong performance across this region.

</details>


### [52] [Biomechanics-aware Multi-view Markerless Motion Capture of Dexterous Hand Movements](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02796)
*Pouyan Firouzabadi,J. D. Peiffer,Kunal Shah,Anton Sobinov,Lee E. Miller,R. James Cotton,Wendy M. Murray*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本研究评估了一种端到端的梯度优化方法用于无标记运动捕捉(MMC)手部运动追踪，相比传统两阶段方法，该方法能生成更生物力学合理的手部运动学数据，对遮挡更鲁棒。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无标记运动捕捉技术在生物力学分析中广泛应用，但在复杂手部运动的应用落后于其他肌肉骨骼系统。需要开发更有效的方法来追踪灵巧、无约束的手部运动。

Method: 提出端到端的梯度优化方法，将生物力学模型融入优化回路中。使用8个摄像头的定制设置，采集6名参与者执行11种不同任务（包括6种手部姿势和5种物体操作任务）的121个视频。与传统两阶段方法（先三角化2D关键点到3D，再通过约束逆运动学强制生物力学约束）进行对比。

Result: 端到端方法为所有121个视频生成解，而两阶段方法有15%的视频不收敛。在剩余视频中，端到端方法产生更生物力学合理的手部运动学数据，对物体操作任务中的遮挡效应更鲁棒。

Conclusion: 端到端方法能更有效地利用可用的2D数字关键点信息，对灵巧手部运动的自动且生物力学有意义的追踪具有支持临床评估、康复监测和人类运动控制研究的潜力。

Abstract: Markerless motion capture (MMC) techniques have been widely beneficial in biomechanical analysis of human movement; however, application to complex motions of the hand lags other musculoskeletal systems. The primary goal of this study was to evaluate the performance of a biomechanical reconstruction method that implements a gradient-based optimization approach with a biomechanical model in the loop for tracking dexterous, unconstrained hand movements using MMC. Using a custom, 8-camera setup, we acquired 121 video recordings from 6 participants performing 11 different tasks that spanned 6 hand postures, 5 object manipulation tasks, and involved motion of the proximal upper limb joints. Performance of the proposed MMC pipeline was directly compared to a more commonly adopted two-stage reconstruction method that first triangulates 2D keypoints from computer vision pose estimation algorithms to 3D and then enforces biomechanical constraints by solving a constrained inverse kinematics problem. Relative performance was assessed qualitatively by visual inspection and quantitatively using a computer vision metric. Our method generated solutions for all 121 video recordings; the two-stage method did not converge for 15% of the recordings. Across the remaining videos, our method produced more biomechanically plausible hand kinematics than the two-stage method and was more robust to occlusion effects during tasks that involved objects. The relative robustness of the end-to-end method suggests that it is more effective in utilizing the available 2D digital keypoint information. Automatic and biomechanically meaningful tracking of hand kinematics during dexterous movements has the potential to support clinical evaluation, rehabilitation monitoring, and studies of human motor control.

</details>


### [53] [Track the Noise, Move the World:3D-Grounded Motion-Consistent Noise for Controllable Video Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02798)
*Long Vu,Tan Ngo,Animesh Karnewar,Amir Habibian,Binh-Son Hua,Hung Bui,Minh Hoai Nguyen,Phong Nguyen-Ha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: UniCaMo：统一框架，通过直接构建扩散模型输入噪声，同时控制物体轨迹和相机视角，无需修改模型架构


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有图像文本到视频扩散模型在单一生成过程中缺乏对物体运动和相机运动的精确统一控制

Method: 构建共享的3D基础运动一致性噪声空间，使用稀疏3D点轨迹沿物体轨迹扭曲参考帧高斯噪声，虚拟球形噪声表示为新揭示场景区域提供全局一致噪声值

Result: 在Wan 2.1等大型预训练视频扩散模型上进行轻量级LoRA微调后，在可控视频生成基准测试中达到最先进的视频质量和运动可控性

Conclusion: UniCaMo通过仅修改输入噪声实现物体和相机运动的统一控制，无需辅助适配器、控制分支或架构更改

Abstract: Modern image-and-text-to-video diffusion models can synthesize highly realistic videos by iteratively denoising an initial Gaussian noise tensor conditioned on reference image and text inputs. However, existing approaches still lack precise and unified controllability over both object motion and camera motion within a single generation process. We present UniCaMo, a unified framework that enables simultaneous control of object trajectories and camera viewpoints by directly constructing the input noise of the diffusion model. Specifically, UniCaMo builds a shared 3D-grounded motion-consistent noise space across latent video frames. Sparse 3D point tracks are used to warp the Gaussian noise of the reference frame along desired object trajectories, while a virtual spherical noise representation provides globally consistent noise values for newly revealed scene regions under camera motion. By combining local track-guided noise warping with global sphere-based noise sampling, UniCaMo maintains geometric and temporal consistency under both object movement and viewpoint changes. Because UniCaMo modifies only the input noise, it requires no auxiliary adapters, control branches, or architectural changes to the underlying video diffusion model. With lightweight LoRA fine-tuning on large pretrained video diffusion models, including Wan 2.1 (14B), UniCaMo achieves state-of-the-art results in both video quality and motion controllability on standard controllable video generation benchmarks.

</details>


### [54] [Conversational Human Audio-visual Talking Dialogue Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02799)
*Junhao Song,Lluis Guasch,Xilin He,Zhongyu Yang,Yingfang Yuan,Weicheng Xie,Linlin Shen,Haijun Lin,Shizhe Liu,Wei Pang,Siyang Song*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CHAT是一个新颖的二元交互视听对话生成框架，能够从单一文本提示生成多样、配对且相互响应的语音-面部对话片段，为构建人形交互虚拟代理提供可扩展的数据替代方案。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大规模二元交互视听对话数据集的收集耗时、昂贵且涉及伦理敏感性，这限制了人形交互虚拟代理的发展。需要一种可扩展的替代方案来生成高质量的对话数据。

Method: CHAT统一了大型语言模型和说话人脸模型，结合交互式音频和面部行为细化模块，从单一文本提示生成对齐的二元对话片段，支持多样化内容和面部身份。

Result: CHAT在客观和主观评估中均优于现有相关方法。合成的CHAT-AVD-50k数据集作为下游交互头生成的有效预训练数据，持续提升了PerFRDiff和ReactDiff在REACT 2024上的性能。

Conclusion: CHAT为昂贵的、伦理敏感的真人二元交互数据收集提供了可扩展的替代方案，推动了人形交互虚拟代理和数字人的发展。

Abstract: Large-scale dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue (DIAD) datasets provide fundamental data resources for developing humanoid interactive virtual agents and digital humans. However, collecting such data is time-consuming, expensive, and ethically sensitive. To address this, we propose CHAT, a new dyadic interactive audio-visual dialogue generation (DIADG) framework that generates diverse, paired, and mutually responsive speech-face dialogue clips from a single textual prompt. CHAT unifies large language models and talking face models with interactive audio and facial behaviour refinement modules, enabling the generation of aligned dyadic dialogue clips with diverse contents and facial identities. Experiments show that CHAT outperforms existing related methods designed for similar tasks under both objective and subjective evaluations. Moreover, our synthesised CHAT-AVD-50k dataset serves as effective pre-training data for downstream interactive head generation, consistently improving PerFRDiff and ReactDiff on REACT 2024. CHAT offers a scalable alternative to the costly and ethically sensitive collection of real dyadic interaction data.

</details>


### [55] [Prior Bias in Vision Language Models on UML Diagram Interpretation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02853)
*Zaiyu Cheng,Khai-Nguyen Nguyen,Antonio Mastropaolo*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究通过创建对照UML图基准测试，发现视觉语言模型在理解UML类图时主要依赖预训练先验知识而非实际读取图表信息，箭头方向反转导致准确率显著下降。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探究视觉语言模型在理解UML类图时，究竟是真正读取图表信息，还是主要依赖预训练的先验知识来推断类之间的关系。

Method: 创建了一个对照UML基准测试，每个符合先验的图表都配有一个冲突先验的对应版本，保持类名和布局不变，仅反转关系箭头方向。评估了8个开源VLM模型和2个闭源前沿模型。

Result: 开源模型在箭头反转后关系方向准确率平均下降33.48%，GPT-5.4 Mini仍有10%差距。在更难的三个类条件下，开源模型准确率下降45.28%，GPT-5.4家族平均下降18.62%。模型扩展仅带来有限改进且依赖模型家族。

Conclusion: 该基准测试揭示了视觉语言模型在基于图表的软件理解中存在诊断性先验驱动失败，表明模型主要依赖预训练先验而非实际读取UML图表信息。

Abstract: Vision Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly applied to software engineering artifacts, especially UML class diagrams whose meaning depends on visual notation. Yet, it is unclear whether VLMs actually read such diagrams or instead answer from pretrained priors about how classes typically relate. We introduce a controlled UML benchmark in which each prior-conforming diagram is paired with its prior-conflicting counterpart that (1) preserves the same class names and layout while (2) reverses only the relation arrow. We evaluate eight open-source VLMs from two model families, InternVL3.5 and Qwen3, alongside two closed-source frontier models GPT-5.4 and GPT-5.4 Mini. Across the eight open-source models, reversing the arrow reduces relation-direction accuracy by 33.48% on average, while GPT-5.4 Mini retains a 10% gap. In the harder three-class condition, accuracy drops sharply by 45.28% for open-source models, and even 18.62% for the GPT-5.4 family on average. Scaling provides only limited improvements and is family-dependent. Our benchmark presents a diagnostic prior-driven failure in diagram-grounded software understanding. Our artifact is available at https://anonymous.4open.science/r/UMLKnowledgeConflict-8461.

</details>


### [56] [Cancelable Biometric Template Protection Based on Multi-Instance Fusion: A Contralateral Iris Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02860)
*Jittarin Chaivong,Nicha Vikromrotjananan,Teekatat Piriyapittaya,Waree Kongprawechnon,Suradej Duangpummet*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种无需外部密钥的可撤销对侧虹膜模板保护方案，通过融合左右眼虹膜信息提升系统准确性和安全性


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可撤销生物特征方案通常需要外部密钥或令牌，增加了攻击面。虹膜一旦泄露无法重新发布，需要更安全的保护方案。

Method: 使用多数表决融合生成稳定模板，基于用户ID的盐值进行比特置换，通过左右眼置换模板的按位异或生成单个保护融合模板。

Result: 在三个数据集上测试，EER分别为0.36%、4.88%、10.80%和3.35%，其中最高值反映更具挑战性的跨设备场景。方案优于无保护基线，与最先进可撤销方法竞争。

Conclusion: 该对侧虹膜方案结合了无令牌多实例融合和对侧绑定，满足ISO/IEC 24745的不可逆性、不可链接性和保密性要求，是首个此类方案。

Abstract: Biometric templates are vulnerable to theft if stored without protection. Unlike passwords, a compromised iris cannot be reissued. Although existing cancelable biometric schemes address this problem, most still require an external key or token, introducing an additional attack surface. This paper proposes a cancelable contralateral iris template protection scheme that eliminates the need for a separate token or stored secret, satisfying the three requirements of ISO/IEC 24745: irreversibility, unlinkability, and confidentiality. The method fuses three enrollment samples per eye using Majority Vote Fusion to produce a stable template, and applies a salt-based bit permutation derived from the subject's enrollment ID. Combining the left- and right-permuted templates via a bitwise XOR produces a single Protected Fused Template. Since left and right iris patterns are statistically independent, fusing contralateral irises improves the accuracy of the system. An attacker must possess both iris codes and both salts to recover any useful information, yielding a larger effective key space than single-iris schemes. Experiments on three datasets, CASIA-IrisV4-Interval, CASIA-IrisV2 (two devices), and CASIA-Iris-Thousand, yield EERs of $0.36$\%, $4.88$\%, $10.80$\%, and $3.35$\%, respectively; the highest value reflects the more challenging cross-device scenario. These results demonstrate that our contralateral approach outperforms unprotected baselines while remaining competitive with state-of-the-art cancelable methods. %In addition, an ablation study confirms the benefit on both recognition performance and security. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first scheme to combine tokenless multi-instance fusion and contralateral binding under ISO/IEC 24745.

</details>


### [57] [E-TraMamba: A New Paradigm for Efficient Long-Term 3D Feature Tracking with Event Cameras](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02866)
*Juwei Shen,Yujie Wu,Changwen Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: E-TraMamba是首个基于Mamba的3D特征跟踪框架，专为处理稀疏、噪声事件流设计，通过线性状态空间模型实现高效长程建模，在事件基准上达到SOTA性能，特征寿命提升2倍以上。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有CNN和Transformer跟踪器难以处理稀疏噪声事件流中的长程时空依赖，特别是在实时性和效率约束下。事件数据具有低延迟、高速感知优势，但现有方法在运动模糊和遮挡下跟踪不稳定。

Method: 1. 采用线性状态空间模型进行高效长程建模；2. 集成轻量级仿射变换预测器以应对运动模糊和遮挡；3. 设计多尺度线索融合方案：局部时空补丁、相关图和位置嵌入；4. 构建大规模合成数据集EvD-PointOdyssey用于训练评估。

Result: 在事件基准测试中达到最先进性能：在严格精度阈值（如0.1米）下，特征寿命提升2倍以上；跟踪特征比率更高；RMSE低于所有基线方法。

Conclusion: E-TraMamba是低延迟视觉里程计、实时SLAM和交互式机器人的强有力候选方案，首次将Mamba架构成功应用于事件数据3D跟踪，解决了稀疏噪声事件流中的长程建模挑战。

Abstract: Event-based 3D tracking enables low-latency and high-speed perception, while existing CNN- and Transformer-based trackers struggle to capture long-range spatiotemporal dependencies in sparse, noisy event streams, especially under real-time and efficiency constraints. To address these challenges, we present E-TraMamba, the first Mamba-based framework for 3D feature tracking on event data. This new framework adopts a linear state-space model for efficient long-range modeling and integrates a lightweight affine-transform predictor to maintain stable tracking under motion blur and occlusion. We also design an effective scheme to fuse multi-scale cues -- local spatiotemporal patches, correlation maps, and positional embeddings -- into a unified representation that enables stable and smooth 3D tracking. We construct a large-scale synthetic dataset, named EvD-PointOdyssey, which is generated with monocular rendering and provides synchronized event streams, depth maps, and accurate 3D trajectories for training and evaluating event-based 3D tracking models. Extensive experiments on event-based benchmarks demonstrate that E-TraMamba achieves state-of-the-art performance, delivering over $2\times$ longer feature lifetimes under strict accuracy thresholds (e.g., 0.1 m), with higher tracked-feature ratios and lower RMSE than all baselines. These results make E-TraMamba a strong candidate for low-latency visual odometry, real-time SLAM, and interactive robotics.

</details>


### [58] [SPLIT: Training-Free AI-Generated and Partially Edited Video Detection via Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02886)
*Jongyeop Hyun,Hyounghun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SPLIT是一种无需训练的AI生成视频检测器，通过在冻结视觉编码器的补丁标记上计算时空不一致性信号，在极低假阳性率下实现高真实视频召回率。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在现实服务中部署AI生成视频检测器需要在真实视频上保持极低的假阳性率，以避免错误拒绝真实内容，而标准指标如AUROC无法反映实际运行情况。

Method: SPLIT使用冻结视觉编码器的补丁标记，计算两个互补信号：两步时间粗糙度（TTR）通过一步和两步特征变化对比捕捉非平滑补丁轨迹，以及局部空间运动不连贯性（LSMI）通过特征空间运动场的梯度测量空间不一致的时间变化。两者通过伽马校正进行乘法融合以在严格阈值下增强真假分离。

Result: 在三个基准测试（FakeParts、GenVideo和ViF-Bench）上，SPLIT在FPR=0.1%时实现了最高的假视频召回率，显著优于有监督和无训练基线，同时对后处理保持鲁棒性且开销可忽略。

Conclusion: SPLIT提供了一种无需训练的高效检测方法，在极低假阳性率下表现出色，适用于现实服务部署，并提出了服务对齐的评估协议。

Abstract: Deploying AI-generated video detectors in real-world services demands an ultra-low false positive rate (FPR) on real videos to avoid falsely rejecting authentic content, a regime where standard metrics such as AUROC fail to reflect actual operating behavior. We introduce Spatial Patch-Level Incoherence and Temporal Roughness (SPLIT), a training-free detector that operates on patch tokens from a frozen vision encoder to detect both fully generated and partially edited videos. SPLIT computes two complementary signals: Two-step Temporal Roughness (TTR), capturing non-smooth patch trajectories via one-step and two-step feature variation contrast, and Local Spatial Motion Incoherence (LSMI), measuring spatially inconsistent temporal changes through gradients of a feature-space motion field. The two are fused multiplicatively with gamma correction to sharpen real-fake separation at strict thresholds. We further propose a service-aligned evaluation protocol based on Fake Recall at fixed FPR with real-only threshold calibration and cross-real threshold transfer. Across three benchmarks (FakeParts, GenVideo, and ViF-Bench), SPLIT achieves the highest Fake Recall at FPR = $0.1\%$, substantially outperforming supervised and training-free baselines while remaining robust to post-processing with negligible overhead. The code is publicly available at https://github.com/mldljyh/SPLIT .

</details>


### [59] [ProLaViT: Learning Progressive Latent Visual Thoughts in Structured Latent Space](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02907)
*Peiming Li,Yifan Wang,Xiaotian Zhang,Zhiyuan Hu,Shiyu Li,Zheng Wei,Yang Tang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ProLaViT是一个渐进式潜在视觉思维框架，通过连续潜在空间中的结构化视觉推导，提升多模态大语言模型在复杂视觉推理任务上的表现，无需外部专家模型且计算成本低。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 多模态大语言模型在复杂视觉推理任务上仍存在困难，这些任务需要多步感知和逻辑推理。现有方法要么计算成本过高（显式视觉生成），要么依赖外部专家模型，缺乏严格的认知逻辑。

Method: 1. 提出ProLaViT框架，在连续潜在空间中进行结构化视觉推导；2. 采用内生自蒸馏机制，利用模型自身的视觉编码器监督潜在思维；3. 构建可扩展的程序化合成流程；4. 设计两种推理范式：空间任务的粗到细因果链和逻辑任务的辩证推理链；5. 提出距离加权多样性损失函数。

Result: 在视觉中心基准测试中，ProLaViT优于基线方法，实现了更高的准确性和可解释性，同时保持了高效率。

Conclusion: ProLaViT通过连续潜在空间中的结构化视觉推导，成功解决了多模态大语言模型在复杂视觉推理任务上的挑战，提供了一种高效、准确且可解释的解决方案。

Abstract: Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have achieved remarkable progress but still struggle with complex visual reasoning tasks requiring multi-step perception and logical deduction. While explicit visual generation incurs prohibitive computational costs, existing latent approaches often rely on external experts or lack rigorous cognitive logic. In this paper, we introduce ProLaViT (Progressive Latent Visual Thought), a framework empowering MLLMs to perform structured visual derivation in the continuous latent space. Unlike works dependent on heterogeneous external models, ProLaViT leverages an endogenous self-distillation mechanism, utilizing the model's own visual encoder to supervise latent thoughts. To facilitate this, we construct a scalable programmatic synthesis pipeline enabling the model to internalize algorithmic precision without inference time tools. We design two reasoning paradigms: (1) Coarse-to-Fine Causal Chain for spatial tasks, guiding attention from global context to local targets. (2) Dialectical Reasoning Chain for logical tasks, incorporating counter-factual thinking for verification. Furthermore, we propose a Distance-Weighted Diversity Loss to impose topology-aware constraints, preventing feature degeneration by enforcing semantic distinctiveness. Extensive experiments demonstrate that ProLaViT outperforms baselines on vision-centric benchmarks, achieving superior accuracy and interpretability with high efficiency.

</details>


### [60] [Holo-Captioning: Toward the Text Equivalent of 3D Scenes](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02908)
*Kun-Yu Lin,Chengke Bu,Zhenguo Li,Kai Han*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出holo-captioning任务，旨在为3D场景生成结构化文本描述，包含实体语义标签、空间位置、属性和关系，并开发了HoloScribe模型和新评估指标HoloScore。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有3D场景理解方法通常只关注单一任务（如检测、分割或简单描述），缺乏对3D场景中所有实体及其关系的全面文本描述。需要一种能全面捕捉3D场景语义内容、空间布局和实体关系的结构化描述方法。

Method: 1. 提出holo-captioning任务，要求生成包含实体语义标签、空间位置、属性和关系的结构化文本描述。2. 开发HoloScribe模型，采用实例感知的解耦流水线：首先生成单个实体和实体对的详细描述，然后通过锚点感知实例链接识别关系实体对。3. 构建包含超过15K场景的大规模基准数据集用于训练和评估。4. 提出HoloScore评估指标和人工标注测试集。

Result: 实验结果表明，HoloScribe在holo-captioning任务上显著优于现有最先进的3D密集描述方法和3D LLM通用模型。构建的数据集和评估指标为可靠模型评估提供了基础。

Conclusion: holo-captioning是一个有前景的3D场景理解新任务，HoloScribe模型通过结构化描述和实例感知方法有效解决了该任务，为3D场景的全面文本表示提供了新方向。

Abstract: This work introduces holo-captioning, a novel task that strives to seek the text equivalent of 3D scenes. As the initial step, we formulate holo-captioning as generating a structured textual description that comprehensively depicts all entities within a 3D scene -- including their semantic tags, spatial locations, attributes, and inter-entity relations. To tackle this challenging task, we first develop an effective captioning engine to produce detailed descriptions of individual entity instances and instance pairs, and contribute a large-scale benchmark comprising over 15K scenes for training and evaluation. Building upon this foundation, we propose HoloScribe, a novel model that features an instance-aware decoupled pipeline for generating structured holo-captions, and further incorporates anchor-aware instance linking to identify relational instance pairs. Additionally, we propose a comprehensive evaluation metric named HoloScore, and provide a human-curated test set to ensure reliable model assessment. Experimental results demonstrate that HoloScribe significantly outperforms state-of-the-art 3D dense captioners and 3D LLM generalists, underscoring the effectiveness of our approach. Project page: https://visual-ai.github.io/holocap/

</details>


### [61] [MatPhaseBench: A Semantics-Guided Benchmark for Materials Phase Diagrams Understanding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02934)
*Hanwen Wang,Sihan Liang,Zhiwei Liu,Yangang Wang,Wei Yan,Yuqin Liu,Zongguo Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了MatPhaseBench，一个专注于材料相图的高质量科学图像理解基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在复杂科学图像理解方面的能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 材料相图是材料科学中的核心知识表示，需要热力学机制分析和科学推理。虽然视觉语言模型在科学图像理解方面显示出潜力，但对其在需要深度机制解释的逻辑复杂图像上的系统评估仍然有限，相图为这一目的提供了具有挑战性的测试平台。

Method: 从材料科学期刊的3681篇论文中，选择了200个高质量的图表-文本对，涵盖189个材料系统和70种元素。基准具有三个关键特征：1)针对复杂科学图像理解；2)全面的图像-文本对齐；3)高质量的人工监督文本获取。

Result: 实验结果表明，当前的视觉语言模型在专家级理解方面仍有很大差距：主要局限于表面视觉感知，缺乏基于热力学机制的深度推理，领域意识和专家分析经验有限，在区分复合或多图表设置中的细粒度差异方面表现不佳。

Conclusion: MatPhaseBench构成了一个具有挑战性的研究级基准，为复杂科学图像理解、相图分析和可信赖的多模态AI在科学中的应用提供了基础平台。

Abstract: Materials phase diagrams are a core knowledge representation in materials science, encoding temperature,composition, phase stability, and phase transformation pathways, with their full understanding requiring thermodynamic mechanism analysis and scientific reasoning. Although VLMs have shown promise in scientific image understanding, their systematic evaluation on such logically complex images demanding deep mechanistic interpretation remains limited, and phase diagrams provide a challenging testbed for this purpose. We introduce MatPhaseBench, a high-quality, high-reliability benchmark for complex scientific image understanding, focused on materials phase diagrams. MatPhaseBench is constructed from 3681 papers in classical materials science journals, from which 200 high-quality diagram-text pairs were selected, covering 189 material systems and 70 elements. The benchmark has three key features: (1)targeting complex scientific image understanding-it moves beyond simple objective tests to open-ended tasks requiring deep comprehension; (2)comprehensive image-text alignment-semantic information associated with images is fully preserved during literature mining and matching; (3) high-quality human-supervised text acquisition-all descriptions undergo strict manual validation. Experimental results show that current VLMs remain substantially behind expert-level understanding: they are largely limited to surface visual perception, lack deep reasoning grounded in thermodynamic mechanisms, have limited domain awareness and expert analytical experience, and perform poorly in distinguishing fine-grained differences in composite or multi-diagram settings. Overall, MatPhaseBench constitutes a challenging research-grade benchmark, providing a foundational platform for complex scientific image understanding, phase diagram analysis, and trustworthy multi-modal AI in science.

</details>


### [62] [Pooling-Based Context Modeling for Convolution-Free Deep Image Prior](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02952)
*Gihyun Kim,Jong-Seok Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Pool-DIP提出了一种无卷积架构，通过池化建模对比度来高效捕获空间上下文，在降低参数和计算复杂度的同时提升去噪性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 卷积神经网络（CNN）通过利用相邻像素的空间上下文实现强去噪性能，Deep Image Prior（DIP）利用这一特性从单张噪声输入恢复图像而无需大数据集。然而，DIP的过参数化架构在优化过程中容易导致噪声拟合。

Method: 提出Pool-DIP，一种无卷积架构，通过池化对比度建模来高效捕获空间上下文。该架构显著减少了参数数量和计算复杂度，同时改善去噪性能。

Result: 实验结果表明，Pool-DIP在多个数据集上取得竞争性性能，包括真实世界基准测试。谱分析进一步显示Pool-DIP能稳定高频分量的演化并抑制错误高频信号。

Conclusion: Pool-DIP在降低参数和计算复杂度的同时提升去噪性能，并且能很好地泛化到其他图像恢复任务如超分辨率和修复。

Abstract: Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) achieve strong denoising performance by exploiting spatial context from neighboring pixels. Deep Image Prior (DIP) leverages this property to restore images from a single noisy input without requiring large datasets. However, the over-parameterized architecture of DIP often leads to noise fitting during optimization. In this paper, we propose Pool-DIP, a convolution-free architecture that incorporates pooling-based contrast modeling to capture spatial context efficiently. Pool-DIP improves denoising performance while significantly reducing the number of parameters and computational complexity compared to convolution-based DIP models. Experimental results show that Pool-DIP achieves competitive performance across multiple datasets, including a real-world benchmark. Spectral analysis further reveals that Pool-DIP stabilizes the evolution of high-frequency components during optimization and suppresses erroneous high-frequency signals. The proposed architecture also generalizes well to other image restoration tasks such as super-resolution and inpainting.

</details>


### [63] [MORE: A Multilingual Document Parsing Benchmark and Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02956)
*Long Xu,Binghong Wu,Tinghao Yu,Hao Feng,Zhenyu Huang,Haoqing Jiang,Yunhao Wang,Shuo Huang,Feng Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: MORE是一个大规模多语言文档解析基准，覆盖149种语言，包含代码块、表格等复杂结构，使用真实文档数据，填补了现有基准在低资源语言评估上的空白。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有文档解析基准主要关注英语和中文等高资源语言，缺乏对多语言模型在其他语言上性能的实证评估。虽然现代视觉语言模型声称支持数百种语言，但缺乏真实标注数据来验证这些能力。

Method: 构建MORE基准，包含三个关键维度：1) 覆盖149种语言的空前规模；2) 超越纯文本，包含代码块、表格、目录等结构复杂性；3) 通过模型辅助、人工精炼的标注流程从真实文档中收集数据。

Result: 使用MORE评估了最先进的模型，为长尾语言建立了新的性能基线，验证了该基准在诊断模型在真实多样场景中能力的有效性。

Conclusion: MORE填补了多语言文档解析评估的空白，提供了覆盖149种语言的大规模基准，能够有效评估模型在真实复杂场景中的多语言能力，为未来研究提供了重要工具。

Abstract: Multilingual documents encapsulate rich regional cultures, scientific discoveries, and historical records. Parsing this content into structured, machine-readable formats is critical for unlocking global knowledge. However, existing benchmarks predominantly focus on high-resource languages like English and Chinese, creating an evaluation blind spot concerning model performance on other languages. While recent Vision-Language Models (VLMs) claim support for hundreds of languages, the lack of ground truth makes it impossible to empirically verify these capabilities. To bridge this gap, we introduce MORE, a large-scale benchmark designed for multilingual document parsing evaluation. MORE distinguishes itself through three key dimensions: (1) Unprecedented Scale: It covers 149 languages, making it the most linguistically diverse benchmark to date; (2) Structural Complexity: Unlike previous works, it extends evaluation beyond plain text to include structural elements such as code blocks, tables, and catalogs; and (3) Data Authenticity: All samples are curated from real-world documents via a model-assisted, human-refined annotation pipeline. We evaluate state-of-the-art models using MORE, establishing new performance baselines for long-tail languages and validating the benchmark's effectiveness in diagnosing model capabilities in realistic, diverse scenarios. The MORE dataset will be available at https://github.com/zimoqingfeng/MORE.

</details>


### [64] [ReLo-IRR: Reflection-Guided LoRA Framework for Image Reflection Removal](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02957)
*Chaoqun Wang,Yuehuan Wei,Haoxiang Cao,Shaobo Min*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ReLo-IRR：一种基于整流流模型的反射引导LoRA框架，通过预测反射强度描述符实现图像相关的LoRA调制，有效解决传统方法在强反射残留和弱反射细节丢失的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有单图像反射去除方法使用图像无关的适应策略（如微调或ControlNet），导致对强反射抑制不足而残留，对弱反射过度抑制而丢失细节。需要一种能够根据反射严重程度进行自适应调整的方法。

Method: 提出反射引导的LoRA框架：1）轻量级估计器预测反射强度描述符，为每张图像提供反射主导性的显式先验，实现图像相关的LoRA调制；2）时间条件机制将反射描述符与时间步嵌入融合，使LoRA调制与从粗到细的去噪过程协同演化。

Result: 在具有挑战性的基准测试上进行了广泛实验，验证了ReLo-IRR的有效性，展示了优越的去反射性能和强大的泛化能力。

Conclusion: 通过联合建模反射强度和去噪动态，ReLo-IRR实现了对不同反射条件的鲁棒抑制，为单图像反射去除提供了更有效的解决方案。

Abstract: Single-image reflection removal (SIRR) aims to recover the clean transmission layer from a reflection-contaminated image. Although recent methods achieve promising results with large diffusion models, they rely on image-agnostic adaptation strategies, e.g., fine-tuning or ControlNet, that enforce uniform suppression regardless of reflection severity. As a result, heavy reflections often leave residuals, while weak ones suffer from detail loss. To this end, we propose ReLo-IRR, a reflection-guided LoRA framework built upon the rectified flow model. First, a lightweight estimator is designed to predict the reflection strength descriptor, providing an explicit prior of reflection dominance for each image and enabling image-dependent LoRA modulation. Second, we introduce a time-conditioned mechanism that fuses this reflection descriptor with timestep embeddings, enabling LoRA modulation to evolve consistently with the coarse-to-fine denoising process. By jointly modeling reflection strength and denoising dynamics, our ReLo-IRR achieves robust suppression of diverse reflection conditions. Extensive experiments on challenging benchmarks validate the effectiveness of ReLo-IRR, demonstrating superior dereflection performance and robust generalization. The code is released at https://github.com/KONGBAI-8080/ReLo-IRR.

</details>


### [65] [Incentivizing Vision Language Models to Search for Long Video Question Answering](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02959)
*Harsh Goel,S P Sharan,Sahil Shah,Minkyu Choi,Joungbin An,Kristen Grauman,Sandeep P. Chinchali*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VSeek是一个将长视频问答从被动感知任务转变为多轮检索过程的智能框架，通过强化学习训练查询生成和推理，使用神经符号方法确保检索内容相关性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统长视频问答任务缺乏有效的奖励信号来指导强化学习训练，无法确保检索内容的相关性，这限制了长视频理解能力的提升。

Method: 1. 将自然语言查询编译为时序逻辑规范，分解为原子视觉原语检查清单；2. 使用强化学习联合训练搜索查询生成和检索片段推理；3. 基于成功检索具体视觉元素的神经符号方法提供可验证的密集奖励。

Result: 在长视频理解基准测试中，VSeek将Pass@1分数提升高达8%，Pass@4分数提升15%，优于基础模型。

Conclusion: VSeek通过将长视频问答重新定义为证据驱动的多轮检索过程，并结合神经符号验证的强化学习训练，显著提升了长视频理解性能，为视频推理任务提供了新范式。

Abstract: We introduce VSeek, an agentic framework that transforms long-video question answering (LVQA) from a passive, single-pass perception task into a multi-turn retrieval process. VSeek utilizes a natural language-driven search to identify relevant context within long videos and is post-trained with reinforcement learning (RL) to jointly formulate targeted search queries and reason over retrieved clips for LVQA. While RL post-training has revolutionized reasoning in symbolic domains such as mathematics and code, its application to long-video understanding remains hindered by a lack of verified rewards. To ensure that the retrieved context is relevant, we propose a novel neuro-symbolic approach that bridges open-ended natural language with discrete visual verification. Specifically, complex user queries are compiled into formal temporal logic specifications for systematically decomposing natural language questions into a definitive checklist of required atomic visual primitives, such as key objects and activities, along with their temporal ordering. These systematically derived grounding events provide the critical feedback signal for RL post-training, enabling dense, verifiable rewards based on the successful retrieval of these specific visual elements rather than relying entirely on outcome-only answer accuracy. By explicitly optimizing for this verifiable evidence-seeking behavior, VSeek improves Pass@1 scores by up to 8% and Pass@4 scores by 15% on long-video understanding benchmarks compared to base models. We open-source our code at https://utaustin-swarmlab.github.io/VSeek.

</details>


### [66] [Overloading Large Vision-Language Models for Jailbreaking](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02961)
*Haoyu Zhang,Yangyang Guo,Mohan Kankanhalli*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种新颖的"信息过载"方法，通过结合大量文本和多维图像攻击，以递归式图像排版布局来指数级增加多模态信息复杂度，从而实现对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）的越狱攻击，在开源和商业模型上都达到了当前最佳水平。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 大型视觉语言模型（LVLMs）在现实应用中越来越广泛，但其双模态攻击面使其容易受到越狱攻击。现有攻击方法设计简单，主要依赖短文本和分布外图像，而最近大语言模型骨干和多模态机制的进步削弱了这些攻击的效力，特别是在不同架构间的可迁移性方面存在局限。

Method: 提出了一种信息过载方法，结合大量文本和多维图像攻击，采用基于递归的图像排版布局，指数级增加多模态信息复杂度。这种过载方法放大了所需的跨模态处理，从而破坏了LVLMs的安全对齐机制。

Result: 在开源模型上平均攻击成功率（ASR）达到88.6%，在商业LVLMs上达到84.0%，比最佳基线高出48.7%。在开源代理模型上优化的提示能有效跨模型家族迁移。安全关键信息流分析显示，复杂的图像排版组合会加剧跨模态处理，降低模型生成拒绝响应的确定性。

Conclusion: 信息过载是一种实际且新兴的LVLM安全风险，突显了需要针对复杂多模态越狱输入开发更强防御措施的必要性。该研究揭示了复杂多模态输入如何通过加剧跨模态处理来破坏模型的安全对齐机制。

Abstract: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) exhibit remarkable vision-language capabilities and are increasingly deployed in real-world applications such as personal assistants, document analysis systems, and embodied agents. However, their dual-modal attack surfaces make them vulnerable to jailbreak attacks. Existing LVLM jailbreaks rely on simple designs, e.g., short text and out-of-distribution images. Nevertheless, recent advancements in both large language model backbones and multimodal mechanisms undermine these attacks, particularly their transferability among model architectures. To overcome this limitation, we propose a novel information overloading method that is equipped with both extensive text and multi-dimensional image attacks. These components are arranged in recursion-based image-typography layouts to exponentially increase multimodal information complexity. This overloading approach amplifies the cross-modal processing required, which undermines the safety alignment in LVLMs. Extensive experiments on both open-sourced and commercial LVLMs establish our method as a new state-of-the-art LVLM jailbreak attack. On open-source models, our method achieves an average ASR of 88.6%; on commercial LVLMs, it reaches an average ASR of 84.0%, exceeding the best baseline by 48.7%. Moreover, our prompts optimized on open-source surrogate models transfer effectively across model families. Beyond empirical results, we probe the safety-critical information flows within victim LVLMs. Our observations reveal that complex image-typography compositions induce intensified cross-modal processing and reduce the model's certainty in generating refusal responses. Together, these findings highlight information overloading as a practical and emerging safety risk for real-world LVLM deployments, underscoring the need for stronger defenses against complex multimodal jailbreak inputs.

</details>


### [67] [Parallelized Autoregressive Decoding for Omni-Modal Dense Video Captioning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02963)
*Wenzheng Zeng,Siyi Jiao,Chen Gao,Hwee Tou Ng,Mike Zheng Shou*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出并行化自回归框架PadCaptioner，通过弱局部依赖关系重构因果依赖图，实现无损并行解码，提升密集视频描述任务的推理效率和性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 密集视频描述任务中，传统的逐token自回归生成方式在视频长度和事件密度增加时，推理效率严重受限，阻碍了可扩展性。需要一种既能保持生成质量又能提高效率的方法。

Method: 提出并行化自回归框架：1）潜在全局规划机制，自动学习事件级结构，生成编码全局事件间因果关系的紧凑token，自适应聚合事件级视听语义；2）事件分解并行解码机制，平衡局部关注与全局事件间感知，对弱跨事件依赖的token进行并行解码，对每个事件内紧密耦合的token保持顺序解码。

Result: 在多个基准测试中证明，该方法在跨模态事件定位和描述任务中，在效率和性能方面都具有明显优势。

Conclusion: 通过利用跨事件的弱局部依赖关系重构因果依赖图，实现了无损并行生成，不仅提高了生成效率，还增强了时间定位描述性能，为密集视频描述任务提供了高效的解决方案。

Abstract: Dense video captioning aims to generate temporally grounded descriptions of video events, benefiting both event-level video understanding and generation. In this domain, autoregressive video large language models have emerged as a prevalent paradigm due to their strong generative and cross-modal modeling capacity. However, generating dense captions under the token-by-token paradigm severely limits inference efficiency and hinders scalability as video length and event density increase. In this work, we propose a parallelized autoregressive framework that not only improves generation efficiency but also enhances temporally grounded captioning performance. Our key insight is to exploit the weak local dependencies across temporally distinct events to restructure the causal dependency graph, thereby enabling lossless parallel generation. Specifically, tokens with weak cross-event dependencies can be decoded in parallel, while tightly coupled tokens within each event retain sequential decoding to preserve local semantic coherence. To realize this insight, we introduce two key components for lossless parallel decoding: (1) a latent global planning mechanism that automatically learns the event-level structure and produces compact tokens encoding global inter-event causality while adaptively aggregating event-level audio-visual semantics, guiding subsequent dependency restructuring and parallel decoding; and (2) an event-factorized parallel decoding mechanism that effectively balances local focus with global inter-event awareness. Experiments on various benchmarks demonstrate the clear advantage of our approach in both efficiency and performance in omni-modal event grounding and captioning. Project website: https://github.com/showlab/PadCaptioner.

</details>


### [68] [Awakening Diffusion Transformers: Eliciting Stronger Generation and Understanding via Massive Activation Modulation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02968)
*Chaofan Gan,Zicheng Zhao,Yuanpeng Tu,Xi Chen,Ziran Qin,Tieyuan Chen,Supavadee Aramvith,Mehrtash Harandi,Weiyao Lin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文系统分析了扩散变换器(DiTs)中的大规模激活(MAs)，发现其具有特定的空间和特征维度分布模式，并提出了一种无需训练的框架EMA，利用MAs作为统一调制信号来提升DiTs的生成和表示能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 虽然大规模激活(MAs)在基于Transformer的模型中广泛存在，但其在扩散变换器(DiTs)中的结构和功能角色尚未得到充分理解。研究者希望系统分析DiTs中的MAs特性，并探索如何利用这些特性来提升模型的性能。

Method: 1. 系统分析DiTs中MAs的空间和特征维度分布特性
2. 提出EMA框架，包含两个核心组件：
   - 生成方面：MA驱动的细节引导(DG)，通过抑制MA维度构建细节缺失的反事实预测，引导采样生成更精细的视觉细节
   - 理解方面：MA调制的表示提取(MREP)，使用预训练的AdaLN通道调制减少MA方向主导，并拼接空间归一化的MA图以保留有用的空间结构

Result: 1. 发现MAs在图像标记中空间分布，但在固定的少量特征维度上集中
2. 这些维度与AdaLN残差缩放因子密切相关，主要受去噪时间步而非文本条件调制
3. EMA框架在大量实验中一致提升了DiTs的生成质量和表示能力
4. DG支持高效的部分前向推理、与无分类器引导的集成，以及用于细化选定图像区域的标记级局部DG

Conclusion: 该研究揭示了DiTs中MAs的独特结构和功能特性，表明MAs在生成任务中负责精细细节合成，在理解任务中影响特征判别能力。提出的EMA框架通过利用MAs作为统一调制信号，无需额外训练即可同时提升DiTs的生成和表示能力，为理解和改进扩散变换器提供了新的视角和方法。

Abstract: Massive Activations (MAs) have been widely observed in Transformer-based models, yet their structure and functional roles in Diffusion Transformers (DiTs) remain insufficiently understood. In this work, we systematically analyze MAs in representative DiTs and find that they are spatially distributed across image tokens while concentrated in a small set of fixed feature dimensions. We further show that these dimensions are closely aligned with AdaLN residual scaling factors and are primarily modulated by the denoising timestep rather than text conditions. This structure leads to two task-dependent effects: for generation, MAs are critical for fine-grained detail synthesis while having limited influence on global semantics; for understanding, their shared high-magnitude directions make raw DiT features overly similar across spatial tokens and weaken dense feature discrimination. Based on these findings, we introduce Eliciting Massive Activation (EMA), a training-free framework that leverages Massive Activations (MAs) as a unified modulation signal to improve both generative and representational capabilities of DiTs. For generation, EMA proposes MA-driven Detail G}uidance (DG), which suppresses MA dimensions to construct a detail-deficient counterfactual prediction and guides sampling toward finer visual details. DG further supports efficient partial-forward inference, integration with classifier-free guidance, and token-level Local DG for refining selected image regions. For understanding, EMA introduces MA-modulated REPresentation extraction (MREP), which uses pretrained AdaLN channel-wise modulation to reduce MA directional dominance and concatenates spatially normalized MA maps to preserve useful spatial structure. Extensive experiments demonstrate that EMA consistently improves both the generation quality and representation capability of DiTs.

</details>


### [69] [RePos: Relative-to-Absolute Output Factorization for Cross-Environment WiFi-Based 3D Human Pose Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02986)
*Zhangcheng Hou,Tomoaki Ohtsuki*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: RePos框架通过分离相对姿态估计和根位置定位，解决了WiFi CSI人体姿态估计在跨环境泛化中的问题，相比传统绝对姿态回归方法有显著改进


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 基于WiFi CSI的设备无关3D人体姿态估计在跨环境泛化方面存在限制，因为CSI测量缺乏身体部位的空间局部对应关系，且受多径传播影响严重，导致模型将身体结构与环境特定的位置线索耦合在一起

Method: 提出RePos因子化框架，将根相对姿态估计与根定位分离：1）将CSI特征分组为身体部位感知的潜在令牌，通过骨架引导建模细化姿态；2）单独的基于幅度的网络通过可微分空间分解模块估计根位置

Result: 在严格的MM-Fi跨环境协议下，RePos达到254.4-296.1 mm MPJPE，比现有WiFi方法降低10-21%；在单环境Person-in-WiFi-3D数据集上，RePos-D变体达到86.9 mm MPJPE，比DT-Pose提升3.4%

Conclusion: 通过分离姿态估计和定位，RePos学习了环境不变的姿态表示，相对姿态表示基本与位置无关，而根定位保持环境依赖性，表明结构和定位具有不同的泛化行为

Abstract: Device-free 3D human pose estimation using commodity WiFi Channel State Information (CSI) enables privacy-preserving and illumination-robust human sensing, but its deployment is limited by poor cross-environment generalization. Unlike images, CSI measurements do not have a spatially localized correspondence to body parts and are heavily affected by multipath propagation, causing models that regress absolute poses to entangle body structure with environment-specific location cues. Within a single environment this coupling is benign: an end-to-end absolute-pose variant, RePos-D, already achieves state-of-the-art accuracy on Person-in-WiFi-3D (86.9 mm MPJPE, a 3.4% gain over the previous best WiFi method, DT-Pose). Across environments, however, the same model overfits position and suffers significant performance degradation. We therefore propose RePos, a factorized framework that separates root-relative pose estimation from root localization. By preventing absolute-pose supervision from affecting the structure branch, RePos learns environment-invariant pose representations. Specifically, it groups CSI features into body-part-aware latent tokens that skeleton-guided modeling refines into the pose, while a separate amplitude-based network estimates the root position through a differentiable spatial-decomposition module. Under the strict MM-Fi cross-environment protocol, RePos achieves MPJPEs of 254.4-296.1 mm, a 10-21% reduction over existing WiFi-based methods. The improvement remains consistent across activity protocols, leave-one-environment-out splits, and leakage-free few-shot transfer. Analysis of the learned features shows that relative-pose representations remain largely position-agnostic, while root localization retains environment dependence, indicating distinct generalization behavior for structure and localization.

</details>


### [70] [Cross-device Collaborative Test-time Adaptation with Zeroth-order Optimization and Model Merging](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.02988)
*Yu Mitsuzumi,Akisato Kimura,Yasuhiro Fujiwara,Hisashi Kashima*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出一种适用于资源受限设备的测试时自适应方法，通过结合零阶优化和模型合并技术，避免资源密集的反向传播过程，降低内存需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有测试时自适应方法大多依赖反向传播进行模型更新，需要大量内存资源，难以在边缘设备等资源受限环境中部署。

Method: 结合零阶优化（仅需前向处理）和模型合并技术，在跨设备协作框架中，将合并系数作为优化目标以降低优化维度，并提出预处理策略修剪模型权重和减少信息冗余。

Result: 在常见图像损坏和风格转换基准测试中验证了方法的有效性，能够在资源受限设备上实现测试时自适应。

Conclusion: 通过零阶优化和模型合并的协同组合，成功实现了在资源受限设备上的测试时自适应部署，解决了传统方法内存需求过高的问题。

Abstract: Test-time adaptation (TTA) mitigates domain shifts by using incoming test data to update a model on the fly. The majority of TTA methods require resource-intensive backpropagation (BP) for model updates, particularly demanding large memory sizes, which makes it infeasible to deploy them on resource-limited devices (e.g., edge devices). To address this issue, we integrate two different techniques, zeroth-order optimization (ZOO) and model merging, under the recently established cross-device collaborative TTA (CDC-TTA) framework, where the system is composed of a mixture of resource-abundant and resource-limited devices, and the model information (e.g., model weights obtained on each device) is shared across the devices. Our method is executable on resource-limited devices by introducing ZOO, which requires only forward processing and bypasses the resource-intensive BP optimization. Concurrently, to mitigate the high-dimensional optimization difficulty caused by the side effect of ZOO, we incorporate model merging of the shared multiple models and set the merge coefficients as the optimization objective, which successfully reduces the optimization dimension.
