Deployed VLMs may thus defer to source identity over the evidence in front of them, a reliability failure we can measure across models, localize, and causally probe. We release the stimulus suite and CueTrust.

</details>


### [106] [Present but Not Remembered: Auditing How Frozen VLAs Encode, Deploy, and Steer Visual History](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03372)
*Chih-Ting Liao,Xin Cao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究发现视觉-语言-动作模型（VLA）虽然编码了历史信息，但历史信息与当前帧高度冗余，仅在当前帧严重退化时才被因果使用，且不同架构对历史信息的部署策略存在差异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究动机是探索VLA模型如何表示和使用历史信息，尽管这些模型在每个决策步骤接收最新观察，但先前工作主要关注添加记忆机制，而非研究现有历史信息的表示和使用方式。

Method: 使用层解析线性探测和因果交换干预方法，分析了来自两个架构家族的三个VLA模型，并引入了无需训练的时间部署审计来区分不同的部署机制。

Result: 发现三个关键现象：1）过去帧内容在整个网络中保持线性可解码；2）历史中超出当前帧的独特信息几乎不存在，表明存储的历史主要是当前帧的冗余副本；3）仅当当前帧严重退化时历史才被因果部署，且动作读出逐渐减少对历史的依赖。不同架构的部署策略不同：在相同遮挡条件下，一种架构越来越依赖历史作为后备，而另一种则减少依赖。

Conclusion: VLA模型并未遗忘过去，但未能将历史表示为与当前不同的独特信息。可操控性取决于历史如何部署而非是否被编码。未来的记忆增强应该注入过去独特的、非冗余的信息，而不仅仅是更多历史数据。

Abstract: A frozen vision-language-action model (VLA) receives recent observations at every decision step, yet prior work has focused on adding memory rather than asking how existing history is represented and used. We study this temporal axis using layer-resolved linear probing and causal interchange interventions across three VLAs from two architecture families. We find a three-part dissociation. First, past-frame content remains linearly decodable throughout the network. Second, information unique to history beyond the current frame is nearly absent, indicating that stored history is largely a redundant copy of the present. Third, history is causally deployed only when the current frame is heavily degraded, while the action readout progressively loses dependence on history through the network. Although all models encode history similarly, their deployment strategies differ: under the same occlusion, one architecture increasingly relies on history as a fallback, whereas the other relies on it less. We further introduce a training-free temporal deployment audit that distinguishes these regimes. In the fallback regime, re-injecting history neither repairs occlusion nor disambiguates actions, confirming the redundancy of the stored representation. In the other regime, the same intervention reliably steers the predicted action toward the donor history. These results show that steerability depends on how history is deployed rather than whether it is encoded. VLAs do not forget the past; they largely fail to represent it as information distinct from the present. Our findings suggest that future memory augmentation should inject information unique to the past rather than simply more history.

</details>


### [107] [TemporalGS: Training-Free Plug-and-Play Acceleration for 3D Gaussian Splatting Rendering via Temporal Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03390)
*Yuhongze Zhou,Zihao Yang,Xinxin Zuo,Juwei Lu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: TemporalGS是一种无需训练的即插即用算法，通过利用时间先验来加速3D高斯溅射渲染，实现高达1.48倍的加速效果


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 3D高斯溅射在快速高保真渲染方面表现优异，但在高帧率、低延迟渲染方面仍面临挑战，尤其是场景中出现大量高斯椭球体时。现有方法通常需要后训练或后处理，限制了其实用性。

Method: 提出两种训练免费的加速策略：1）时间动态剔除，过滤掉对当前帧贡献较小的高斯体；2）选择性渲染，仅渲染无法通过时间先验近似的小部分图块。这两种策略基于时间先验（几何和外观缓冲区）来减少连续帧之间的冗余操作。

Result: TemporalGS在保持竞争性渲染质量的同时，实现高达1.48倍的渲染加速，性能与现有的后训练或后处理加速方法相当甚至更好。该方法还能扩展到基于硬件光栅化的3DGS实现。

Conclusion: TemporalGS提供了一种简单有效的即插即用解决方案，无需任何训练即可加速3DGS渲染，展示了在软件和硬件光栅化系统中的良好可移植性。

Abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) has revolutionized novel-view synthesis with its fast and high-fidelity rendering. However, rendering at high FPS and low latency across various scenes remains a challenge, especially when large amounts of 3D Gaussian ellipsoids appear in the scene. To address this issue, we introduce TemporalGS, to the best of our knowledge, the first training-free plug-and-play algorithmic approach to accelerate 3DGS rendering without any post-training or post-processing, implemented on top of tile-based software rasterization. The key idea is that, instead of rendering frames independently as 3DGS, we leverage the temporal priors, represented by novel geometry and appearance buffers, etc., to reduce redundancy of Gaussian preprocessing, sorting, and rasterization operations of consecutive frames. Specifically, we propose two acceleration strategies: (1) temporal dynamic culling, which filters out Gaussians that contribute less to current frame rendering; (2) selective rendering, which renders only a small portion of tiles that cannot be approximated by the temporal priors. By adapting and interleaving these two strategies, TemporalGS yields a simple but effective plug-and-play solution for 3DGS rendering speed-up without any training. Extensive experiments show that TemporalGS achieves comparable or even better performance compared to existing state-of-the-art post-training or post-processing-based 3DGS rendering acceleration approaches. TemporalGS can significantly enhance the rendering speed of various 3DGS methods, achieving up to $1.48\times$ acceleration, while maintaining competitive rendering quality. We further extend our TemporalGS to hardware rasterization-based 3DGS to show the portability of our algorithm.

</details>


### [108] [Handwriting Trajectory Recovery with Diffusion Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03422)
*Hiroki Nagamatsu,Shoji Toyota,Seiichi Uchida*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出首个基于扩散模型的笔迹轨迹恢复框架，将离线笔迹图像转换为在线笔迹轨迹，通过图像条件生成方法显著提升复杂多笔画字符的恢复精度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 笔迹轨迹恢复（笔画恢复）是从离线笔迹图像重建在线笔迹轨迹的任务，在笔画级编辑和法医分析中有重要应用。现有方法存在局限性，需要更准确处理复杂多笔画字符的解决方案。

Method: 提出首个基于扩散模型的框架，将轨迹恢复建模为图像条件生成问题，使用去噪扩散模型采样与观察到的墨迹轨迹一致的笔迹轨迹。

Result: 在CASIA-OLHWDB数据集上的广泛定量评估表明，该方法在时间相似性（DTW/LDTW）和形状保真度（AIoU）上显著优于PEN-Net和Cross-VAE等代表性方法。模型能够捕捉一般笔画顺序趋势，并展示出跨脚本泛化能力。

Conclusion: 提出的扩散模型框架在笔迹轨迹恢复任务中表现出色，不仅提升了复杂多笔画字符的恢复精度，还展示了良好的泛化能力，为离线到在线笔迹转换提供了新的有效解决方案。

Abstract: Recovering online pen trajectories from offline handwriting images, often referred to as handwriting trajectory recovery (stroke recovery), is an offline-to-online conversion task with applications in stroke-level editing and forensic analysis. We propose, to the best of our knowledge, the first diffusion-model-based framework for this task. Our method formulates trajectory recovery as image-conditioned generation and uses a denoising diffusion model to sample pen trajectories consistent with the observed ink trace. Through extensive quantitative evaluations on CASIA-OLHWDB (1.0-1.1), we verify that the proposed approach enables accurate recovery even for complex multi-stroke characters, substantially improving both temporal similarity (DTW/LDTW) and shape fidelity (AIoU) over representative prior methods such as PEN-Net and Cross-VAE. We further show that the model captures general stroke-order tendencies and generalizes to classes unseen during training, exemplified by cross-script transfer: a model trained on Chinese characters can recover reasonable stroke orders for Latin letters to some extent.

</details>


### [109] [WorldBagel: Uncovering the Power of Unified Multimodal Models for Vision-Language-Action-World Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03461)
*Zelin Zhao,Min Shi,Bo Yuan,Haotian Xue,Jialuo Li,Lama Moukheiber,Humphrey Shi,Yongxin Chen*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: WorldBagel是一个基于BAGEL多模态统一模型构建的VLAW框架，通过系统研究统一化在世界建模中的作用，在多任务机器人操作和跨领域实验中表现出色，优于任务特定方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 世界模型旨在捕捉支持感知、推理和行动的环境动态，但现有的统一视觉语言模型作为世界模型的潜力尚未充分探索。本研究旨在探索统一化在世界建模中的角色和优势。

Method: 基于BAGEL多模态统一模型构建WorldBagel统一VLAW框架，在LIBERO、Language Table和Franka等数据集上进行多任务机器人操作和跨领域实验，系统研究统一化对世界建模的影响。

Result: WorldBagel在各项实验中持续优于任务特定替代方案，学习到更具结构化和语义对齐的动作表示，统一化不仅带来架构便利，还显著提升VLAW模型性能。

Conclusion: 统一化是学习有效VLAW模型的关键因素，WorldBagel框架不仅获得一致的实证收益，还为多模态世界建模提供了更深入的见解。

Abstract: World models aim to capture environment dynamics in ways that support perception, reasoning, and action, and have recently become a central direction in Vision-Language-Action-World (VLAW) modeling. Meanwhile, unified vision-language models have demonstrated strong multimodal generation capabilities, yet their potential as world models remains underexplored. In this work, we introduce \texttt{WorldBagel}, a unified VLAW framework built on BAGEL, a modern multimodal unified model, and use it to systematically investigate the role of unification in world modeling. Across multi-task robotic manipulation and cross-domain experiments, \texttt{WorldBagel} consistently outperforms task-specific alternatives and learns action representations that are more structured and semantically aligned with visual and linguistic context. Experiments on LIBERO, Language Table, and Franka show that unification is not only an architectural convenience, but also a key factor in learning effective VLAW models, leading to consistent empirical gains and deeper insights into multimodal world modeling. Code and model checkpoints will be released upon acceptance.

</details>


### [110] [PhysMirror: Physics-Aware Mirror Object Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03470)
*Xuan-Bach Mai,Duy-Phuc Nguyen,Quoc-Van Le,Tam V. Nguyen,Thanh-Toan Do,Huu Le,Duong-Van Nguyen,Minh-Triet Tran,Trung-Nghia Le*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PhysMirror是一个物理感知的生成框架，通过显式3D空间先验强制实施投影几何，生成具有物理准确镜像反射的图像，解决现有扩散模型在镜像反射生成中的几何约束挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代文本到图像扩散模型在合成物理准确的镜像反射方面存在根本性挑战，这些模型通常难以处理严格的几何约束，导致幻觉现象，从而降低合成数据在具身AI和机器人感知训练中的实用性。

Method: 提出PhysMirror框架：1）自动将提示对象提升为3D网格；2）在模拟环境中构建轻量级、数学精确的镜像场景；3）渲染该显式3D场景以提取精确的2D条件元素（深度图和分割图）；4）将这些条件作为鲁棒的引导信号用于下游扩散模型，指导生成具有物理正确镜像反射的图像。

Result: 在新构建的MirrOB数据集上的实验结果表明，PhysMirror在反射准确性和物理真实感方面优于现有最先进基线，同时保持强大的文本到图像语义对齐，为具身AI数据生成提供了可靠管道。

Conclusion: PhysMirror通过显式3D空间先验和精确的2D条件提取，有效解决了扩散模型在镜像反射生成中的几何约束问题，提供了物理准确的合成数据生成方案，对具身AI和机器人感知训练具有重要意义。

Abstract: Synthesizing physically accurate mirror reflections remains a fundamental challenge for modern text-to-image diffusion models, which are increasingly critical for generating synthetic training data for embodied AI and robotic perception. These models typically struggle with strict geometric constraints, leading to hallucinations that degrade the utility of the synthetic data. To address this, we introduce a novel, end-to-end physics-aware generation framework namely PhysMirror that natively enforces projective geometry through explicit 3D spatial priors. Our method automatically lifts prompted objects into 3D meshes and constructs a lightweight, mathematically exact mirror scene within a simulated environment. By rendering this explicit 3D scene, we extract precise 2D conditioning elements, such as depth maps and segmentation maps, that serve as robust guiding signals for downstream diffusion models, guiding them to generate images with physically correct mirror reflections. Moreover, we introduce Mirror Consistency Score (MCS), reference-free, fully automated metric that quantifies physical correctness using dense feature matching and vanishing point convergence. Experimental results on our newly constructed MirrOB dataset demonstrate that our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in reflection accuracy and physical realism, while maintaining strong text-to-image semantic alignment, providing a reliable pipeline for embodied AI data generation. The source code is released at https://duyphuc0701.github.io/PhysMirror.

</details>


### [111] [Learning to Generate Multiple Objects from Dense and Occluded Layouts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03488)
*Bach-Hoang Ngo,Si-Tri Ngo,Hieu Le,Trung-Nghia Le*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种解决文本到图像扩散模型中对象计数问题的方法，针对密集场景中重叠实例合并的问题，通过布局感知注意力偏置和模态平衡损失来改进模型性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 文本到图像扩散模型在密集场景中生成正确对象数量时存在困难，重叠的实例会合并成难以区分的结构，尽管视觉上看起来合理。这被识别为实例所有权崩溃问题：重叠对象的token通过注意力机制自由交互，而严重遮挡的实例由于可见区域小而受到弱监督。

Method: 提出两种主要方法：1) 布局感知注意力偏置，通过软偏置使token交互朝向区域一致的分组，抑制跨实例泄漏；2) 模态平衡损失，根据遮挡程度放大被遮挡对象的梯度。同时引入了OverlapDepth-45K基准数据集，用于密集重叠场景的评估。

Result: 该方法显著提高了计数准确性，防止了实例合并，同时保持了图像质量。通过新基准数据集OverlapDepth-45K进行系统评估，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 论文成功解决了文本到图像扩散模型中密集场景下的对象计数问题，通过创新的布局感知注意力机制和损失函数设计，为生成模型在复杂场景中的应用提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: Text-to-image diffusion models fail to generate correct object counts in dense scenes, where overlapping instances collapse into indistinguishable structures despite appearing visually plausible. We identify this as instance ownership collapse: tokens from overlapping objects interact freely through attention, while heavily occluded instances receive weak supervision due to their small visible areas. We address this through layout-aware attention biases that softly bias token interactions toward region-consistent grouping and suppress cross-instance leakage, paired with an amodal-balanced loss that amplifies gradients for occluded objects based on their occlusion level. To enable systematic evaluation, we introduce OverlapDepth-45K, a benchmark of densely overlapping scenes with amodal supervision. Our approach substantially improves count accuracy and prevents instance merging while preserving image quality. Project page: https://bachngoh.github.io/AIBL

</details>


### [112] [Towards Standardized Light Field Quality Assessment: Hybrid Subjective Benchmarking and Objective Metric Evaluation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03494)
*Saeed Mahmoudpour,Mylene C. Q. Farias,Gi-Mun Um,Myllena A. Prado,Ismael Seidel,Leonardo de Sousa Marques,Leonardo Andrade,Shengyang Zhao,Carla L Pagliari*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一个标准化的光场质量评估工作流程，结合了基准生成、混合主观评估和客观指标分析，特别关注包含视图合成的编码流程中的失真类型，并公开了主观标注数据集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在标准化背景下，需要可靠且可复现的主观质量评估程序以及能够准确评估不同失真类型的客观质量指标。特别是在光场编码与视图合成、重建技术相结合的处理流程中，需要更全面的评估框架。

Method: 1) 设计了包含传统编码失真和视图合成失真的基准数据集
2) 提出了混合主观评估方法：结合参考锚定质量评分与感知模糊区域的针对性成对细化评估
3) 通过统计一致性分析验证主观评分的可靠性
4) 系统评估了大量客观指标在全局预测准确性、局部一致性以及跨失真类型的鲁棒性

Result: 1) 多个客观指标在纯编码刺激下表现良好，但在包含视图合成失真时性能显著下降
2) 验证了主观评分的统计一致性
3) 分析揭示了视图池化策略在未来光场质量指标设计中的重要性

Conclusion: 该工作提供了一个可复现且适合标准化的细粒度光场质量评估框架，同时识别了当前客观指标在新兴编码流程下的关键局限性。公开的数据集为后续研究提供了基础。

Abstract: Benchmarking immersive media coding solutions, especially in the standardization context, requires reliable and reproducible subjective quality assessment (QA) procedures, along with objective quality metrics that remain accurate across different distortion types. This paper presents a standardized workflow for light field QA, developed and deployed in the context of JPEG Pleno standardization activities, which integrates benchmark generation, a hybrid subjective evaluation, and objective metric analysis into a common workflow. The benchmark is designed to encompass not only traditional coding-only artifacts but also distortions that arise in processing pipelines in which light field encoding is accompanied with view synthesis and reconstruction techniques. A hybrid subjective method is proposed enabling fine-grained assessment by combining reference-anchored quality rating with targeted pairwise refinement in perceptually ambiguous regions. The reliability of subjective scores is verified using statistical consistency analyses between observers of two cohorts. Finally, a large set of objective metrics is systematically evaluated in terms of global prediction accuracy, local agreement in ambiguous quality regions, and robustness across distortion families. The results show that several metrics achieve strong agreement for coding-only stimuli, but their performance consistently drops when view synthesis distortions are included. The analysis further highlights the importance of view-pooling strategy in the design of future light field quality metrics. The work provides a reproducible and standardization-ready framework for fine-grained light field QA, while identifying key limitations of current objective metrics under emerging coding pipelines. The subjectively annotated dataset is publicly available at https://plenodb.jpeg.org/lfqa/objectivecfp.

</details>


### [113] [Flex-Forcing: Towards a Unified Autoregressive and Bidirectional Video Diffusion Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03509)
*Xinyin Ma,Julius Berner,Chao Liu,Arash Vahdat,Weili Nie,Xinchao Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Flex-Forcing 是一个统一的视频生成框架，让视频扩散模型可以在双向和自回归两种生成模式下无缝切换，通过灵活的块划分机制实现高效、高质量的视频生成。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视频生成方法存在局限性：双向扩散模型虽然全局一致性和视觉保真度好，但推理速度慢；自回归模型推理效率高且支持流式生成，但长距离一致性差且存在曝光偏差。需要一种能够结合两者优点的统一框架。

Method: 提出Flex-Forcing框架，核心是跨时间轴和去噪步骤的灵活块划分机制。模型可以：1）根据设备预算进行灵活分块；2）在块间进行双向推理以实现全局结构规划，在块内进行自回归生成以实现细粒度合成；3）支持任意顺序、任意时间步的自回归生成，无需严格因果约束。

Result: 在多个视频生成基准测试中，Flex-Forcing相比使用固定推理策略的强基线方法，在视频质量、长视频稳定性方面表现更优，同时推理速度更快。

Conclusion: Flex-Forcing提供了一个统一的训练和推理框架，让视频扩散模型能够灵活地在双向和自回归生成模式间切换，实现了高质量、高效且稳定的视频生成，克服了现有方法的局限性。

Abstract: Recent progress in large-scale generative models has substantially advanced video generation, yet existing methods remain constrained by a rigid inference paradigm. Bidirectional diffusion models excel at global coherence and visual fidelity but suffer from slow inference, while autoregressive models offer efficient and streaming generation at the cost of long-range consistency and exposure bias. We introduce Flex-Forcing, a unified training and inference framework that enables a video diffusion model to seamlessly operate under both bidirectional and autoregressive generation regimes. The core idea is a flexible chunking mechanism jointly defined over the temporal axis and denoising steps. This design allows the model to (1) perform flexible chunking according to different device budgets, (2) perform bidirectional inference across chunks for global structure planning, while generating frames autoregressively within each chunk for efficient and fine-grained synthesis, and (3) perform any-order, any-timestep autoregressive generation without the strict causal constraint. Extensive experiments on multiple video generation benchmarks demonstrate that Flex-Forcing achieves consistently better video quality, long-video stability than strong baselines with a rigid inference schedule, while offering faster inference.

</details>


### [114] [Perceptual Flow Matching for Few-Step Generative Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03524)
*Chuyang Zhao,Yifei Song,Hongfa Wang,Jianlong Yuan,Yuan Zhang,Siming Fu,Zhineng Chen,Huilin Deng,Haoyang Huang,Nan Duan*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Perceptual Flow Matching (PFM) 通过在感知特征空间而非传统VAE潜在空间中进行流匹配监督，显著提升了流匹配模型的少步生成能力，将采样步数从35-50减少到4-8步，同时保持生成质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前流匹配模型需要大量采样步骤（35-50步）才能获得高质量生成结果，这限制了其实用效率。现有加速方法需要教师模型或辅助评分网络，增加了复杂性。作者希望找到一种简单有效的方法来减少采样步骤，同时保持生成质量。

Method: PFM框架使用预训练的感知模型（如CLIP、DINO）提取的特征空间代替传统VAE潜在空间进行流匹配监督。通过在这种感知特征空间中训练流匹配模型，使其能够更有效地学习数据分布。该方法无需教师模型或辅助网络，只需对标准流匹配训练流程进行最小修改。

Result: 在图像生成、视频生成和图像编辑任务上的广泛实验表明，PFM能够仅用4-8个采样步骤就产生高质量结果，相比传统方法需要35-50步大幅减少。PFM产生的伪影比现有基于蒸馏的方法更少，并且在少步生成中保持更好的模式保持能力。

Conclusion: 感知监督将回归目标从均值寻求转向模式寻求，使预测偏向于流形上的模式，从而在粗糙的少步积分下保持准确性。研究表明，当在适当的表示空间中进行监督时，标准流匹配训练可以自然地产生高质量的少步生成器。这一发现为高效生成建模的表示感知目标设计提供了新方向。

Abstract: We propose Perceptual Flow Matching (PFM), a simple yet effective framework for few-step generation in flow-matching models. Rather than performing velocity regression in the conventional VAE latent space, PFM supervises flow matching in a perceptual feature space using pretrained perceptual models. This simple change substantially improves the few-step generation capability of flow-matching models, reducing the number of sampling steps from 35-50 to 4-8 while preserving generation quality. Unlike existing acceleration and distillation approaches, PFM requires neither teacher models nor auxiliary score networks and can be integrated into standard flow-matching training pipelines with minimal modifications. Extensive experiments on image generation, video generation, and image editing tasks demonstrate that PFM consistently produces high-quality results while producing fewer artifacts than existing distillation-based methods. We further show that perceptual supervision shifts the regression minimizer from mean-seeking to mode-seeking, biasing predictions toward on-manifold modes that remain accurate under coarse few-step integration. Our results reveal that standard flow-matching training can naturally yield high-quality few-step generators when supervised in an appropriate representation space. We hope this insight inspires future research into representation-aware objectives for efficient generative modeling.

</details>


### [115] [Latent Clarity: Bridging World-Model Kinematics to Semantic Manifolds for Video Anomaly Anticipation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03558)
*Abu Anas Ibn Samad*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PULS提出预测性统一潜在空间框架，通过KSD Bridge将物理张量映射到文本对齐超球面，结合ASP预测未来状态，在视频异常检测中实现优于传统MIL方法的性能，并验证了潜在清晰度假设。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前连续视频异常检测主要依赖反应式多实例学习（MIL），将时空特征压缩为标量分数，缺乏对物理动力学的语义理解和未来预测能力。作者希望建立能够理解物理世界并预测未来状态的连续语义世界模型。

Method: 提出PULS框架：1）490M参数的KSD Bridge模块，将V-JEPA 2物理张量映射到2048维Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B文本对齐超球面；2）16.8M参数的ASP模块，预测未来潜在状态。采用Triple-Track Lead-Time协议和L1-surprise门控机制，验证潜在清晰度假设。

Result: KSD Bridge在UCF-Crime上达到0.8994 AUROC，在XD-Violence上达到0.8162 AUROC。ASP在14-way零样本VQA中达到44.5%准确率，比观察基线提升9.6个百分点。Triple-Track协议在T-0.5s时获得+8.9pp预测优势（p<0.001），证明预测与观察占据不同子流形。

Conclusion: PULS通过物理到语义的映射和未来状态预测，显著提升视频异常检测性能。验证了潜在清晰度假设，表明预测性表示比观察表示更具语义可分性。牛顿不变性运动学表示具有良好的分布外泛化能力，为连续视频理解提供了新范式。

Abstract: Continuous video anomaly detection is dominated by reactive Multiple Instance Learning (MIL) that collapses spatiotemporal features into scalar scores. We introduce PULS (Predictive Unified Latent Space), a continuous semantic world-model pipeline comprising two modules: a 490M-parameter KSD Bridge (Kinematic-to-Semantic Distillation) and a 16.8M-parameter Anticipatory State Predictor (ASP). The KSD Bridge maps V-JEPA 2 physical tensors into the 2048-d Qwen3-VL-Embedding-2B text-aligned hypersphere, trained on a subset of UCF-Crime. This translation alone yields a chunk-level AUROC of 0.8994 for UCF-Crime and 0.8162 for out-of-distribution XD-Violence without MIL or hierarchical fusion.
  We introduce and validate the Latent Clarity Hypothesis: because JEPA's temporal predictor discards aleatoric pixel noise while preserving kinematics, anticipated future representations are more semantically separable than observed presents. The ASP sharpens these anticipated future latents, achieving 44.5% mean 14-way zero-shot VQA accuracy (exceeding observation baseline by +9.6 pp). Applying the ASP to Observation Tensors collapses accuracy to 7.3% (random chance), proving Anticipation and Observation occupy distinct sub-manifolds. A Triple-Track Lead-Time protocol with an L1-surprise gate yields a peak +8.9 pp anticipatory advantage at T-0.5s (p < 0.001, N = 1,000 permutation), separating physical anticipation from static scene priors. Zero-shot transfer to XD-Violence confirms that Newtonian-invariant kinematic representations generalize out-of-distribution.

</details>


### [116] [XPlainVerse: A Million-Scale Benchmark for Explainable Deepfake Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03562)
*Abhijeet Narang,Kartik Kuckreja,Shreya Ghosh,Muhammad Haris Khan,Jianfei Cai,Abhinav Dhall*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: XPlainVerse是一个大规模基准测试，用于联合深度伪造检测和人类中心解释，包含100万张真实和篡改图像，并提供技术解释和简化解释两种风格，通过新指标评估解释质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前深度伪造检测模型生成的解释往往缺乏视觉依据，现有基准主要评估分类准确性而忽略了解释是否反映实际篡改，这限制了可靠性和用户信任。

Method: 构建XPlainVerse基准，包含100万张图像（来自5个来源的真实图像和12个现成编辑/合成模型生成的伪造图像）；提出多阶段过滤管道Edit-Check验证篡改是否满足预期编辑；提供技术解释和简化解释两种风格；提出EntityScore和EvidenceScore新指标评估解释质量。

Result: XPlainVerse建立了大规模基准，包含验证过的图像对和两种解释风格；提出的新指标能够评估解释的推理保真度；2000个解释对的人工标注验证了数据集质量。

Conclusion: XPlainVerse将建立基于视觉依据的解释质量作为深度伪造检测的可衡量维度，支持可信赖、可解释模型的可扩展研究。

Abstract: As deepfake detection models increasingly produce natural language explanations, their reasoning often remains weakly grounded in visual artifacts, limiting reliability and user trust. Existing benchmarks mainly evaluate classification accuracy, overlooking whether explanations reflect the actual manipulations. This gap hinders progress toward deployable, explainable deepfake detection systems. To this end, we introduce XPlainVerse, a large-scale benchmark designed for joint deepfake detection and human-centered explanation. XPlainVerse comprises one million real and manipulated images, pairing authentic images from five established sources with forgeries generated by twelve off-the-shelf image editing and synthesis models. We further propose a multi-stage filtering pipeline, Edit-Check, to verify if manipulations satisfy their intended edits, enabling reliable reasoning supervision at scale. Beyond dataset scale, XPlainVerse provides two complementary explanation styles: technical explanations for expert analysis and simplified explanations optimized for non-technical users. To evaluate explanation quality beyond surface similarity, we propose novel metrics, EntityScore and EvidenceScore, that measure reasoning fidelity by checking whether explanations correctly identify manipulated entities and visual evidence. Human annotations on 2,000 explanation pairs validate our dataset quality against human judgment. We believe XPlainVerse will establish grounded explanation quality as a measurable dimension of deepfake detection and support scalable research on trustworthy, interpretable models.

</details>


### [117] [EPRA U-Net: An Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention Framework for Accurate Infarct Segmentation in Diffusion-Weighted MRI](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03568)
*Hasan Ulutas,Muhammet Emin Sahin,Mustafa Fatih Erkoc,Esra Yuce,Turker Tuncer,Sengul Dogan,Serkan Kiranyaz*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: EPRA U-Net：一种用于DWI图像中急性缺血性梗死分割的高效金字塔残差注意力网络，在准确性和效率方面均优于现有先进模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 准确识别扩散加权磁共振成像（DWI）中的急性缺血性梗死对于可靠的病灶量化和脑血管事件管理的有效临床决策支持至关重要。现有方法在准确性和效率方面仍有改进空间。

Method: 提出EPRA U-Net（高效金字塔残差注意力U-Net）架构，采用EfficientNet编码器进行分层特征提取，集成残差循环（R2）块和空洞空间金字塔池化（ASPP）增强空间依赖建模，引入双重注意力机制突出病灶相关激活并抑制背景响应，使用Tversky损失函数优先考虑检测灵敏度。

Result: 在包含167名患者、4895个DWI切片的内部数据集上评估，EPRA U-Net在像素聚合Dice（0.8984）、每样本Dice（0.9469）、IoU（0.8155）、召回率（0.8887）、病灶F1（0.9378）和HD95（11.62像素）等指标上均优于UNet++、DeepLabV3+和TransUNet。漏检率分别降低16%、25%和29%。

Conclusion: EPRA U-Net在DWI图像梗死分割任务中表现出卓越性能，能够更准确地识别病灶，为临床决策提供可靠支持，具有重要的临床应用价值。

Abstract: Objective: Accurate identification of acute ischemic infarcts on diffusion-weighted magnetic resonance imaging (DWI) is a critical prerequisite for reliable lesion quantification and effective clinical decision support in the management of cerebrovascular events. Methods: This study presents EPRA U-Net (Efficient Pyramid Residual Attention U-Net), a task-specific integrated architecture for efficient and accurate infarct segmentation of DWI images. In the proposed architecture, an EfficientNet-based encoder was used as a hierarchical feature extractor with a minimized parameterization. In addition, a Residual-Recurrent (R2) block (recurrent unrolling step t = 2, following the original formulation) and Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling (ASPP) were integrated to enhance the performance of spatial dependency modeling. Additionally, a dual attention mechanism was incorporated to highlight lesion-related activations while concurrently enabling the suppression of extraneous background responses. To prioritize lesion detection consistent with clinical imperative, a Tversky loss function was adopted, emphasizing the sensitivity of detection over its specificity during the optimization process. Results: Experimental evaluations were conducted utilizing an in-house dataset comprising 167 patients with 4,895 DWI slices; subsequently, the performance of the proposed EPRA U-Net was assessed in comparison with state-of-the-art models, specifically UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet. The experimental results suggest that EPRA U-Net attained superior performance, evidenced by a pixel-aggregated Dice of 0.8984, a per-sample Dice of 0.9469, an IoU of 0.8155, a Recall of 0.8887, a Lesion F1 of 0.9378, and an HD95 of 11.62 px. Furthermore, a clear reduction in the rate of missed lesions, specifically by 16%, 25%, and 29%, was observed when compared with UNet++, DeepLabV3+, and TransUNet, respectively.

</details>


### [118] [PLGSA-Transformer: Periocular Landmark-Guided Attention with Occlusion-Adaptive Cosine Thresholding for Cross-Modal Masked and Unmasked Face Recognition](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03581)
*Dana A Abdullah*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PLGSA-Transformer：一种跨模态人脸匹配框架，通过眼周地标引导的空间注意力、混合CNN-Transformer分支和遮挡自适应余弦阈值，在佩戴口罩等遮挡情况下实现高精度人脸识别。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 口罩的广泛使用（尤其是COVID-19期间和安全敏感场景）暴露了传统人脸识别系统的局限性，现有方法在面部区域被遮挡时泛化能力差，实验室性能与实际部署存在差距。

Method: 1) 眼周地标引导的空间注意力（PLGSA）：使用MediaPipe地标计算眼、眉和前额区域的Gaussian热图，通过可学习残差门与EfficientNetB3特征融合，引导注意力到可区分的可见区域。2) 混合CNN-Transformer分支：将特征图重塑为token，通过两层多头自注意力编码器处理，实现跨区域依赖建模。3) 遮挡自适应余弦阈值（OACT）：联合训练头部，根据预测的遮挡严重程度按比例提高匹配阈值。模型使用包含验证、身份分类和遮挡交叉熵的统一损失进行训练。

Result: 在858张图像（Zenodo MDMFR 60%、Kaggle CelebA-HQ masked collection 25%、作者收集图像15%）上评估，PLGSA-Transformer达到97.22%的配对验证准确率和ROC AUC 1.0000，优于VGG-16 based MUFM（95.0%）、HOG分类器（85.0%）和基于特征的结构度量（86.61%）。

Conclusion: 将眼周几何编码到注意力机制中，结合Transformer建模和遮挡自适应阈值，为跨模态口罩人脸识别提供了鲁棒且可扩展的解决方案。

Abstract: The widespread adoption of facial masks, accelerated by COVID-19 and mandated in security-sensitive settings, has exposed limitations of conventional face recognition systems. Existing approaches relying on fixed cosine thresholds, non-adaptive CNNs, and purely data-driven features fail to generalize when facial regions are occluded, creating a gap between lab performance and real-world deployability. This paper proposes PLGSA-Transformer, a cross-modal face matching framework with three contributions. First, Periocular Landmark-Guided Spatial Attention (PLGSA) uses MediaPipe landmarks to compute Gaussian heatmaps over the eye, brow, and forehead regions, fusing them with EfficientNetB3 features via a learnable residual gate to direct attention toward discriminative visible regions. Second, a Hybrid CNN-Transformer Branch reshapes feature maps into tokens processed by a two-layer Multi-Head Self-Attention encoder, enabling cross-regional dependency modelling. Third, the Occlusion-Adaptive Cosine Threshold (OACT) is a jointly trained head that raises the matching threshold in proportion to predicted occlusion severity. The model is evaluated on 858 images from Zenodo MDMFR (60%), Kaggle CelebA-HQ masked collection (25%), and author-collected images (15%), spanning both genders, ages 21-75, with varied mask types, trained via a unified loss combining contrastive verification, identity classification, and occlusion cross-entropy. PLGSA-Transformer achieves 97.22% pair verification accuracy with ROC AUC 1.0000, surpassing VGG-16-based MUFM (Abdullah et al., 2025; 95.0%), HOG classifiers (Adnan et al., 2020; 85.0%), and Feature-based Structural Measure (Shnain et al., 2017; 86.61%). These results confirm that encoding periocular geometry into attention, with Transformer modelling and occlusion-adaptive thresholds, yields a robust, scalable solution for cross-modal masked face recognition.

</details>


### [119] [Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba: Eliminating Directional Scanning in Vision SSMs with Second-Order Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03589)
*Anvitha Ramachandran,Dhruv Parikh,Haoyang Fan,Rajgopal Kannan,Viktor Prasanna*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: VNCT是一种二阶非因果视觉状态空间模型，通过梯形结构实现单次图像标记全交互，消除方向性扫描偏差，提升方向鲁棒性和边界精度


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉SSM继承了因果序列建模中的方向性标记扫描，这会引入空间偏差和方向敏感的表征。作者希望消除这种方向性限制，构建更鲁棒的视觉模型

Method: 提出Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba (VNCT)，采用二阶非因果状态空间模型，通过梯形结构使所有图像标记在单次推理中相互交互，消除方向性扫描

Result: 在ImageNet-1K分类、COCO目标检测和实例分割、ADE20K语义分割等任务上，VNCT均超越方向性扫描视觉SSM和一阶非因果SSM。在图像旋转和翻转下性能下降更小，边界IoU提升达3.7点

Conclusion: 方向性扫描对于高性能视觉SSM并非必需，二阶非因果状态空间建模为视觉识别提供了简单、高效且鲁棒的替代方案

Abstract: State Space Models (SSMs) have emerged as an alternative to Vision Transformers, yet most vision SSMs inherit directional token scanning from causal sequence modeling. While effective for sequential data, directional scanning introduces spatial bias and orientation-sensitive representations. We present Vision Non-Causal Trapezoidal Mamba (VNCT), a second-order non-causal vision SSM that enables all image tokens to interact in a single pass, eliminating direSctional scanning and achieving low single-image inference latency. VNCT exhibits more orientation-robust representations, showing reduced performance degradation under image rotations and flips, while improving Boundary IoU by up to 3.7 points, leading to more accurate boundary preservation and object localization. Across ImageNet-1K classification, COCO object detection and instance segmentation, and ADE20K semantic segmentation, VNCT consistently outperforms both directional-scanning vision SSMs and first-order non-causal SSMs. These results show that directional scanning is unnecessary for high-performance vision SSMs and that second-order non-causal state-space modeling offers a simple, efficient, and robust alternative for visual recognition.

</details>


### [120] [Responsibility Distribution Estimation in Ego-View Accident Videos with Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03591)
*Ryosei Tamura,Andrew Shin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于驾驶员视角视频的交通事故责任分配估计任务，通过多模态大语言模型分析事故视频来预测各参与方的责任比例，建立了该任务的初步基准。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有交通事故理解研究主要依赖基础设施摄像头、卫星图像或结构化事故记录，但这些数据源部署维护成本高，且无法客观反映驾驶员事故前的实际观察情况。驾驶员视角事故视频能直接代表驾驶员的视觉视角，更适合用于分析事故可避免性和驾驶员责任。

Method: 构建了LLM辅助的责任标注流程，并在多种输入设置下微调多模态大语言模型，包括原始帧、分割增强输入和文本描述，以预测各参与方的责任分配比例。

Result: 实验结果表明，多模态大语言模型能够有效执行这种基于约束的细致推理任务，为该新任务建立了强有力的初始基准。

Conclusion: 驾驶员视角事故视频为超越传统事故分类和解释任务的社会和法律意义的多模态推理提供了有前景的基础。

Abstract: Recent studies on multimodal traffic accident understanding have mainly relied on infrastructure-camera footage, satellite imagery, or structured crash records. However, such data sources are costly to deploy and maintain at large scale, and they cannot objectively capture what the driver was actually able to observe before the accident. In contrast, ego-view accident videos directly represent the driver's visual perspective, making them suitable for reasoning about avoidability and driver responsibility. In this paper, we introduce responsibility distribution estimation for ego-view traffic accident videos, a new task in which a model predicts the percentage of responsibility assigned to each involved agent. We construct an LLM-assisted responsibility annotation pipeline and fine-tune multimodal large language models under multiple input settings, including raw frames, segmentation-enhanced input, and textual descriptions. Experimental results establish a strong initial benchmark, demonstrating that multimodal LLMs can effectively perform this nuanced, constraint-based reasoning task. Our findings suggest that ego-centric accident videos provide a promising foundation for socially and legally meaningful multimodal reasoning beyond conventional accident classification and explanation tasks.

</details>


### [121] [A Step Towards Robust Unsupervised Domain Adaptation via Fine-Tuning and Reinforcement Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03600)
*Sushant Dagaji Desale,Rahul Mishra,Ashutosh Kumar Sinha*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出SFT+RL两阶段鲁棒无监督域自适应框架，结合监督微调和强化学习，在对抗攻击下提升跨域准确性和鲁棒性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有UDA方法在对抗攻击下难以平衡准确性和鲁棒性，伪标签容易引入分类错误，需要解决噪声伪标签和域分布偏移问题。

Method: 两阶段框架：SFT阶段使用PGD对抗训练在源域微调线性分类器；RL阶段采用置信度引导的渐进伪标签策略，结合干净源样本和高置信度目标样本进行对抗训练。

Result: 在OfficeHome、PACS、VisDA三个数据集上，平均清洁准确率提升10.2%，对抗鲁棒性提升15.8%，超越现有SOTA方法。

Conclusion: SFT+RL框架有效解决了UDA中的对抗鲁棒性问题，通过两阶段策略实现了准确性和鲁棒性的最佳平衡。

Abstract: Adversarial robustness in Unsupervised Domain Adaptation (UDA) remains a significant challenge due to noisy pseudo labels and inherent distributional shifts between the clean source and adversarially perturbed target domains. Existing approaches often fail to achieve an optimal trade-off between robustness and accuracy, as pseudo-labels generated by domain-adapted models tend to introduce classification errors under adversarial attacks. In this work, we propose \textbf{SFT+RL}, a two-stage robust UDA framework that integrates Supervised Fine Tuning (SFT) and Reinforcement Learning (RL) on top of CLIP's pre-trained visual encoder. In the SFT stage, we adversarially fine-tune a linear classifier using PGD-based perturbations over the labelled source domain while partially unfreezing CLIP's projection layer. It allows adaptation to adversarial noise while preserving CLIP's rich semantic priors. We introduce a confidence-guided pseudo-labeling strategy in the RL stage to annotate unlabeled target samples progressively. Pseudo labels are filtered using a decaying confidence threshold to balance quality and coverage, and the model is trained on a composite dataset formed by combining clean source samples with high-confidence target samples. Adversarial training is applied to mixed batches of clean and adversarial examples to enhance cross-domain robustness. Comprehensive evaluations on three benchmark datasets OfficeHome~\cite{tomm-ude}, PACS~\cite{pacs}, and VisDA~\cite{visda} demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach. Notably, \textbf{SFT+RL} achieves average improvements of \textbf{10.2\%} in clean accuracy and \textbf{15.8\%} in adversarial robustness across all three datasets, outperforming existing state-of-the-art methods.

</details>


### [122] [SAF3R: Dynamic Sparse Attention for Feed-Forward 3D Reconstruction Transformers](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03612)
*Jianing Deng,Yuanzhe Li,Jialu Wang,Song Wang,Tianlong Chen,Huanrui Yang,Jingtong Hu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: SAF3R是一个针对前馈3D重建（F3R）变换器的训练免费动态稀疏注意力框架，通过分析注意力模式的异质性、动态性和稀疏性，实现了高效稀疏注意力机制，在保持重建质量的同时显著加速推理。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: F3R变换器在处理长图像序列时面临二次复杂度的全局注意力计算瓶颈。现有压缩或稀疏注意力方法未能充分利用注意力模式固有的稀疏性和动态特性，需要更高效的解决方案。

Method: 通过分析多个F3R变换器的全局注意力模式，发现注意力在不同层和注意力头上具有高度异质性、动态性和极端稀疏性。基于此提出SAF3R框架，集成定制化稀疏注意力机制，结合离线头部分析和高效的在线适应策略，以匹配输入依赖的注意力行为。

Result: SAF3R在F3R变换器上实现了高稀疏比，同时保持了相机姿态估计和3D重建质量，与现有方法相比带来了显著的全流程加速效果。

Conclusion: SAF3R通过动态稀疏注意力机制有效解决了F3R变换器在长序列处理中的计算瓶颈问题，在保持重建质量的前提下实现了显著的性能提升，为高效3D重建提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: Feed-forward 3D reconstruction (F3R) transformers have recently achieved remarkable success. However, scaling them to long image sequences remains challenging, as the quadratic complexity of cross-view global attention quickly becomes the dominant computational bottleneck. While recent efforts attempt to improve efficiency through compressed or sparse attention, they fail to fully exploit the inherent sparsity and dynamic behavior of global attention. In this work, we present a comprehensive analysis of global attention across multiple F3R transformers and reveal that attention patterns are highly heterogeneous, dynamic, and extremely sparse across layers and attention heads. Motivated by these findings, we propose SAF3R, a training-free dynamic sparse attention framework tailored to F3R transformers. SAF3R integrates tailored sparse attention mechanisms with offline head profiling and an efficient online adaptation strategy to match input-dependent attention behaviors. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SAF3R achieves high sparsity ratios while preserving camera pose estimation and 3D reconstruction quality, translating into substantial end-to-end speedup on F3R transformers compared to existing methods. Code is available at https://github.com/jndeng/SAF3R

</details>


### [123] [From Geometric Labels to Semantic Understanding of Indoor Building Components Using Multimodal Large Language Models](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03661)
*Shuju Jing,Chao Yin*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: Building-MLLM：一个基于点云的多模态大语言模型，专门用于室内建筑组件的语义理解和自然语言交互，通过领域特定机制解决语义集中问题，在识别、描述和工程问答任务上表现优异。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法只能输出离散标签，无法解释组件功能或支持自然语言交互，这限制了点云在设施运维中的应用。需要一种能够理解室内组件语义并支持自然语言交互的模型。

Method: 提出Building-MLLM模型，包含四个领域特定机制：点信息增强器（提取任务相关语义）、几何保持正则化（防止几何信息侵蚀）、固定文本前缀（稳定领域知识）和多维LoRA（平衡识别与推理）。开发多约束渐进指令生成引擎，构建包含4198个对象、37,782对指令-响应的合成数据集。

Result: 在三个任务类型上分别达到88.00%、65.10%和68.14%的准确率，展示了优异的室内组件语言理解能力，并在其他真实数据集上表现出初步的泛化能力。

Conclusion: Building-MLLM成功解决了点云理解中的语义集中问题，为室内建筑组件的语义理解和自然语言交互提供了有效解决方案，在设施运维中具有应用潜力。

Abstract: Point cloud-based understanding has become an important enabler for facility operation and maintenance involving indoor building components. However, existing methods output only discrete labels without explaining component functions or natural language interactions. This paper proposes Building-MLLM, a point cloud-centered multimodal large language model (MLLM) for indoor components, which models point clouds and instructions to generate responses across Simple Recognition, Complex Captioning, and Multi-Engineering Question Answering tasks. Building-MLLM addresses semantic concentration through four domain-specific mechanisms: Point Information Enhancer for task-relevant semantics, Geometry-Preserving Regularization preventing geometric erosion, fixed textual prefix for domain stabilization, and multi-dimensional LoRA balancing recognition with reasoning. A multi-constraint progressive instruction-generation engine is developed to compile a synthetic point cloud-text dataset with 4198 objects, 37,782 instruction-following pairs, and 47 categories. Experiments show that Building-MLLM achieves 88.00%, 65.10%, and 68.14% on the three task types, respectively, demonstrating superior indoor component language understanding and providing initial generalizability in transfer inference on other real-world datasets.

</details>


### [124] [IPDiff: Diffusion-driven ORSI Salient Object Detection with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03696)
*Gongyang Li,Zhen Bai,Runmin Cong,Dan Zeng,Weisi Lin,Xiao-Ping Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: IPDiff是一个基于扩散模型的动态优化方法，用于光学遥感图像中的显著目标检测，通过信息重建和多先验指导迭代优化显著图。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有ORSI-SOD方法主要采用静态推理策略，使用固定的训练模型参数进行显著性推断，即使生成的显著图有错误也无法进一步优化。因此需要一种能够动态优化显著图的方法。

Method: 提出IPDiff方法，将ORSI-SOD建模为条件扩散问题。首先通过先验网络提取显著性先验和层次先验，然后基于这些先验在去噪网络中迭代去噪随机噪声，动态生成显著图。同时使用混合损失函数在空间和光谱域进行监督。

Result: 在ORSSD、EORSSD和ORSI-4199三个公开数据集上的综合实验表明，IPDiff相比46种最先进方法取得了最佳性能。

Conclusion: IPDiff通过动态优化策略和扩散模型框架，有效解决了传统ORSI-SOD方法的局限性，在遥感图像显著目标检测任务中表现出优越性能。

Abstract: Existing Salient Object Detection in Optical Remote Sensing Image (ORSI-SOD) methods mainly adopt the static inference strategy, which uses fixed trained model parameters for saliency inference in the testing phase. This means that even if the generated saliency map has errors, it cannot be further optimized. In this paper, we propose the novel IPDiff, a Diffusion-driven ORSI-SOD method with Information Reconstruction and Multi-Prior Guidance. We build IPDiff based on a unique dynamic optimization strategy, which endows IPDiff with the ability to iteratively optimize saliency maps with a dynamic parameter. Specifically, we formulate ORSI-SOD as a conditional diffusion problem in IPDiff. IPDiff first extracts informative conditional priors from ORSIs, including the saliency prior and the hierarchical priors, in the prior network with the assistance of the information reconstruction-driven attention module. The saliency prior can provide positional information of salient objects, while the hierarchical priors can provide specific detail and semantic information of salient objects. Under the guidance of these priors, IPDiff then iteratively denoises random noise as the timestep dynamically changes in the denoising network, generating saliency maps that are close to ground truths. Notably, we simultaneously supervise IPDiff in both spatial and spectral domains through a hybrid loss function to achieve efficient network training. Comprehensive experiments on public ORSSD, EORSSD, and ORSI-4199 datasets demonstrate that our proposed IPDiff achieves the best performance compared to 46 state-of-the-art methods. The code and results of our method are available at https://github.com/MathLee/IPDiff.

</details>


### [125] [Leveraging Pathology Co-occurrence for Test-Time Adaptation in Chest X-Ray Diagnosis](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03715)
*Woojin Jeong,Yujin Choi,Dongbin Kim,Soyeon Park,Jaewook Lee*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: CoWA利用疾病共现模式作为可靠性信号，通过降权偏离预期模式的样本来改进多标签医学图像的测试时适应。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 医学影像模型在新临床站点部署时性能下降，现有TTA方法为单标签分类设计，未考虑多标签医学影像中病理的共现模式依赖性。

Method: 提出共现加权适应(CoWA)，从模型预测估计标签共现结构，降权偏离预期模式的样本，使适应更依赖一致预测。

Result: 在胸部X光基准测试中，CoWA在领域偏移下相比现有基线实现了一致性改进。

Conclusion: 利用疾病共现模式作为可靠性信号能有效提升多标签医学影像的测试时适应性能。

Abstract: Medical imaging models often degrade when deployed at new clinical sites due to differences in imaging equipment, protocols, and patient populations. Test-time adaptation (TTA) addresses this by updating a pretrained model using only unlabeled target data, without access to source data. However, existing TTA methods were designed for single-label classification on natural image benchmarks, minimizing entropy uniformly across all samples without considering label dependencies. This overlooks a key property of multi-label medical imaging: pathologies do not occur independently but exhibit structured co-occurrence patterns. In this work, we propose Co-occurrence Weighted Adaptation (CoWA), which leverages disease co-occurrence patterns as a reliability signal for adaptation. CoWA estimates label co-occurrence structure from model predictions and downweights samples that deviate from expected patterns, enabling adaptation to rely more on consistent predictions while reducing the impact of noisy ones. We evaluate CoWA on chest X-ray benchmarks under domain shifts and demonstrate consistent improvements over established baselines.

</details>


### [126] [ProxyUp: Training-Free Proxy-Conditioned Video Generation for Controllable Dynamics](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03732)
*Zanwei Zhou,Jiazhong Cen,Jiemin Fang,Yumeng He,Chen Yang,Sikuang Li,Fanpeng Meng,Zhikuan Bao,Wei Shen,Qi Tian*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ProxyUp：无需训练的视频生成框架，通过物理模拟或真实世界录制的代理视频控制前景物体运动，结合文本提示生成具有精确动态和交互的新视频。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现代视频生成模型难以通过文本提示精确控制复杂动态，特别是物理上合理的细粒度运动和交互。现有方法缺乏对物理动态的精确控制能力。

Method: 提出ProxyUp框架：1）将代理视频反演为潜在表示；2）区域潜在加噪，保留运动关键区域，对文本驱动再生区域注入噪声；3）随机流松弛（SFR）逐步将复合潜在向模型学习分布松弛，缓解分布不匹配和前景-背景耦合问题。

Result: 在模拟和真实世界代理视频上，ProxyUp在动态保真度和文本对齐方面优于现有视频编辑和运动迁移基线方法。

Conclusion: ProxyUp通过代理条件视频生成，实现了对复杂动态的精确控制，为视频生成提供了物理上合理的动态控制方法，无需配对数据训练。

Abstract: Precise control over complex dynamics remains challenging for modern video generative models, as text prompts alone often cannot specify physically plausible, fine-grained motion and interactions. We introduce $\textit{proxy-conditioned video generation}$, where a coarse proxy video from physics-based simulation or real-world recording serves as a dynamics carrier to control foreground object motion. Given a proxy video and a text prompt, the goal is to synthesize a new video that preserves the proxy dynamics while generating novel content and plausible interactions aligned with the prompt. Since paired proxy-target videos are difficult to obtain, we propose $\textbf{ProxyUp}$, a training-free framework built on pretrained video generative models. ProxyUp first inverts the proxy video into an intermediate latent representation and applies $\textbf{region-wise latent noising}$, preserving motion-critical proxy latents while injecting noise into regions intended for text-driven regeneration. To mitigate the distribution mismatch and weak foreground-background coupling introduced by this heuristic latent composition, we further propose $\textbf{Stochastic Flow Relaxation (SFR)}$, which progressively relaxes the composed latent toward the model's learned distribution before ODE sampling. Experiments on both simulation and real-world proxies show that ProxyUp outperforms strong video editing and motion transfer baselines in dynamic fidelity and text alignment.

</details>


### [127] [Attending to Multimodal Generation One Token at a Time](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03738)
*Varun Gupta,Vineet Gandhi,Makarand Tapaswi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出OTaT方法，通过逐token分析注意力动态，研究多模态大语言模型在生成过程中的跨模态计算机制，发现了注意力模式与语义角色相关的规律，并基于此提出了提升多模态任务性能的测试时干预方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有可解释性研究主要关注模型各层和电路（where），而对多模态计算在生成过程中的token级动态（when）探索不足。本文旨在填补这一空白，研究多模态大语言模型在自回归生成过程中，注意力如何根据语义角色在不同模态间转移。

Method: 提出OTaT（逐token）分析方法，追踪模型对图像、文本、指令和已生成token的注意力变化。设计需要显式在视觉和文本上下文间切换的多模态任务。在两个主流模型家族和四个不同规模的开放权重MLLM上进行实验，通过因果注意力阻断干预验证注意力趋势的功能性作用。

Result: 发现一致的注意力模式：需要图像信息时对图像的注意力达到峰值；任务转换时指令token被重新访问；随着生成进行，对已生成token的注意力增加。注意力阻断干预导致模型回退到语言先验，或出现跨模态泄漏、否认或恢复现象。

Conclusion: 基于对注意力动态的新分析，提出简单的测试时干预方法，在适当时机增强对相关模态的注意力，能显著提升多模态任务性能。这为理解和改进多模态模型的生成机制提供了新视角。

Abstract: Multimodal large language models (MLLMs) generate responses autoregressively, integrating visual and linguistic information in an evolving context. Prior work on interpretability has focused on individual layers and circuits (where), leaving the token-level dynamics of multimodal computation during generation (when) underexplored. We address this gap and study attention shifts as per semantic role; tracking model attention to image, text, instruction, and previously generated tokens, One Token at a Time (OTaT). We introduce multimodal tasks that require explicit switching between visual and textual context within a single response. Across two mainstream model families and four open-weight MLLMs of varying sizes, we establish consistent patterns: attention to image peaks at tokens requiring image-derived information, instruction tokens are revisited during task transitions, and attention to previously generated tokens increases as the generation progresses. Causal attention blocking interventions validate the functional role of these trends. We profile model behavior under disrupted attention and observe responses falling back to language priors, or exhibiting cross-modal leakage, denial, or recovery. Finally, informed of the attention dynamics through our novel analysis, we propose a simple test-time intervention to boost attention to the relevant modality at the right time, significantly improving multimodal task performance.

</details>


### [128] [EmCom-Diffusion: Probing Visual Reflection in Emergent Languages via Image Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03752)
*Haruumi Omoto,Tadahiro Taniguchi*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出EmCom-Diffusion框架，直接通过图像重建评估涌现语言的视觉反映能力，优于现有间接指标。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有方法只能间接评估涌现语言对视觉内容的编码程度，存在遗漏或误判的问题，需要直接测量视觉反映能力。

Method: 使用预训练文本到图像扩散模型，在（图像，涌现消息）对上微调，通过重建图像与原图的感知相似度评分。

Result: 在MS-COCO数据集上验证，EmCom-Diffusion能捕捉其他指标遗漏的视觉内容，优于随机和固定标记基线。

Conclusion: EmCom-Diffusion提供了一种直接、生成式的视觉反映评估方法，能更准确地衡量涌现语言对视觉信息的编码程度。

Abstract: Measuring the extent to which emergent languages encode the visual content of their inputs is an open problem. We refer to this property as visual reflection: the extent to which emergent messages preserve information about their source images that can be recovered without appeal to the speaker-listener pair that produced them. Existing metrics measure it only indirectly, through proxies such as human-defined concept inventories, natural-language captions, structural distance correlations, or Referential Game accuracy, each of which can either miss visual content the message encodes or credit content it does not. We propose EmCom-Diffusion, an evaluation framework that measures visual reflection directly: it reconstructs each input image from its emergent message and compares the reconstruction with the original image itself, rather than with human-defined targets. Concretely, it finetunes a pretrained text-to-image diffusion model on (image, emergent-message) pairs and scores visual reflection as the perceptual similarity between the reconstructed and original images, operating generatively rather than discriminatively. Instantiating it on MS-COCO with a Referential Game, we validate the metric against random and fixed-token baselines under three pretrained visual encoders, and compare it against four existing metrics (CBM, supervised translation, TopSim, and R@1). EmCom-Diffusion captures visual content the other metrics miss.

</details>


### [129] [Exploring SAM Supervision for Fine-Grained UAV Target Segmentation under Data Scarcity](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03754)
*Le-Anh Tran*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出一种基于SAM3的两阶段伪标签生成框架，用于训练轻量级无人机目标分割网络IPS-Seg，解决了小目标、背景杂乱和标注数据稀缺的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 无人机目标分割面临小目标尺寸、外观变化、杂乱背景和密集标注数据稀缺等挑战，这些问题限制了轻量分割模型在实际无人机应用中的性能与部署。

Method: 提出两阶段SAM3引导的伪标签生成框架：第一阶段用SAM3生成粗略掩码进行目标定位；第二阶段将定位区域裁剪为图像块，再次使用SAM3生成精细掩码以获取准确边界并消除误报。使用生成的伪标签训练轻量网络IPS-Seg，该网络包含IdentityFormer骨干、Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling模块和PixelShuffle解码器。

Result: IPS-Seg在多种监督设置下均表现出色，实现了分割精度与计算效率的良好平衡，并始终受益于所提出的伪标签生成策略。

Conclusion: 研究表明大规模基础模型（如SAM3）可作为训练紧凑型任务特定分割网络的有效标注来源，特别是在低标签视觉领域具有重要应用潜力。

Abstract: Unmanned aerial vehicle (UAV) target segmentation remains challenging due to the small size of objects, appearance variations, cluttered backgrounds, and the scarcity of densely annotated data. These factors hinder the performance and practical deployment of lightweight segmentation models in real-world UAV applications. To address this problem, this paper investigates the use of SAM3 (Segment Anything Model 3) as a pseudo-label generator for training compact segmentation networks. Specifically, two supervision paradigms are explored: (i) direct pseudo-supervision using unaltered SAM3-generated masks, and (ii) a refinement strategy that re-applies SAM3 to localized image patches for improved mask quality. Based on these paradigms, a two-stage SAM3-guided pseudo-label generation framework is proposed. In the first stage, SAM3 generates coarse masks for initial object localization. The localized regions are subsequently cropped into patches and processed by SAM3 again to generate fine masks with accurate object boundaries and discard false positives. The resulting coarse and fine masks are then used as pseudo-labels to optimize a lightweight network, termed IPS-Seg, which consists of three components: an IdentityFormer backbone for feature extraction, an Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling module for multi-scale context aggregation, and a PixelShuffle-based decoder for spatial resolution recovery. Extensive experiments under multiple supervision settings demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed framework. The results show that IPS-Seg achieves a favorable trade-off between segmentation accuracy and computational efficiency while benefiting consistently from the proposed pseudo-label generation strategy. These findings highlight the potential of large-scale foundation models as annotation sources for training compact task-specific segmentation networks in low-label vision domains.

</details>


### [130] [GeoSAM-Lite: A Lightweight Foundation Model for Onboard Remote Sensing Segmentation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03760)
*Yongcong Wang,Jie Zhang,Rui Jiang,Xubing Yang,Ting Yun,Li Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: GeoSAM-Lite 是一个轻量化的提示无关分割框架，专为星载遥感图像高效分割设计，通过地理空间域初始化和特征融合层创新，在保持竞争力的精度下将参数减少92.8%。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决大型基础模型（如SAM）在资源受限的地球观测平台上部署时面临的高计算成本和自然图像与遥感图像之间的域偏移问题。

Method: 提出GeoSAM-Lite框架，包含两个核心创新：1) 地理空间域初始化(Geo-Init)：从专业教师模型中蒸馏地理空间先验知识以弥合域差距；2) 特征融合层(FFL)：重新校准空间特征并恢复高频边界信息，克服轻量级骨干网络的能力瓶颈。

Result: 在代表性数据集上的实验（重点关注云场景以评估极端尺度变化和复杂边界下的性能）表明，GeoSAM-Lite在保持竞争力精度的同时，相比重量级RSAM-Seg减少了92.8%的参数。

Conclusion: 通过在效率和保真度之间建立优越的帕累托前沿，GeoSAM-Lite为边缘设备上的实时分割提供了实用解决方案。

Abstract: The deployment of large-scale foundation models like Segment Anything Model (SAM) on resource-constrained Earth observation platforms is hindered by prohibitive computational costs and the domain shift between natural and remote sensing imagery. To address these challenges, we propose \textit{Geo}spatial \textit{S}egment \textit{A}nything \textit{M}odel-Lite (GeoSAM-Lite), a lightweight, prompt-free segmentation framework designed for efficient onboard remote sensing segmentation. GeoSAM-Lite incorporates two core innovations: (1) Geospatial-Domain Initialization (Geo-Init), a domain-aware pre-training strategy that distills geospatial priors from a specialized teacher to bridge the domain gap; and (2) Feature Fusion Layers (FFL), which recalibrate spatial features and restore high-frequency boundary cues to overcome the capacity bottlenecks of lightweight backbones. Experiments across representative datasets, with a primary focus on cloud scenarios to evaluate performance under extreme scale variations and complex boundaries, demonstrate that GeoSAM-Lite achieves competitive accuracy while reducing parameters by 92.8\% compared to the heavyweight RSAM-Seg. By establishing a superior Pareto frontier between efficiency and fidelity, GeoSAM-Lite offers a practical solution for real-time segmentation on edge devices.

</details>


### [131] [Sparse-View Surface Reconstruction using Gaussian Splatting through High-Confidence Depth Propagation with Normal Priors](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03765)
*Liang Han,Bangcai Wei,Junsheng Zhou,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 本文提出了一种基于3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）的新方法，用于从稀疏视图中进行高保真表面重建，通过引入法线引导的深度传播方法和异常深度边缘感知正则化来解决几何线索有限和高斯离散性带来的挑战。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 稀疏视图下的3D重建是一个具有挑战性的任务。尽管3D高斯泼溅（3DGS）在稀疏视图的新视角合成方面取得了显著成果，但由于几何线索有限和高斯泼溅的离散性，从稀疏视图中重建高质量的几何表面仍然是一个挑战。

Method: 1. 提出法线引导的深度传播方法：将深度信息从高置信区域扩展到低置信区域，以约束深度估计
2. 提出异常深度边缘感知正则化：解决由高斯离散性引起的深度不连续性问题

Result: 在DTU和Tanks-and-Temples数据集上的大量实验表明，该方法在稀疏视图表面重建方面优于现有最先进方法。

Conclusion: 该方法通过法线引导的深度传播和异常深度边缘感知正则化，成功解决了稀疏视图下基于3DGS的表面重建挑战，实现了高质量的表面重建。

Abstract: 3D reconstruction from sparse views is a challenging task in 3D computer vision. Recent studies on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have achieved remarkable results with sparse views in novel view synthesis, yet reconstructing high-quality geometric surfaces from sparse views remains a challenge, due to the limited geometry clues and the discreteness of Gaussians. In this paper, we propose a novel 3DGS-based method for high-fidelity surface reconstruction from sparse views. Our key insight is to introduce a normal-guided depth propagation approach, which can extend depth information from high-confidence regions to constrain the depth in low-confidence areas. Additionally, we propose an abnormal depth edge-aware regularization to address depth discontinuities caused by the discreteness of Gaussians. Extensive experiments on DTU and Tanks-and-Temples datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art methods in sparse view surface reconstruction. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/DP-GS.

</details>


### [132] [Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03770)
*Hyunsoo Kim,Jungmyung Wi,Soobin Um,Donghyun Kim,Suhyun Kim*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 扩散分类器在零样本分类中表现稳健，但其性能受预训练数据分布影响：在数据流形的高密度多数区域表现好，在低密度少数区域表现差。本文提出MiPO方法，通过少数偏好优化增强少数区域采样，从而改善扩散分类器的感知能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有扩散分类器在数据流形的多数区域表现良好，但在少数区域表现显著较差。虽然先前研究关注生成更多少数类图像，但少数采样在生成之外对扩散分类器感知能力的影响尚未充分探索。

Method: 提出MiPO（Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization），通过少数偏好奖励对预训练扩散模型进行微调。仅使用任意标题数据生成候选样本，奖励那些更好覆盖少数区域的样本，使用LoRA和Group Relative Policy Optimization进行优化，无需额外图像数据、外部基础模型或奖励模型。

Result: MiPO实现了稳定的、提示自适应的少数采样，将低密度生成覆盖转化为改进的零样本扩散分类性能。在五个标准数据集上进行了评估。

Conclusion: 扩散分类器感知偏向多数区域，这种偏差可以通过少数偏好优化缓解。MiPO方法展示了少数采样与扩散分类器感知能力之间的直接关系，为改善零样本分类性能提供了新途径。

Abstract: Prior studies have demonstrated that diffusion classifiers achieve robust zero-shot classification performance. However, their effectiveness is strongly tied to the pretraining data distribution: they perform well in majority, high-density regions of the data manifold, but are significantly less accurate in minority, low-density regions. Although prior works on minority sampling have focused on generating more minority-like images, what minority sampling fundamentally enables beyond generation remains underexplored. In this paper, we reveal a direct relationship between minority sampling in generation and the perception capability of diffusion classifiers. Specifically, we show that enhancing minority sampling broadens the coverage of underrepresented regions on the data manifold, thereby improving diffusion-based recognition. To exploit this connection, we propose \textit{Self-Improving Diffusion Classifiers with Minority Preference Optimization} (MiPO), which fine-tunes a pretrained diffusion model using minority preference rewards. Using only arbitrary caption data, MiPO generates candidate samples, rewards those that better cover minority regions, and optimizes the model with LoRA and Group Relative Policy Optimization, without additional image data, external foundation models, or external reward models. This enables stable, prompt-adaptive minority sampling and translates low-density generative coverage into improved zero-shot diffusion classification. To sum up, we show that diffusion classifier perception is biased toward majority regions, demonstrate that this bias can be alleviated through minority preference optimization, and evaluate MiPO on five standard datasets.

</details>


### [133] [City-Level 3D Surface Reconstruction with Viewpoint Orientation Partitioning and Scene Completion](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03771)
*Liang Han,Wenyuan Zhang,Junsheng Zhou,Yu-Shen Liu,Zhizhong Han*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 提出基于视点方向的场景分割方法，用于高效、精确地重建大规模场景表面


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管基于3D高斯泼溅的大规模重建方法在新视角合成方面表现优异，但在大规模场景中生成高质量表面仍然困难，原因包括几何复杂、优化时间长和内存限制

Method: 1) 基于视点方向进行场景分割，确保相似方向的视图共同参与深度估计；2) 检测并修复由稀疏视点或纹理不足导致的初始点云缺失区域

Result: 在GauU-Scene、MatrixCity和UrbanScene3D数据集上的实验表明，该方法在大规模场景表面重建方面优于现有技术

Conclusion: 提出的基于视点方向的分割方法能够高效、精确地重建大规模场景表面，通过并行计算平衡计算负载，并提高几何质量

Abstract: Multi-view 3D surface reconstruction is a longstanding challenge in computer vision. Although recent large-scale reconstruction methods based on 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) achieve impressive novel-view synthesis, producing high-quality surfaces over large scenes remains difficult, due to complex geometry, long optimization, and limited memory. In this paper, we propose a novel yet simple partitioning method to efficiently and faithfully reconstruct large-scale scene surfaces. Our key insight lies in a scene partitioning method based on viewpoint orientation. This partitioning approach ensures that views with similar orientations are jointly involved for more accurate depth estimations, leading to precise surface reconstructions and balanced computation on multiple GPUs in parallel. In addition, we propose a strategy to detect and repair missing regions in the initial point cloud caused by sparse viewpoints or insufficient textures, thereby further improving the geometric quality. Extensive experiments on the GauU-Scene, MatrixCity, and UrbanScene3D datasets demonstrate that our method outperforms the state-of-the-art approaches in surface reconstruction for large-scale scenes. Project page: https://hanl2010.github.io/VOP-GS.

</details>


### [134] [Rethinking Depth Pruning for Vision Transformers: A Heterogeneity-Aware Perspective](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03784)
*Zhenfeng Su,Kang Zhao,Han Bao,Tao Yuan,Zhongzhe Hu,Xianzhi Yu,Wenxuan Wang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: HetDPT提出了一种异质性感知的深度剪枝方法，解决了传统ViT深度剪枝中因忽略层间异质性导致的维度不匹配问题，在保持精度的同时实现了显著的速度提升。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有视觉Transformer剪枝方法主要关注宽度剪枝，而深度剪枝（移除整个层）虽然能带来更高的加速比，但由于层间异质性导致的维度不匹配问题，难以恢复精度，限制了联合宽度-深度剪枝方法的加速效果。

Method: HetDPT是一种异质性感知的深度剪枝方法，通过考虑不同层之间的异质性来避免维度不匹配问题。该方法可以与宽度剪枝结合，形成HetDPT+方法，实现极端的ViT剪枝。

Result: 在ImageNet-1K、CIFAR-100、COCO和ADE20K上的实验验证：HetDPT使DeiT-B加速1.58倍且保持精度，DeiT-S加速1.39倍且精度几乎不降。HetDPT+在极端剪枝中创造了新记录，将Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G配置的加速比从4.24倍提升到5.19倍，同时保持接近无损的精度。

Conclusion: HetDPT通过解决深度剪枝中的层间异质性问题，成功实现了高效的ViT深度剪枝，显著提升了加速效果，为视觉Transformer的高效部署提供了有效解决方案。

Abstract: While prior studies have successfully compressed vision Transformers (ViTs) through various pruning techniques, most have concentrated on width pruning to achieve significant reductions in model size. Depth pruning, which removes entire layers from a ViT, is notoriously difficult for accuracy recovery despite its potential to deliver higher speedups, limiting the acceleration achieved by existing joint width-and-depth pruning methods. In this work, we reveal that the failure of existing depth pruning methods lies in their neglect of heterogeneity between different layers, and we introduce HetDPT, a heterogeneity-aware depth pruning method that avoids dimension mismatch. Comprehensive experiments on ImageNet-1K, CIFAR-100, COCO, and ADE20K validate our method: HetDPT achieves a 1.58$\times$ speedup for DeiT-B while maintaining accuracy and a 1.39$\times$ speedup for DeiT-S with nearly no accuracy degradation. Furthermore, when combined with width pruning, HetDPT+ sets a new state-of-the-art record in extreme ViT pruning, enhancing the acceleration ratio from 4.24$\times$ to 5.19$\times$ for the Isomorphic-Pruning-2.6G configuration while maintaining near-lossless accuracy; our code is available at https://github.com/Efficient-AI-for-All/HetDPT.

</details>


### [135] [G$^2$TAM: Geometry Grounded Track Anything Model](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03789)
*Chenming Zhu,Peizhou Cao,Jingli Lin,Wenbo Hu,Yunlong Ran,Jiangmiao Pang,Tai Wang,Xihui Liu*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: G²TAM是一个基于几何的跟踪框架，利用3D重建的空间一致性实现跨视角实例跟踪，无需显式外观记忆库。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前视频分割模型依赖显式对象外观记忆库进行实例跟踪，但对大视角变化和长期遮挡敏感。人类空间理解结合几何和语义，能实现跨视角一致的对象识别和定位。

Method: 提出Geometry Grounded Tracking Anything Model (G²TAM)，使用空间对齐的几何表示作为隐式记忆，确保跨帧和视角的实例身份和定位稳定性。核心是跨模态空间编码器，将视觉和文本提示整合到共享几何空间，实现端到端空间重建和实例一致掩码预测。

Result: 构建了InsTrack大规模数据集用于训练和评估。实验表明G²TAM具有强大的跨视角一致性、可提示实例空间跟踪、视频对象分割和空间重建能力。

Conclusion: G²TAM为交互式、基于几何的空间推理奠定了基础，展示了利用3D几何表示提升实例跟踪稳定性的有效性。

Abstract: Human spatial understanding arises from jointly perceiving geometry and semantics, enabling consistent object identification and localization across viewpoints and time. Current video segmentation models depend on explicit object appearance memory banks for instance tracking, yet they remain vulnerable to large viewpoint changes and long-term occlusions. Leveraging the spatial consistency afforded by modern feed-forward 3D reconstruction models, we propose the Geometry Grounded Tracking Anything Model (G$^2$TAM), a unified framework for promptable instance tracking in 3D using only unordered RGB images or videos. G$^2$TAM employs spatially aligned geometric representations as implicit memory, ensuring stable instance identity and localization across frames and views. At its core is a cross-modal spatial encoder that integrates visual and textual prompts into a shared geometric space, enabling end-to-end spatial reconstruction and instance-consistent mask prediction. To support training and evaluation, we construct InsTrack, a large-scale dataset with a dedicated validation split for benchmarking. Extensive experiments show that G$^2$TAM delivers strong cross-view consistency, promptable instance spatial tracking, video object segmentation and spatial reconstruction, establishing a foundation for interactive, geometry-grounded spatial reasoning.

</details>


### [136] [InfraNet: Quality-Aware RGB Guidance for Efficient Infrared Object Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03795)
*Zichao Feng,Haodong Zhu,Jingying Yang,Sheng Xu,Yangyang Ren,Yuguang Yang,Xuhui Liu,Juan Zhang,Tian Wang,Linlin Yang,Baochang Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: InfraNet是一个IR中心的物体检测框架，通过质量感知的RGB指导调节来增强恶劣视觉条件下的鲁棒性，支持RGB-IR或仅IR部署。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于融合的方法通常需要RGB和红外(IR)输入，并在训练和推理中同等对待它们，当RGB模态不可靠或不可用时，其鲁棒性会受到影响。需要一种能够灵活适应RGB可用性变化的解决方案。

Method: 提出InfraNet框架，采用非对称架构：主要IR路径提取多尺度红外特征进行预测，辅助RGB路径提供可靠性控制的监督信号。核心是QualGate模块，学习任务导向的控制信号来抑制不可靠的RGB指导并在跨模态训练中补偿IR特征。设计了两种变体：轻量级仅IR架构InfraNet-IR和RGB-IR架构InfraNet-RGB-IR。

Result: 在四个基准数据集(LLVIP、FLIR-Aligned、M3FD、DroneVehicle)上进行广泛实验，在低光和恶劣天气条件下显示出强竞争力或优越的准确性。InfraNet在仅IR推理中保持高效率，兼具准确性和计算效率。

Conclusion: InfraNet通过质量感知的RGB指导调节，在恶劣视觉条件下实现了鲁棒的物体检测，支持灵活的RGB-IR或仅IR部署，在准确性和效率方面表现出色。

Abstract: Robust object detection under adverse visual conditions remains a long-standing challenge for multi-modal perception systems. Existing fusion-based methods typically require both RGB and infrared (IR) inputs, and treat them equally during both training and inference, which compromises their robustness when the RGB modality becomes unreliable or unavailable. In this case, we propose \textbf{InfraNet}, an IR-centric quality-aware framework that regulates RGB guidance during training and supports flexible RGB--IR or IR-only deployment. InfraNet employs an asymmetric architecture where the primary IR pathway extracts multi-scale infrared features for predictions, while the auxiliary RGB pathway provides reliability-controlled supervisory signals. The core of InfraNet is \textbf{QualGate}, a quality-aware fusion module that learns a task-oriented control signal to suppress unreliable RGB guidance and compensate IR features during cross-modal training. Built upon InfraNet, we design two architectural variants: a lightweight IR-only architecture InfraNet-IR and an RGB--IR architecture InfraNet-RGB-IR. Our method is evaluated through extensive experiments on four benchmark datasets (LLVIP, FLIR-Aligned, M$^3$FD, and DroneVehicle), showing strong or competitive accuracy in challenging low-light and adverse weather conditions. Notably, InfraNet maintains high efficiency in IR-only inference, making it both accurate and computationally efficient.

</details>


### [137] [Probabilistic Robustness in Medical Image Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03797)
*Yi Zhang,Siddartha Khastgir,Xingyu Zhao*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了深度学习在医学图像分类中的可信度问题，提出了概率鲁棒性作为比对抗鲁棒性更实用的评估指标，并在MedMNIST v2数据集上系统评估了常用模型。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 深度学习在医学图像分类中表现良好，但在安全关键的临床环境中，模型在扰动下的预测错误可能导致严重后果。现有研究主要关注最坏情况下的对抗鲁棒性，这可能不太能代表真实的医学应用场景。

Method: 为医学图像分类构建了一组自然扰动设置，在MedMNIST v2数据集上系统评估常用的深度学习模型，从统计角度评估模型的可信度。

Result: 研究提供了基于统计视角的深度学习模型可信度评估方法，支持模型在医学影像应用中更可信的部署。

Conclusion: 概率鲁棒性比对抗鲁棒性更适合作为医学应用中模型可信度的实用评估指标，为深度学习模型在临床环境中的安全部署提供了新视角。

Abstract: Deep learning (DL) has shown strong performance in medical image classification, but its trustworthy deployment remains challenging in safety-critical clinical settings, where prediction errors under perturbations may lead to severe consequences. Existing studies mainly focus on adversarial robustness (AR) from a worst-case perspective; however, such settings may be less representative of real medical applications. In this work, we investigate probabilistic robustness (PR) as a more practical measure of model trustworthiness. To this end, we construct a set of natural corruption settings for medical image classification and systematically evaluate commonly used DL models on MedMNIST v2 dataset. Our study provides a statistically grounded perspective on assessing the trustworthiness of DL models, thereby supporting their more trustworthy deployment in medical imaging applications.

</details>


### [138] [When Simpler Is Better: Evaluating Translation Pipelines for Medieval Latin Manuscripts](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03836)
*Nguyen Kim Hai Bui,Md. Easin Arafat,Tamás Gábor Orosz,Mufti Mahmud*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文提出一个评估中世纪拉丁文手稿图像翻译系统的框架，发现专用OCR模型比通用视觉语言模型表现更好，并引入首个包含图像、转录和翻译的对齐语料库，揭示简单流水线优于复杂多组件系统。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 尽管机器翻译取得了显著进展，但视觉语言模型在处理历史手稿时面临挑战：低资源音译、古词汇和噪声输入信号。中世纪拉丁文手稿中的速记、连字和羊皮纸退化暴露了在干净文本基准测试中不可见的失败模式。

Method: 提出了一个系统性的图像到翻译流水线评估框架，在CATMuS拉丁语数据集上进行了基准测试，引入了Interpres-Parallel-Corpus（IPC）数据集（包含1,383个对齐的手稿图像行、转录和专家翻译），并比较了不同流水线配置。

Result: 专用OCR模型将字符错误率降低了高达4.3倍（尽管参数数量少几个数量级）。最简单的流水线（专用OCR模型直接输入VLM）优于所有多组件变体。添加检索增强生成（RAG）或OCR后校正会因提示饱和和错误传播而降低翻译质量。

Conclusion: 研究为低资源历史环境中的翻译系统部署提供了新的基准和实用指南，揭示了简单专用系统优于复杂通用方法的复杂性悖论。

Abstract: Despite remarkable progress in machine translation, Vision Language Models (VLMs) struggle on historical manuscripts, a domain that stresses core Natural Language Processing (NLP) capabilities: low-resource transliteration, archaic vocabulary, and noisy input signals. We present a systematic framework for evaluating the full image-to-translation pipeline on medieval Latin manuscripts, a setting in which scribal shorthand, ligatures, and parchment degradation expose failure modes that are invisible in clean-text benchmarks. Benchmarking on the CATMuS Latin dataset reveals a specialization gap: domain-specific Optical Character Recognition (OCR) models reduce character error rate by up to 4.3$\times$ compared to general-purpose VLMs, despite operating at orders of magnitude fewer parameters. We introduce the Interpres-Parallel-Corpus (IPC), a novel dataset comprising 1,383 aligned manuscript image lines, transcriptions, and expert translations, the first of its kind for medieval Latin. Our experiments uncover a complexity paradox: the simplest pipeline, a specialized OCR model feeding directly into a VLM, outperforms all multi-component variants. Adding retrieval-augmented generation (RAG) or post-OCR correction introduces prompt saturation and error propagation that degrade aggregate translation quality. These findings offer both a new benchmark and practical guidance for deploying translation systems in low-resource historical settings.

</details>


### [139] [ContiStain: Cross-Domain Relation-Preserving Distillation for Continual Multi-Domain Virtual IHC Staining](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03851)
*Fuqiang Chen,Yifeng Wang,Hongpeng Wang,Yongbing Zhang*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: ContiStain：一种用于连续虚拟染色的IHC多领域关系蒸馏框架，通过构建领域感知结构化特征空间和关系保持蒸馏策略，解决连续学习中新生物标志物数据顺序到达导致的先前已学生物标志物性能退化问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在临床实践中，新生物标志物数据通常是随时间顺序获取的。在这样顺序到达的数据上进行微调会导致先前已学生物标志物的性能严重退化，因为顺序优化破坏了潜在空间中生物标志物表示之间的结构化关系。

Method: 1. 使用混合专家（MoE）特征提取器构建领域感知结构化特征空间，减少跨生物标志物领域的表示干扰。2. 提出关系保持蒸馏策略，在连续适应过程中明确强制已学生物标志物领域之间跨领域token级余弦相似性矩阵的一致性。

Result: 在MIST数据集上，在四领域顺序虚拟IHC染色设置下进行实验，ContiStain显示出改进的稳定性，与顺序微调相比，FID和ConchFID分别降低了11.1和60.9，实现了可扩展且稳健的多领域虚拟染色。

Conclusion: ContiStain通过维持跨领域结构一致性，在减轻遗忘的同时保持对新领域的适应性，为连续虚拟染色提供了一种有效的解决方案，促进了可扩展和稳健的多领域虚拟染色。

Abstract: A unified multiplex virtual staining model enables scalable and non-destructive multiplex analysis from H&E slides while promoting parameter efficiency, shared pathological knowledge, and consistent cross-biomarker representations. However, in clinical practice, data for new biomarkers are typically acquired sequentially over time. Fine-tuning on such temporally arriving data leads to severe performance degradation on previously learned biomarkers, as sequential optimization disrupts the structured relationships among biomarker representations in the latent space. To address this issue, we propose ContiStain, an IHC multi-domain relational distillation framework for continual virtual staining. We first (i) construct a domain-aware structured feature space using a mixture-of-experts (MoE) feature extractor to reduce representation interference across biomarker domains. Based on this stabilized feature space, we then (ii) propose a relation-preserving distillation strategy that explicitly enforces the consistency of cross-domain token-level cosine similarity matrices between learned biomarker domains during continual adaptation. By maintaining cross-domain structural coherence, ContiStain mitigates forgetting while retaining adaptability to new domains. Experiments on the MIST dataset under a four-domain sequential virtual IHC staining setting show improved stability, reducing FID and ConchFID by 11.1 and 60.9 compared to sequential fine-tuning, enabling scalable and robust multi-domain virtual staining. Code is released at https://github.com/ccitachi/ContiStain.

</details>


### [140] [PRISM3D: Probabilistic Refinement and Robust Initialization for Physically Consistent Scene Modeling under Extreme Motion Blur](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03855)
*Gopi Raju Matta,Reddypalli Trisha,Vemunuri Divya Madhuri,Kaushik Mitra*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: PRISM3D：首个从极端运动模糊图像进行盲3D场景重建的统一框架，无需清晰图像监督，通过鲁棒初始化、概率几何稠密化和物理图像建模实现重建，并扩展为多模态PRISM3D-E（RGB+事件流）进一步提升重建质量。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决从极端运动模糊图像进行盲3D场景重建的逆问题，传统SfM方法在此场景下完全失效，现有方法依赖不切实际的清晰图像监督，需要一种直接从严重退化输入进行重建的鲁棒框架。

Method: 1. 鲁棒初始化：使用深度稠密跟踪方法（VGGSfM）恢复全局拓扑结构；2. 概率几何稠密化：通过MCMC方法对稀疏先验进行鲁棒填充；3. 物理图像建模：采用连续贝塞尔轨迹建模物理图像形成过程；4. 多模态扩展（PRISM3D-E）：集成高时间分辨率事件流作为结构先验。

Result: 建立了新的最先进性能，PRISM3D和PRISM3D-E在极端运动模糊场景下的3D重建质量显著优于现有方法，同时贡献了PRISM3D-E基准数据集以支持多模态评估。

Conclusion: PRISM3D是首个从极端运动模糊图像成功进行3D重建的统一框架，无需清晰图像监督，通过结合鲁棒初始化、概率优化和物理建模解决了传统方法的瓶颈，多模态扩展进一步提升了重建保真度，为严重退化场景的3D重建开辟了新途径。

Abstract: We address the inverse problem of blind 3D scene reconstruction from extremely motion-blurred images, a scenario where traditional Structure-from-Motion (SfM) pipelines fail. Existing approaches typically circumvent this bottleneck by relying on impractical sharp-image supervision. In this work, we introduce PRISM3D, a unified framework enabling robust reconstruction directly from severely degraded inputs. To overcome the lack of a reliable starting point, we propose a Robust Initialization strategy utilizing deep dense tracking method (VGGSfM) to recover global topology where feature matching fails. To the best of our knowledge, we are the first to effectively leverage this paradigm to bootstrap 3D Gaussian Splatting from extreme motion blur. However, while robust, this initialization yields sparse and noisy geometry that causes deterministic optimization to diverge. To resolve this, we propose a coupled solution driven by probability and physics: we adopt a probabilistic formulation for geometric densification via Markov Chain Monte Carlo (MCMC) to robustly populate the sparse priors, while simultaneously modeling physical image formation via continuous Bezier Trajectories. Furthermore, while PRISM3D establishes a highly robust standalone pipeline, the availability of complementary event streams offers an opportunity to push the reconstruction fidelity further. To exploit this, we introduce PRISM3D-E, a multi-modal (RGB + Events) extension that seamlessly integrates high-temporal-resolution events as structural priors to maximize geometric recovery. Because existing datasets lack paired event streams under such severe degradation, we concurrently contribute the PRISM3D-E Benchmark to facilitate rigorous evaluation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that both our standalone RGB framework and its multi-modal extension establish new state-of-the-art performance.

</details>


### [141] [Ghosts Beneath Textures: Texture-Relation Cues for Cross-Paradigm AI-Generated Image Detection](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.03862)
*Haoyu Wang,Yiming Qin,Zhongjie Ba,Ziping Dong,Jishen Zeng,Peng Cheng,Kui Ren*

Main category: cs.CV

TL;DR: 该论文研究了跨范式AI生成图像检测问题，构建了ConImageGen基准，提出DTS-Det框架通过建模纹理关系实现泛化检测，在多个评估设置中达到SOTA性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前大多数AI生成图像检测器基于图像无关生成范式（如基于噪声或文本引导）开发，但实际应用中图像条件生成越来越重要。检测器在这两种范式间的泛化能力问题长期被忽视，需要研究跨范式检测问题。

Method: 通过抑制语义干扰，首次可视化跨生成范式的语义无关纹理模式，发现结构化局部-全局纹理关系。基于此提出DTS-Det检测框架，从直接利用显式伪影转向建模纹理关系，捕捉和利用这种关系进行泛化AI生成图像检测。

Result: DTS-Det在ConImageGen上达到99.6% ACC，比最佳基线提升10.5%。在PicoBanana/RAID跨数据集评估中达到93.2%/94.1% ACC。在重建攻击和黑盒对抗攻击下分别保持95.2%/88.1%的检测率，表现优异。

Conclusion: 该论文首次系统研究跨范式AI生成图像检测问题，发现跨范式的结构化局部-全局纹理关系可作为泛化法证证据，提出的DTS-Det框架通过建模纹理关系实现了有效的泛化检测，为解决实际应用中的检测挑战提供了新视角。

Abstract: AI-generated images have proliferated rapidly, motivating extensive research. Most existing AI-generated image detectors are developed and evaluated under image-free generation paradigms, such as noise-based or text-guided generation.
