Existing MEG- and EEG-based methods, while scalable, continue to suffer from high word error rates driven by relatively low signal-to-noise ratios compared to invasive recordings. We propose physiological noise augmentation (PNA), a data augmentation method that explicitly trains decoders to become invariant to task-agnostic artifacts (e.g. ocular and cardiac activity). PNA draws inspiration from automatic speech recognition systems, where environmental noise (e.g. dogs barking, city traffic) is added to clean speech to improve robustness. Analogously, we decompose brain recordings into clean data and noise artifacts using independent component analysis (ICA), before scaling and remixing to generate biophysically realistic, label-preserving training examples. We show that PNA approximates anisotropic regularization, penalizing decoder sensitivity along artifact-dominated directions. On MegNIST, a 12k-trial imagined-digit MEG dataset, PNA with 10-trial averaging improves EEGNet decoding accuracy by 4.7 percentage points (absolute) over training on real data alone. Our results suggest that artifact-aware augmentation and trial averaging are complementary tools for improving robustness in non-invasive speech BCIs.

</details>


### [540] [MeGA-MP: Metric Graph Advection Message Passing -- A Physics-Informed Message Passing Operator for Advection-Dominated Metric Graphs](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05167)
*Janine Strotherm,Luca Hermes,André Artelt,Barbara Hammer*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 提出一种用于度量图上线性平流建模的新型物理信息消息传递算子，无需训练即可精确恢复平流动力学，并在水分配系统中实现优于基线的方法


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界系统（如水管网、电网、交通流网络）通常组织为网络结构，时空动力学沿着连接而非节点间离散传播。这些系统自然地建模为度量图，但现有PINNs和算子学习方法难以直接应用，特别是平流动力学需要捕捉图上的反对称和长程依赖关系。

Method: 提出一种新型物理信息消息传递算子，将度量图上的线性平流编码为归纳偏置。在纯平流设置下，该算子理论上无需训练即可精确恢复动力学（直到理论推导的离散化误差）。通过与可训练组件（如MLPs）结合，扩展到水分配系统中的实际平流-反应动力学。

Result: 在纯平流设置中，该算子无需训练即可精确恢复动力学。在水分配系统的平流-反应动力学建模中，相比基线方法取得更优性能，并实现跨不同图拓扑的零样本泛化。

Conclusion: 提出的物理信息消息传递算子能够有效建模度量图上的平流动力学，为水管网等实际系统提供了一种强大的建模框架，具有理论保证和实际应用价值。

Abstract: Many real-world systems are organized as networks where spatio-temporal dynamics unfold along connections and not discretely between nodes. Examples include utility networks such as water distribution systems or gas networks, electrical grids, and traffic flow networks. Such systems are naturally modeled as metric graphs, where edges correspond to one-dimensional Euclidean subspaces connected at vertices. Metric graphs are independent of an underlying global Euclidean space, limiting direct application of typical PINNs and operator-learning methods. Especially transport dynamics like advection require a methodology able to capture antisymmetric and long-range dependencies on graphs, which is itself a challenge. We propose a novel physics-informed message passing operator that encodes linear advection on metric graphs as an inductive bias. In the purely advective setting, the operator provably recovers the exact dynamics up to a theoretically derived discretization error without any training. Combined with trainable components like MLPs, our message passing operator extends to realistic advection-reaction dynamics in water distribution systems, where we achieve superior performance compared to baselines and zero-shot generalization across different graph topologies.

</details>


### [541] [Platonic Projection Structures: Operator-Induced Observability in Representation Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05175)
*Kazuo Ishii,Bishnu Prasad Gautam,Jieling Wu,Javaid Saher*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了Platonic Projection Structures (PPS)框架，通过算子理论分析部分观测下的表示可访问性，将可观测性特征化为算子诱导的商几何结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有表示学习方法通常将可观测输出视为潜在表示的直接反映，缺乏对部分观测下表示可访问性的理论框架。需要一种统一的理论来理解量子测量、表示推断等不同场景中的可观测性结构。

Method: 提出Platonic Projection Structures (PPS)：将系统建模为三元组(H, Π, O)，其中H是潜在表示空间，Π是自伴正半定观测算子，O(v)=⟨v,Πv⟩定义诱导标量可观测量。可观测性通过商几何H/ker(Π)来表征，表示在观测下不可区分的潜在状态等价类。

Result: 1) 量子测量和线性观测模型下的表示推断共享算子理论结构，但观测算子的代数性质不同；2) 表示迁移和知识蒸馏可解释为通过ΦΠ_T ≈ Π_S Φ保持可观测几何；3) 揭示了输出可解释性的结构限制：ker(Π)中的潜在分量无法从诱导可观测量访问；4) 实验验证了核不变可观测性、投影诱导归因差距和秩控制可观测几何。

Conclusion: PPS通过算子诱导的商几何提供了可观测性的显式特征化，为表示可访问性、可解释性和投影介导推断提供了统一视角，揭示了部分观测下表示学习的固有约束。

Abstract: We characterize observability in representation learning through Platonic Projection Structures (PPS), an operator-theoretic framework for analyzing representation accessibility under partial observation. Rather than treating observable outputs as direct reflections of latent representations, PPS models observation through a self-adjoint positive semidefinite operator acting on a latent representation space. A system is represented as a triple $(H, Π, O)$, where $H$ is a latent representation space, $Π\succeq 0$ is an observation operator, and $O(v)=\langle v,Πv\rangle$ defines an induced scalar observable. Observability is characterized by the quotient geometry $H/\ker(Π)$, representing equivalence classes of latent states indistinguishable under observation. We show that quantum measurement and representation inference under linear observation models share this operator-theoretic structure while differing in the algebraic properties of their observation operators; the correspondence is structural rather than physical. Representation transfer and knowledge distillation can likewise be interpreted as approximate preservation of observable geometry through $ΦΠ_T \approx Π_S Φ$. PPS also reveals a structural limitation of output-based interpretability: latent components in $\ker(Π)$ are inaccessible from induced observables, imposing intrinsic constraints on attribution and explanation methods. Controlled empirical validations demonstrate kernel-invariant observability, projection-induced attribution gaps, and rank-controlled observable geometry in latent representation spaces. PPS thus provides an explicit characterization of observability through operator-induced quotient geometry and a unified perspective on representation accessibility, interpretability, and projection-mediated inference.

</details>


### [542] [Relational Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Dynamic Pricing in High-Speed Railway Markets](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05179)
*Enrique Adrian Villarrubia-Martin,David Muñoz-Valero,Luis Rodriguez-Benitez,Giovanni Montana,Luis Jimenez-Linares*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种基于实体图建模的铁路定价强化学习框架，通过图神经网络处理市场拓扑结构，在部分可观测环境中实现动态定价优化，相比传统方法获得更高收益和稳定性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在自由化铁路系统中，运营商需要在部分可观测环境下动态定价，但存在信息私有性且监管禁止运营商间直接通信以防合谋，这导致智能体只能从可观测市场数据中推断战略互动，给多智能体强化学习带来挑战。

Method: 提出实体图建模方法，将环境表示为运营单位而非决策智能体或静态基础设施的图，编码实体间的竞争、协调和连接关系。然后扩展多智能体TD3算法，通过多层关系图卷积网络处理实体特征，并通过学习的注意力机制进行聚合。

Result: 在铁路定价强化学习环境中的实验结果表明，该框架在两个不同且日益复杂的市场设置中，相比代表性的关系型和非关系型基线方法，实现了更高的收益和稳定性。

Conclusion: 通过实体图建模和关系图卷积网络，该框架能够有效捕捉市场拓扑结构中的战略互动，在部分可观测的铁路定价环境中优于传统方法，为动态定价问题提供了新的解决方案。

Abstract: In liberalised railway systems, operators must set prices dynamically in an environment with partial observability, as they retain private information about their objectives and performance, where regulatory constraints prohibit communication or direct information exchange between competitors to prevent explicit collusion. Consequently, agents must learn to infer strategic interactions only from observable market data which presents a significant challenge for multi-agent reinforcement learning, where standard approaches typically treat observations as unstructured vectors, ignoring the underlying market topology that governs strategic interactions. To address this, an entity graph modelling approach is proposed, which represents the environment as a graph of operational units, rather than decision-making agents or static infrastructure, encoding competition, coordination, and connectivity relations between entities. Then, an extension of the multi-agent twin delayed deep deterministic policy gradient algorithm with graph-based representation learning processes the features of the entities through a multi-layer relational graph convolutional network and aggregates them via a learnt attention mechanism. Experimental results in a rail pricing reinforcement learning environment show that this novel framework achieves higher revenue and stability in two different settings of increasing market complexity compared to a representative selection of relational and non-relational baselines. The code is publicly available at: https://github.com/Kinrre/RelationalRailPricing-RL

</details>


### [543] [SMART: A Machine Learning and Monte Carlo Framework for Rapid Analysis of Stochastic Transistor Aging and Process Variation in Digital Circuits](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05187)
*Arash Esshaghi,Siavash Es'haghi,Gholamreza Shahabadi,Alireza Moradi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SMART是一个将机器学习与蒙特卡洛模拟结合的框架，用于快速分析数字电路在纳米工艺下的可靠性，相比现有方法减少94.54%分析时间，保持1.63%平均误差。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 随着CMOS技术进入深纳米尺度，偏压温度不稳定性和工艺变异性的随机效应严重威胁数字电路可靠性。传统可靠性分析方法依赖计算密集的仿真或大量查找表，无法有效扩展到大规模设计，成为设计空间探索的关键瓶颈。

Method: 提出SMART框架，整合机器学习与蒙特卡洛模拟。采用随机森林回归直接预测门延迟分布，绕过耗时的原子模型参数提取。关键创新是使用贝叶斯优化进行自动化超参数调优，确保在不同工艺库中保持最大预测鲁棒性。

Result: 在ISCAS85基准电路上的实验验证表明，SMART相比最先进方法减少94.54%分析时间，同时保持仅1.63%的平均准确度误差。

Conclusion: 通过将计算复杂度转移到离线训练阶段，该框架为设计弹性、可靠性感知的数字系统提供了可扩展、准确的解决方案。

Abstract: As CMOS technology scales into the deep nanometer regime, digital circuit reliability is increasingly threatened by the combined stochastic effects of Bias Temperature Instability (BTI) and Process Variation (PV). Traditional reliability analysis methods, which rely on computationally intensive simulations or extensive lookup tables, fail to scale efficiently for large designs, creating a critical bottleneck in design space exploration. To address this, we propose SMART, a novel framework that integrates Machine Learning (ML) with Monte Carlo simulation to enable rapid, high-fidelity reliability analysis. SMART employs Random Forest regression to predict gate delay distributions directly, bypassing time-consuming atomic model parameter extractions. Crucially, the model utilizes Bayesian Optimization for automated hyperparameter tuning, ensuring maximum predictive robustness across diverse libraries. Experimental validation on ISCAS85 benchmark circuits demonstrates that SMART achieves a 94.54% reduction in analysis time compared to state-of-the-art methods, while maintaining a remarkable average accuracy error of just 1.63%. By shifting computational complexity to an offline training phase, the proposed framework offers a scalable, accurate solution for designing resilient, reliability-aware digital systems.

</details>


### [544] [Latent Programming Horizons in Coding Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05188)
*André Silva,Han Tu,Martin Monperrus*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究发现，在代码生成代理中，语言模型的残差流能线性编码程序演化属性（如语法正确性、测试通过率等），且这些表示能提前预测未来编辑结果，揭示了代理的"潜在编程视野"。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 代码生成代理在解决软件工程任务时需要多步推理、编辑和测试，但人们对底层语言模型如何内部表示正在处理程序知之甚少。本研究旨在探索语言模型在代码生成代理中的内部表示机制。

Method: 使用逻辑回归探针分析语言模型在代码生成任务中的隐藏状态，解码当前代码的语法正确性、测试通过情况、失败测试减少和回归引入等属性。同时训练探针预测未来编辑结果。

Result: 1. 逻辑回归探针能有效解码程序属性，AUC最高达0.83；2. 模型表示能提前预测未来编辑结果，最多可提前25步；3. 探针在不同基准测试间具有可迁移性。

Conclusion: 代码生成代理的语言模型内部存在对程序状态的线性编码，且这些表示能"超前"于实际编辑，揭示了代理的潜在编程视野，为代码生成代理的机制可解释性研究开辟了新方向。

Abstract: A coding agent solving a software-engineering task spends dozens of steps reasoning, editing code, and running tests, yet little is known about what the underlying language model internally represents about the program it is working on. We show that the residual streams of language models under coding agents linearly encode properties of the evolving program: a logistic-regression probe on hidden states is able to decode whether the current code parses, passes its test suite, reduces the number of failing tests, and introduces regressions, reaching AUC up to 0.83 for correctness across two models and two benchmarks. Our second finding is more surprising: these representations run ahead of the agent's own edits. Probes trained to predict the outcome of future edits (before they are materialized and written on disk) achieve performance above chance up to roughly 25 steps in advance. We call this the agent's latent programming horizon. As a proof of external validity, we show that the probes transfer across benchmarks without retraining. Our positive results open calls for more research in mechanistic interpretability of coding agents.

</details>


### [545] [Noisy-Channel Minimum Bayes Risk Decoding](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05198)
*Yusuke Sakai,Hidetaka Kamigaito,Taro Watanabe*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究提出了一种考虑双向效应的噪声信道分解MBR解码方法，通过将MBR分解为四个交互组件来更好地解释现有变体并提高解码性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统MBR解码在假设选择时计算给定伪参考条件下的期望效用分数，但常用的评估指标（如BLEU、COMET）是不对称的。这种设计上的差异使得需要考虑假设到参考和参考到假设的双向效应，以提高解码的鲁棒性和质量。

Method: 引入噪声信道分解的MBR解码方法，将MBR分解为四个交互组件：假设到参考似然、参考到假设似然、假设先验和参考先验。这种分解为现有MBR变体提供了统一解释，并通过隔离每个信道的贡献实现指标和任务特定的可解释性。

Result: 综合分析显示，不同指标下信道贡献表现出不同的特征，但在不同任务中保持一致性。研究还表明，适当的信道加权可能比原始MBR解码带来改进。

Conclusion: 噪声信道分解为MBR解码提供了新的理论框架，能够更好地处理评估指标的不对称性，通过考虑双向效应提高文本生成质量，并为不同任务和指标提供可解释的优化路径。

Abstract: Minimum Bayes Risk (MBR) decoding yields more robust and higher-quality text generation than maximum a posteriori (MAP) decoding by selecting hypotheses that maximize expected utility over sampled pseudo-references. However, there exists a discrepancy in the design: hypothesis selection calculates expected utility scores conditioned on given pseudo-references, while commonly used evaluation metrics, e.g., BLEU and COMET, are asymmetric. Therefore, it is important to consider both hypothesis-to-reference and reference-to-hypothesis directional effects. In this study, we introduce a noisy channel decomposition of MBR decoding that naturally incorporates bidirectional effects to account for these asymmetries. We decompose MBR decoding into four interacting components: hypothesis-to-reference likelihood, reference-to-hypothesis likelihood, hypothesis prior, and reference prior. This decomposition provides a unified interpretation of existing MBR variants and enables metric- and task-specific interpretability by isolating the contribution of each channel. Our comprehensive analysis reveals that channel-wise contributions exhibit distinct characteristics across metrics while remaining consistent across tasks, and suggests that appropriate channel weighting may lead to improvements over original MBR decoding.

</details>


### [546] [FlatManifold: Robust Continual Learning under Severe Label Noise and Domain Shifts via Intrinsic Manifold Flattening](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05201)
*Rai Hisada,Kanji Tanaka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FlatManifold是一个新颖的鲁棒持续学习框架，通过Nyström流形平坦化映射将特征分布映射到固定正交目标拓扑，利用核技巧和正交化RKHS投影，在非平稳流式环境中同时处理非线性域漂移和严重未校准标签噪声。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在非平稳流式环境中，同时适应复杂的非线性域漂移（通过持续学习）并减轻严重未校准标签噪声的灾难性影响，这是一个基本的数学挑战。

Method: 提出FlatManifold框架，利用基于核技巧的Nyström流形平坦化映射和正交化再生核希尔伯特空间投影。通过将特征分布映射到具有岭正则化的固定正交目标拓扑，在优化过程中自然地平滑和抵消极端标签噪声的影响。同时，通过利用过去经验协方差矩阵的持续拓扑制动项来防止灾难性遗忘。

Result: 在真实世界多会话机器人数据集上的广泛评估显示，即使在具有40%对称标签噪声的严重条件下，FlatManifold也能成功减轻梯度污染。在跨越不同季节和光照条件的极端跨会话域漂移下，该框架表现出高泛化能力，显著优于标准顺序优化基线。

Conclusion: FlatManifold证明了结构线性化本身作为对抗分布式标签污染的强大数学屏障，通过流形平坦化在持续学习环境中有效处理域漂移和标签噪声。

Abstract: In non-stationary streaming environments, simultaneously adapting to complex, non-linear domain shifts via continual learning while mitigating the catastrophic effects of severe, uncalibrated label noise poses a fundamental mathematical challenge. In this paper, we propose \FlatManifold{}, a novel, streamlined robust continual learning framework that utilizes a Nyström manifold flattening map based on the kernel trick and projection onto an orthogonalized Reproducing Kernel Hilbert Space (RKHS).
  Unlike traditional methods that rely on complex, error-prone sample-filtering pipelines, the proposed approach exploits the intrinsic mathematical robustness of the flattened space itself. By mapping feature distributions onto a fixed orthogonal target topology with a ridge regularizer, the framework naturally smoothes and counteracts the influence of extreme label noise during the optimization process. Concurrently, catastrophic forgetting is prevented via a continual topology brake term that leverages the covariance matrix of past experiences.
  Extensive evaluation on real-world multi-session robotics datasets demonstrates that even under severe conditions featuring 40\% symmetric label noise, \FlatManifold{} successfully mitigates gradient corruption. Under extreme cross-session domain shifts spanning various seasons and lighting conditions, the proposed framework establishes high generalization capabilities, significantly outperforming standard sequential optimization baselines and proving that structural linearization itself serves as a powerful mathematical barrier against distributed label corruption.

</details>


### [547] [Video-based detection of cessation of breathing in pre-term infants using machine learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05230)
*Dineo Serame,Lionel Tarassenko,Mauricio Villarroel*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该研究探讨了使用非接触式视频监测来检测早产儿呼吸暂停相关呼吸停止（COBE）的可行性，并发现将视频信号与常规生理信号结合可显著提高检测准确性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 早产儿因呼吸控制未成熟而易发生有害的呼吸暂停，但新生儿重症监护室（NICU）中基于接触式传感器的呼吸监测常因运动伪影、传感器移位和皮肤脆弱性等问题不可靠。非接触式视频监测可作为补充方法，避免粘性传感器问题并提供额外呼吸信息。

Method: 使用30名早产儿的视频和临床记录，从动态追踪的躯干区域提取呼吸运动以生成相机衍生的时间序列信号。训练仅使用相机信号的残差网络（ResNet）模型，同时构建混合模型将视频信号与阻抗呼吸描记法（IP）、心电图衍生呼吸（EDR）和光电容积描记法衍生呼吸包络相结合。

Result: 仅使用相机信号的模型达到76.9%的平衡准确率，证明非接触式COBE检测的可行性。将视频特征与IP结合后，平衡准确率提升至90.6%，优于任一单独模态，表明视频提供了超出标准生理信号的呼吸信息。

Conclusion: 视频衍生信号包含临床相关的呼吸特征，与常规生理信号结合可增强COBE检测。这支持非接触式视频作为自动COBE检测的补充模态，并突显其提高新生儿呼吸监测鲁棒性的潜力。

Abstract: Pre-term infants are susceptible to potentially harmful apnoea-related cessations of breathing due to immature respiratory control. However, reliable respiratory monitoring in the neonatal intensive care unit (NICU) remains challenging because motion artefacts, sensor displacement, and skin fragility can compromise contact-based measurements. Non-contact video monitoring offers a complementary approach that does not depend on adhesive sensors while providing additional respiratory information.
  We investigated whether camera-based signals can detect apnoea-related cessation of breathing (COBE) and provide complementary information to routinely acquired physiological signals. Using video and clinical recordings from 30 pre-term infants, respiratory motion was extracted from dynamically tracked torso regions to generate camera-derived time-series signals. Camera-only models were trained using residual network (ResNet) architectures, while hybrid models combined video-derived signals with impedance pneumography (IP), ECG-derived respiration (EDR), and the PPG-derived respiratory envelope.
  Camera-only models achieved a balanced accuracy of 76.9%, demonstrating the feasibility of non-contact COBE detection. Combining video-derived features with IP improved balanced accuracy to 90.6%, outperforming either modality alone and indicating that video provides respiratory information beyond standard physiological signals.
  These findings show that video-derived signals contain clinically relevant respiratory features and enhance COBE detection when combined with conventional physiological signals. This supports non-contact video as a complementary modality for automated COBE detection and highlights its potential to improve the robustness of neonatal respiratory monitoring.

</details>


### [548] [CanniUplift: A Holistic Framework for Mitigating Seller and Incentive Cannibalization in E-commerce Uplift Modeling](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05242)
*Zuwang He,Shihao Shu,Yuli Qu,Hanyu Gao,Ziliang Zhang,Diwei Chen,Xiangda Yan,Buyu Gao,Tanchao Zhu,Yumeng Li,Junxiong Zhu*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CanniUplift是一个解决电商个性化激励分配中双重蚕食效应的统一框架，通过平台级全局对齐和基于兑换的分解去噪来提升增量效果估计。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统激励提升模型在复杂多商家环境中存在SUTVA假设违反问题，面临两个关键挑战：1）商家级蚕食效应（激励导致消费在商家间转移而非平台增长）；2）激励级蚕食效应（自然转化或替代奖励给增量估计带来噪声）。

Method: 提出CanniUplift框架：平台级全局对齐（PGA）通过全局GMV一致性约束捕捉跨商家替代效应；基于兑换的分解去噪（RDD）利用兑换行为在全空间框架中分解处理结果并减少归因噪声；设计Treat-Attention机制建模用户历史行为与当前处理选项的复杂交互。

Result: 在合成和工业数据集上的实验显示CanniUplift显著优于现有基线。消融研究证实PGA和RDD的集成持续改善wAUUC和wQINI指标。在线部署后，平台增量GMV相对生产基线提升4.08%，A/B测试中ROI得到改善。

Conclusion: CanniUplift有效缓解了电商激励分配中的双重蚕食效应，通过全局约束和噪声分解提升了增量效果估计的准确性，成功驱动了平台整体增长。

Abstract: Personalized incentive allocation is vital for e-commerce, where uplift modeling is the standard for estimating Individual Treatment Effects (ITE). However, traditional models often fail in complex multi-seller environments with violations of the Stable Unit Treatment Value Assumption (SUTVA). We identify two critical challenges: Seller-level Cannibalization, where incentives shift expenditure between shops without growing the platform, and Incentive-level Cannibalization, where organic conversions or alternative rewards introduce significant noise into incrementality estimation. In this paper, we propose CanniUplift, a unified framework to mitigate these dual-source cannibalization effects. Specifically, we design Platform-level Global Alignment (PGA) to capture cross-shop substitution through global GMV consistency constraints. To tackle incentive-driven noise, we introduce Redemption-based Decomposition Denoising (RDD), which uses redemption behavior to decompose treated outcomes and reduce attribution noise within an entire-space framework. Furthermore, a Treat-Attention mechanism is designed to model intricate interactions between users' historical behaviors and current treatment options. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and large-scale industrial datasets demonstrate that CanniUplift significantly outperforms state-of-the-art baselines. Ablation studies confirm that the integration of PGA and RDD consistently improves wAUUC and wQINI. Successfully deployed online, our framework achieved a 4.08% relative increase in platform-wide incremental GMV (Delta GMV) over the production baseline and improved ROI in online A/B tests, proving effective in driving global platform growth.

</details>


### [549] [FUSE: FK-Steered Multi-Modal Flow Matching for Efficient Simulation-Based Posterior Estimation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05252)
*Weichen Qin,Yufan Xie,Peihao Wang,Chia-Jui Chou,Minghui Du,Peng Xu,Ziren Luo,Yi Yang,Jingyi Yu,Bo Liang,Jiakai Zhang*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: FUSE 是一种基于费曼-卡茨引导的多模态流匹配方法，用于高效的仿真推断，通过双轨架构和中间观测似然引导采样，解决了现有方法在多模态建模和参数退化方面的局限性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的仿真推断方法在多模态建模方面存在困难，通常采用简单的融合策略忽略了参数与观测之间的结构差异，限制了估计的准确性。需要一种能有效处理多模态输入、保持特征差异并促进动态交互的方法。

Method: FUSE 采用双轨架构，保持多模态输入的独立特征并促进动态交互；提出费曼-卡茨引导的采样策略，利用中间观测似然引导生成轨迹，提高推理过程中的样本质量。

Result: 在标准 SBI 基准测试中，FUSE 优于现有最先进方法，产生的后验分布与真实 MCMC 结果高度匹配；在实际系外行星轨道估计任务中，成功解决了现有方法难以处理的复杂参数退化问题。

Conclusion: FUSE 通过创新的双轨架构和费曼-卡茨引导采样，有效解决了仿真推断中的多模态建模挑战，在科学发现中具有加速复杂科学发现的潜力，特别是在天体物理学等领域。

Abstract: Simulation-Based Inference (SBI) is critical for scientific discovery, with generative models offering a promising path toward efficient inference. However, existing methods struggle with effective multimodal modeling. They often rely on brute-force fusion strategies that ignore the structural disparities between parameters and observations, thus limiting estimation fidelity. In this work, we introduce FUSE (Feynman-Kac steered mUlti-modal flow matching for efficient Simulation-based posterior Estimation). Unlike prior work, FUSE employs a dual-track architecture that preserves the distinct features of multimodal inputs while facilitating dynamic interaction. Additionally, we propose an FK-steered sampling strategy that leverages intermediate observation likelihoods to guide the generative trajectories, effectively improving the sample quality during inference. Our approach outperforms state-of-the-art baselines on standard SBI benchmarks, producing posteriors that closely match ground-truth MCMC. Furthermore, in a real-world exoplanet orbital estimation task, FUSE successfully resolves complex parameter degeneracies that challenge existing methods, highlighting its potential to accelerate complex scientific discoveries in astrophysics and beyond.

</details>


### [550] [GeoFlow: Geo-Aware Modeling of Inter-Area Relationships in Origin-Destination Flow Prediction and Generation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05257)
*Zherui Huang,Guanjie Zheng,Hao Xue,Linghe Kong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: GeoFlow是一个用于OD流建模的新框架，通过融合地理空间属性和几何内在编码器设计，提升城市移动性预测和生成能力。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有的基于图的OD流建模方法往往忽略重要的地理空间属性，限制了其对长距离和多区域依赖关系的建模能力。

Method: GeoFlow框架：(1)用相对位置、k跳距离和测地距离等地理空间属性增强区域表示；(2)设计几何-内在融合编码器，结合图注意力机制和坐标感知编码器；(3)采用轴向-全局注意力解码器捕捉OD特定的竞争依赖关系，并与流匹配模型结合生成OD流。

Result: GeoFlow在预测准确性方面表现优异，同时在生成真实性和多样性方面有显著提升。消融和分析研究证实了各组件的贡献。

Conclusion: GeoFlow通过有效融合地理空间属性和几何结构信息，显著提升了OD流建模的性能，为城市规划和移动性分析提供了更强大的工具。

Abstract: Origin-destination (OD) flow modeling underpins urban planning and mobility analysis, but prevailing graph-based methods often neglect salient geographic attributes, limiting their ability to model long-range and multi-area dependencies. In this paper, we introduce GeoFlow, a novel framework that (i) augments area representations with geospatial attributes, including relative positions, k-hop and geodesic distances, (ii) employs a specialized geometric-intrinsic fusion encoder design that combines graph attention for intrinsic area signals with coordinate-aware encoders for global structure, and (iii) adopts an axial-global attention decoder to capture OD-specific competitive dependencies. For OD flow generation, GeoFlow is paired with flow matching models to produce more authentic and diverse mobility samples. Empirically, GeoFlow achieves superior performance in predictive accuracy, while substantially improving generative fidelity and diversity. Ablation and analytical studies confirm the contribution of each component. Code is available at https://github.com/ZheruiHuang/GeoFlow.

</details>


### [551] [Target-Guided Selective Reweighting for Physics-Informed Neural Network Inverse Problems: A Transfer Learning Approach](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05271)
*Qian Hu,Bin Fan,Yao Xiao,Zhicheng Lin,Meixin Xiong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了TGSR-PINN方法，通过目标证据驱动的表示校正来解决PINN在PDE逆问题中的负迁移问题，实现了在保持场精度的同时改善目标参数恢复。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: PINN在偏微分方程逆问题中面临病态优化、损失竞争和参数补偿问题。传统迁移学习方法在源任务和目标任务的物理机制、控制参数或观测噪声存在差异时，可能导致负迁移——模型获得低场误差但恢复错误的目标物理参数。

Method: 提出TGSR-PINN方法：仅从源PINN转移权重和偏置，目标物理参数独立初始化；经过短目标适应阶段后，使用一阶泰勒敏感性和预激活方差计算神经元目标分数；通过高斯混合模型将低分数神经元的证据转换为连续弱适应信号；对低分数神经元的输入权重行和偏置应用选择性软衰减而非硬剪枝或随机重置。

Result: 在高Péclet数2D对流扩散任务和Allen-Cahn到Burgers的跨PDE族转移任务中，TGSR-PINN改善了目标参数恢复同时保持相当的场精度；在5%噪声反应扩散案例中提供了补充证据。消融研究表明神经元目标评分、弱适应信号估计、层保护和选择性软衰减共同贡献了这些优势。

Conclusion: TGSR-PINN通过目标证据驱动的表示校正有效缓解了PINN逆迁移学习中的负迁移问题，在复杂物理场景下实现了更好的参数识别能力。

Abstract: Physics-informed neural networks (PINNs) encounter ill-posed optimization, loss competition, and parameter compensation in partial differential equation (PDE) inverse problems. Transfer learning can reuse representations from source tasks, but direct fine-tuning may introduce negative transfer when dominant physical mechanisms, governing parameters, or observation noise differ between source and target domains: the model achieves low field error yet recovers incorrect target physical parameters. To mitigate, we propose Target-Guided Selective Reweighting PINN (TGSR-PINN), a target-evidence-driven representation correction method for PINN inverse transfer learning. TGSR-PINN transfers only the weights and biases from the source PINN, while target physical parameters are independently initialized; after a short target-adaptation phase, the method computes neuron target scores using first-order Taylor sensitivity and pre-activation variance on fixed scoring batches, and converts evidence associated with low-scoring neurons into continuous weak-adaptation signals via a Gaussian mixture model (GMM) with rank fallback. TGSR-PINN then applies selective soft decay to input weight rows and biases of low-scoring neurons instead of hard pruning or random resetting. In experiments, TGSR-PINN improves target parameter recovery while maintaining comparable field accuracy in the high-Péclet 2D advection-diffusion task and in the Allen--Cahn to Burgers cross-PDE-family transfer task; a 5%-noise reaction--diffusion case provides supplementary evidence under milder source-target mismatch. Ablation studies suggest that neuron target scoring, weak-adaptation signal estimation, layer protection, and selective soft decay jointly contribute to the benefits.

</details>


### [552] [Adaptive Inference Batching using Policy Gradients](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05272)
*Ruslan Sharifullin*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: RL在推理服务系统中能显著提升多GPU异构路由性能（3.5倍提升），但在单GPU场景中仅带来边际收益（0.1%-1.0%），表明RL的价值主要集中于组合性多资源决策而非单资源时序调度。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 当前推理服务系统使用静态批处理策略需要手动调优且无法适应流量变化，研究探索RL能否学习自适应批处理和路由策略以超越现有启发式方法。

Method: 使用REINFORCE和PPO算法在离散事件模拟器上训练RL智能体，模拟器经过排队论和生产跟踪验证。将问题建模为基于队列状态、请求类型和GPU可用性的MDP，并在标准泊松流量、极端突发、真实世界跟踪和异构多GPU路由等场景评估。

Result: 在单GPU场景中，RL仅带来边际提升（+0.1%到+1.0%）。但在多GPU异构路由中，智能体发现的工作负载分离策略消除了Head-of-Line阻塞，相比轮询提升3.5倍（348%），相比最短队列基线提升48%，同时实现60%更高吞吐量和25%更低延迟，且遵守SLA约束。

Conclusion: RL相对于工程化启发式方法的优势主要集中在组合性多资源决策而非单资源时序调度，这一实践区分有助于决定在哪些场景中学习策略的生产工程成本是合理的。

Abstract: Inference serving systems must balance throughput and latency under bursty, heterogeneous workloads, yet the industry standard remains static batching policies that require manual tuning and cannot adapt to shifting traffic. We investigate whether reinforcement learning (RL) can learn adaptive batching and routing policies that outperform these heuristics, training REINFORCE and PPO agents on a discrete-event simulator validated against queuing theory and production traces (Azure Functions, BurstGPT). We formulate the problem as an MDP over queue state, request type and GPU availability, evaluating across standard Poisson traffic, extreme bursts, real-world traces and heterogeneous multi-GPU routing.
  Our central finding is a clear boundary condition for RL's value in systems problems. In single-GPU settings, a well-tuned static batching policy is already near-optimal under Poisson-like arrivals and RL offers only marginal gains (+0.1% to +1.0%). In multi-GPU heterogeneous routing, however, where fast and slow requests compete for shared resources, the agent discovers a workload-segregation policy that eliminates Head-of-Line blocking, yielding a 3.5x (348%) improvement over Round-Robin and a 48% improvement over the strongest heuristic baseline (Shortest-Queue), with 60% higher throughput and 25% lower latency while respecting SLA constraints. The policy generalizes to unseen bursty and real-world traffic despite training only on synthetic Poisson arrivals and an attention-augmented policy network converges roughly 20% faster than an MLP baseline.
  These results suggest RL's advantage over engineered heuristics concentrates in combinatorial, multi-resource decisions rather than single-resource temporal scheduling, a practical distinction for deciding where learned policies justify their engineering cost in production inference infrastructure.

</details>


### [553] [Advances in Neural Controlled Differential Equations](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05280)
*Benjamin Walker*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过Log-NCDEs、Linear NCDEs和Structured Linear NCDEs三种方法，将NCDE的训练步骤时间减少高达三个数量级，同时在多个时间序列基准上达到最先进性能。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现实世界系统是连续演化的，但大多数机器学习模型将时间序列视为离散序列。NCDE虽然能处理不规则采样数据且具有最大表达能力，但其非线性向量场导致前向传播计算昂贵且本质顺序执行，限制了可扩展性和实际应用。

Method: 1. Log-NCDEs：基于神经粗糙微分方程，应用Log-ODE方法在训练期间高效近似NCDE解，提高计算速度和经验性能。2. Linear NCDEs：用线性向量场替换非线性向量场，实现闭式解和并行计算，不牺牲理论表达能力。3. Structured Linear NCDEs：使用结构化线性向量场进一步提效，保持理论表达能力和经验性能。

Result: 这些方法将NCDE的每个训练步骤时间减少高达三个数量级，同时在多样化的时间序列基准上实现了最先进的性能。

Conclusion: 通过Log-NCDEs、Linear NCDEs和Structured Linear NCDEs三种互补方法，显著提升了NCDE的训练效率和可扩展性，使其在保持理论表达能力的同时更具实际应用价值。

Abstract: Many real-world systems evolve continuously, yet most machine learning models interpret time series as discrete sequences. Continuous-time approaches instead treat time series as samples from an underlying input path, a formulation that naturally accommodates irregularly sampled or oversampled data. Among these, Neural Controlled Differential Equations (NCDEs) are a maximally expressive class of models that parametrise a vector field using a neural network and evolve their hidden state by solving a dynamical system driven by the input path. NCDEs typically use a non-linear vector field, so their expressive power and continuous-time flexibility come at the cost of a forward pass that is both computationally expensive and inherently sequential, limiting their scalability and practical applicability.
  This thesis advances the training and scalability of NCDEs through three complementary contributions. First, building on neural rough differential equations, Log-NCDEs apply the Log-ODE method to efficiently approximate an NCDE's solution during training, improving both computational speed and empirical performance. Second, Linear NCDEs replace the non-linear vector field with a linear one, enabling closed-form solutions and parallel-in-time computation without sacrificing theoretical expressivity. Third, Structured Linear NCDEs use structured linear vector fields to further enhance efficiency while maintaining theoretical expressiveness and empirical performance.
  Collectively, these methods reduce the time per training step for an NCDE by up to three orders of magnitude while achieving state-of-the-art performance across diverse time series benchmarks.

</details>


### [554] [Air Quality Downscaling with Station-Guided Pseudo-Supervision](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05292)
*Guorun Wang,Simone Foti,Andreas D. Demou,Leonidas Kotoulas,Theodoros Christoudias,Alexandros Koliousis,Mihalis Nicolaou,Stefanos Zafeiriou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种站点引导的框架，用于欧洲地区PM₂.₅的高分辨率降尺度，通过多尺度Transformer网络将粗分辨率大气场（40倍超分辨率至约1公里）与稀疏地面观测数据结合，有效校正CAMS偏差并恢复精细空间结构。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决大气场粗分辨率（区域平均值）与地面PM₂.₅观测（离散连续信号样本）之间的空间支持不匹配问题，实现高分辨率PM₂.₅分布估计。

Method: 采用站点引导框架，结合粗分辨率CAMS大气成分场和多种辅助信息（人类活动、土地覆盖、高程、卫星气溶胶观测、风场），使用多尺度Transformer网络进行联合超分辨率和偏差校正。提出时间无关的传播策略，利用OpenAQ观测数据的空间高斯混合插值来监督稀疏站点数据。

Result: 模型成功恢复精细空间结构，有效减轻局部CAMS偏差，在欧洲范围内进行了广泛的定性和站点级评估，验证了方法的有效性。

Conclusion: 提出的站点引导框架能够有效解决大气场与地面观测的空间不匹配问题，实现高分辨率PM₂.₅降尺度，为空气质量监测提供更精确的空间分布信息。

Abstract: Super-resolving coarse atmospheric fields to local PM$_{2.5}$ variations is uniquely challenged by a mismatch in spatial support: while pixels represent regional averages, ground-truth observations are discrete, unaligned samples of a continuous spatial signal. To bridge this gap, we present a station-guided framework for high-resolution PM$_{2.5}$ downscaling over Europe. Taking coarse CAMS atmospheric composition fields alongside heterogeneous side information (i.e., human activity, land cover, elevation, satellite aerosol observations, and wind fields) our framework jointly super-resolves ($\times 40$, $\approx$ 1 km) and bias-corrects CAMS rasters, without relying on temporal sequence modelling. To address the challenge of densely supervising our multi-scale transformer network with sparse in-situ data, we introduce a time-agnostic propagation strategy that utilises spatial Gaussian blending of interpolated OpenAQ observations. Extensive qualitative and station-level evaluations across Europe demonstrate that our model recovers fine-grained spatial structures and effectively mitigates localised CAMS biases.

</details>


### [555] [Learning Only What Valid Adapters Can Express: Subspace-Constrained Adaptation Against Fine-Tuning Poisoning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05300)
*Fabien Polly*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种通过限制适配器参数在可信任务适配器池估计的低维子空间中进行微调的方法，以提高模型对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。该方法在保持干净数据性能的同时，显著降低了对中毒数据和后门攻击的脆弱性。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的参数高效微调方法仍然为行为改变的更新留下了广阔空间，使得中毒目标可以被表示和优化。为了解决这个问题，研究者希望探索一种替代方案：将适配限制在从可信的现有任务适配器池估计的子空间中。

Method: 通过分析196个公开的LoRA适配器，发现适配器的功能相关内容位于一个低维共享子空间中。研究者将梯度适配限制在该子空间的128个坐标上，而不是进行完整的LoRA微调。这种方法基于可信任务适配器池估计的子空间约束。

Result: 1) 适配器约30-38%的权重范数在评估的任务分布下是冗余的；2) 在干净分类数据上，子空间约束学习与完整LoRA微调性能相当；3) 在标签反转攻击下，LoRA准确率降至3-26%，而约束学习保持62-96%；4) 约束学习无法拟合中毒数据，其适配损失可将干净与垃圾数据区分120倍；5) 对自适应后门攻击，在目标行为与池中行为不同的任务上攻击成功率降至8%（LoRA为100%）。

Conclusion: 通过将适配限制在可信任务适配器池估计的子空间中，可以在保持干净数据性能的同时，显著提高对对抗性攻击的鲁棒性。这种机制以牺牲峰值可塑性为代价换取安全性，适用于池覆盖良好的任务，但需要假设池本身可信。该方法提供了一种无需额外检测器的分布外信号。

Abstract: Parameter-efficient fine-tuning still leaves a broad space of behavior-changing updates reachable, so a poisoned objective can be represented and optimized. We study an alternative: adaptation constrained to the subspace estimated from a trusted pool of existing task adapters. On flan-t5-large with 196 public LoRA adapters, we show that (1) the functionally relevant content of an adapter lies in a low-dimensional shared subspace, 30 to 38 percent of its weight norm being redundant under the evaluated task distributions; (2) gradient adaptation restricted to 128 coordinates on this subspace matches full LoRA fine-tuning on clean classification data, while under targeted label inversion LoRA collapses to 3-26 percent exact match and the constrained learner keeps 62-96 percent on the tasks the pool covers; (3) the constrained learner cannot fit corrupted data, its adaptation loss separating clean from garbage by two orders of magnitude (120x), an out-of-distribution signal without an extra detector; and (4) against an adaptive backdoor attacker who optimizes within the subspace, the attack is blocked (8 percent success versus 100 for LoRA) on the task where its target behavior is unlike anything in the pool, and only partially blocked (85 percent) when the target coincides with a common pool behavior. On these two tasks the outcome is consistent with how close the target is to the pool's directions, which suggests but does not establish a pool-relative boundary. The mechanism trades peak plasticity for these properties: on tasks the pool covers poorly, unconstrained fine-tuning wins, and the protection assumes the pool itself is trusted. Code and data are public.

</details>


### [556] [Biologically Informed Deep Neural Networks for Multi-Omic Integration, Pathway Activity Inference and Risk Stratification in Cancer](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05306)
*Pedro Henrique da Costa Avelar,Le Ou-Yang,Min Wu,Sophia Tsoka*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Pathway Activity Autoencoders：通过通路知识约束实现可解释的多组学整合框架，在乳腺癌预测任务中表现优异


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 解决多组学数据整合中模型可解释性与表征能力之间的权衡问题，现有方法要么依赖事后解释，要么使用可能忽略复杂相互作用的线性模型

Method: 提出通路活动自编码器（Pathway Activity Autoencoders），通过通路知识架构约束嵌入先验知识，保持可解释性的同时保留表征能力，应用于乳腺癌的多组学整合

Result: 在生存预测和亚型分类任务中显示整合的积极效果，基因、蛋白质和microRNA表达层贡献最大；dropout提高模型鲁棒性但过度正则化会降低预测性能；学习到的特征空间具有临床相关性

Conclusion: 通路活动自编码器框架产生具有生物学意义且可直接转化为临床见解的优越潜在表征，为多组学整合提供了实用指南

Abstract: Integrating complex, multi-omics data presents significant challenges. Existing approaches often face a trade-off between model interpretability and representational capacity, with most either relying on post-hoc interpretation or use linear models that may overlook complex interactions. We report Pathway Activity Autoencoders for the multi-omics setting, which embed prior knowledge via pathway-informed architectural constraints, fostering interpretability, while preserving representational power. Our multi-omic framework is applied in the context of breast cancer and is evaluated in survival prediction and subtype classification with results indicating a positive effect of integration. We conduct analysis of individual omics layer impact on end-task performance, revealing that gene, protein, and microRNA expression layers provide the strongest contribution. Repeatability studies indicate that, while dropout improves model robustness and consistency, excessive regularisation can reduce predictive performance. Finally, visualizations of the learned feature space illustrate the framework's intrinsic transparency and clinical relevance. The results underscore the value of multi-omic integration and delineate the impact of individual omics layers, establishing practical guidelines for integration within our framework. Overall, our pathway activity autoencoder frameworks yield superior latent representations that are biologically meaningful and are directly translatable into clinically relevant insights.

</details>


### [557] [How Far is Too Far? Defining the Distance Threshold for Verification Siamese Networks](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05329)
*Heloísa Dias Viotto,Cauê Samonek,Lucas Garcia Pedroso,Marcos Sunye,André Abed Grégio,Paulo Lisboa de Almeida*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无监督方法来确定孪生验证网络的阈值，通过假设距离分布为双峰函数并寻找两个模态之间的最小点，无需标注数据即可确定验证阈值。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 孪生验证网络广泛用于比较人脸、车辆、签名等对象，需要设定阈值来判断两个对象是否属于同一类别。传统方法需要标注数据来确定阈值，这在部署环境中成本高昂且不切实际。

Method: 基于孪生验证网络产生的距离分布可以近似为双峰函数的假设，提出了一种无监督方法来确定验证阈值。该方法通过识别两个模态之间的最小点来确定阈值，无需标注数据。

Result: 在MNIST、CIFAR-10、LFW和PKLot四个数据集上评估，提出的方法实现了平均94%的验证准确率，与需要标注数据的Equal Error Rate方法相当。

Conclusion: 该无监督方法能够在不依赖标注数据的情况下有效确定孪生验证网络的阈值，使得在部署环境中更新阈值成为可能，降低了人工标注的成本。

Abstract: Siamese verification networks are widely used to compare items such as faces, cars, or signatures. In these scenarios, the network is trained to learn an embedding space in which similar objects are mapped closer together, while dissimilar objects are mapped further apart. Two objects are considered to belong to the same class (e.g., the same person in two different images) when the distance between their embeddings falls below a predefined threshold. Defining this threshold, however, is a non-trivial task and typically requires labeled data. In this work, we assume that the distribution of distances produced by a siamese verification network can be approximated by a bimodal function. Based on this assumption, we propose an unsupervised method to determine the verification threshold by identifying the minimum point between the two modes. The proposed approach does not require annotated samples, enabling the verification threshold to be updated directly in the deployment environment without the cost of manual labeling. We evaluate our method on four datasets: MNIST, CIFAR-10, LFW, and PKLot. The results indicate that the proposed approach achieves an average verification accuracy of 94%, comparable to the Equal Error Rate method, while eliminating the need for labeled data.

</details>


### [558] [TREK: Distill to Explore, Reinforce to Refine](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05339)
*Yuanda Xu,Zhengze Zhou,Kayhan Behdin,Jelena Markovic-Voronov,Hejian Sang,Xiaomin Li,Wenhui Zhu,Xinchen Du,Aida Rahmattalabi,Ran He,Sen Na,Zhipeng Wang,Alborz Geramifard*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TREK是一种通过前向KL散度进行教师引导探索的方法，用于解决GRPO在硬提示上停滞的问题，通过外部验证轨迹扩展学生策略的支持集。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有GRPO方法在策略已经能采样有用推理轨迹时有效，但对于硬提示（正确解模式超出学生策略支持集）会停滞不前，需要一种方法来扩展探索支持。

Method: TREK采用分阶段流程：1)识别学生通过率极低的提示；2)查询提案源生成验证候选解；3)按当前学生似然保留前r个提案；4)应用短期前向KL阶段将验证模式拉入学生支持集；5)返回标准GRPO精炼。可使用黑盒教师、白盒教师或带额外推理上下文的同一模型。

Result: 在数学推理上，TREK+DeepSeek-V4提升Qwen3各规模模型在AIME 2024/2025表现：Qwen3-8B在AIME 2025从36.9提升至40.3，AIME 2024从47.9提升至51.1；自上下文变体达到38.5和49.6。在智能体任务上，ALFWorld成功率从75.8提升至82.8，ScienceWorld从12.5提升至26.7；在硬任务类型上，TREK早期即达高成功率，而GRPO需要更多优化步骤。

Conclusion: TREK是一种通用方法，通过验证输出轨迹扩展探索支持，有效解决GRPO在硬提示上的停滞问题，在数学推理和智能体任务上均显著提升性能，且无需教师内部信息即可识别最值得巩固的硬提示样本。

Abstract: Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) is effective when the current policy already samples useful reasoning trajectories, but it stalls on hard prompts whose correct solution modes lie outside the student's on-policy support. We propose TREK (Teacher-Routed Exploration via Forward KL), a simple staged procedure that uses distillation not for imitation but for exploration support expansion. A key advantage of TREK is its generality: because it only consumes verified output trajectories, it can use an external black-box teacher, a white-box teacher, or the same model given additional inference-time context, and it can efficiently identify which hard-prompt samples are most worth consolidating even when teacher internals are unavailable. TREK first identifies prompts where the unaided student has very low pass rate, queries a proposal source to produce verified candidate solutions, keeps the top-$r$ proposals ranked by current student likelihood, applies a short forward-KL phase to pull those verified modes into the student's support, and then returns to standard on-policy GRPO refinement. On mathematical reasoning, TREK with DeepSeek-V4 proposals improves Qwen3 models across all tested scales on AIME 2024 and AIME 2025; for Qwen3-8B, it improves AIME 2025 from 36.9 to 40.3 and AIME 2024 from 47.9 to 51.1 (avg@16), while the self-context variant reaches 38.5 and 49.6 without an external teacher. On agentic tasks, TREK raises ALFWorld success rate from 75.8 to 82.8 and ScienceWorld success rate from 12.5 to 26.7; notably, on the hardest task types, TREK achieves high success rates early in training while unaided GRPO requires substantially more optimization steps to reach comparable levels.

</details>


### [559] [CompactionRL: Reinforcement Learning with Context Compaction for Long-Horizon Agents](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05378)
*Yujiang Li,Zhenyu Hou,Yi Jing,Jie Tang,Yuxiao Dong*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: CompactionRL 是一种将上下文压缩融入强化学习的训练策略，用于训练长视野的智能LLM代理，通过在训练中联合优化任务执行和摘要生成来解决有限上下文窗口的问题。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 长视野的智能LLM代理受限于有限的上下文窗口，因为扩展的交互轨迹可能在任务完成前就超过最大上下文长度。上下文压缩通过总结先前的交互状态并在压缩的上下文中继续执行，为这一限制提供了自然的解决方案，但将压缩融入强化学习仍然是一个未被充分探索的领域。

Method: 提出CompactionRL，一种强化学习策略，通过联合优化任务执行和摘要生成来训练长视野的智能LLM代理。该方法采用令牌级损失归一化和跨轨迹广义优势估计，使LLM代理能够从压缩的长视野轨迹中学习。

Result: 在开源模型上训练CompactionRL，在智能编码任务上观察到一致的性能提升。使用GLM-4.5-Air模型（106B-A30B）在SWE-bench Verified上达到66.8%的Pass@1分数，在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到24.5%，分别有7.0和3.1个百分点的绝对提升。基于GLM-4.7-Flash（30B-A3B），CompactionRL将Pass@1分别提高了5.5和6.8个百分点，在SWE-bench Verified上达到56.0%，在Terminal-Bench 2.0上达到20.2%。

Conclusion: CompactionRL成功地将上下文压缩融入强化学习，有效解决了长视野LLM代理的上下文窗口限制问题，显著提升了智能编码任务的性能，并已被应用于训练开源GLM-5.2模型的强化学习流程中。

Abstract: Long-horizon agentic LLMs are increasingly limited by finite context windows, as extended interaction trajectories can exceed the maximum context length before a task is completed. Context compaction offers a natural solution by summarizing previous interaction states and continuing the rollout under a compressed context, but incorporating compaction into reinforcement learning remains underexplored. We propose CompactionRL, a reinforcement learning strategy to train long-horizon agentic LLMs with context compaction. Our approach jointly optimizes task execution and summary generation with token-level loss normalization and cross-trajectory generalized advantage estimation. This design enables the LLM agents to learn from compacted long-horizon trajectories. We train CompactionRL on top of open models and observe consistent performance gains on agentic coding tasks. CompactionRL enables the open GLM-4.5-Air model (106B-A30B) to achieve Pass@1 scores of 66.8% on SWE-bench Verified and 24.5% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, with absolute gains of 7.0 and 3.1 points, respectively. Built upon GLM-4.7-Flash (30B-A3B), CompactionRL improves Pass@1 by 5.5 and 6.8 points, reaching 56.0% on SWE-bench Verified and 20.2% on Terminal-Bench 2.0, respectively. CompactionRL is thus deployed in the RL pipeline for training the open GLM-5.2 model (750B-A40B).

</details>


### [560] [TabPack: Efficient Hyperparameter Ensembles for Tabular Deep Learning](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05380)
*Yury Gorishniy,Akim Kotelnikov,Ivan Rubachev,Artem Babenko*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: TabPack是一个高效的MLP集成方法，通过在单个运行中并行训练多个不同超参数的MLP并动态选择集成成员，减少了传统超参数调优的需求。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 现有基于MLP集成的表格数据深度学习方法需要为所有底层MLP使用相同的超参数，这需要大量超参数调优才能达到最佳性能，增加了计算资源和时间成本。

Method: TabPack在单个运行中高效并行采样和训练多个具有不同超参数的MLP，并在训练过程中动态选择集成成员，用户只需指定超参数采样范围而非精确值。

Result: 在中等至大型公共数据集上，使用默认设置的TabPack性能与经过大量调优的现有方法相当，显著减少了达到竞争性结果所需的努力和计算资源。

Conclusion: TabPack通过减少对传统超参数调优的依赖，提供了一个高效且具有强大开箱即用性能的MLP集成方法，使得在普通硬件上也能快速获得竞争性结果。

Abstract: In deep learning for tabular data, efficient ensembles of multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have recently emerged as effective and practical architectures. Existing methods of this kind use the same hyperparameters for all underlying MLPs, which requires hyperparameter tuning for achieving the best performance. In this work, we introduce TabPack, an efficient MLP ensemble with strong out-of-the-box performance and reduced reliance on traditional tuning. In a single run, TabPack samples and trains many MLPs with different hyperparameters efficiently in parallel and selects ensemble members on the fly during training. Thus, TabPack only requires specifying ranges from which to sample MLP hyperparameter rather than exact hyperparameter values, which naturally demands less precision for good performance. In experiments on medium-to-large public datasets, TabPack with default settings performs on par with extensively tuned prior methods, thus substantially reducing effort and compute resources needed to achieve competitive results on tabular tasks. Notably, running the default TabPack configuration on a modern MacBook took less time than tuning some baselines on an industry-grade GPU.

</details>


### [561] [What Does a Discrete Diffusion Model Learn?](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05381)
*Rodrigo Casado Noguerales,Bernhard Schölkopf,Thomas Hofmann,Aran Raoufi*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文通过严格的连续时间马尔可夫链（CTMC）ELBO推导，证明了"Oracle Distance"定理：负ELBO等于数据熵加上从oracle反向过程到学习过程的路径KL散度，其唯一优化器是给定当前噪声状态的真实反向跳变率的条件期望。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 研究离散扩散模型究竟学习什么：去噪器、得分比还是桥接预测器？这些在不同坐标下是同一对象，但用错误坐标读取神经网络会改变训练和采样的过程。需要从理论层面澄清这些概念的关系和差异。

Method: 首先推导了包含边界项的任意噪声过程CTMC ELBO，证明了Oracle Distance定理。对于具有token因子化噪声的序列，推导了优化器的三个精确坐标表示：去噪器、空腔（桥接预测器）和得分，并给出了它们之间的闭式转换公式。

Result: 建立了统一的框架，识别了文献中各损失函数实际优化的规律，将MDM、UDM、SEDD和GIDD作为特例包含其中。解释了为什么去噪器和空腔在掩码扩散中重合但在均匀扩散中不同，证明了去噪器参数化会使均匀ELBO在初始化时发散而桥接预测器保持有限。

Conclusion: 该研究为理解离散扩散模型提供了统一的理论框架，澄清了不同参数化之间的关系，证明了所有噪声过程共享相同的最佳可达到负ELBO：数据熵。所有恒等式都在精确可解模型上得到了数值验证。

Abstract: What does a discrete diffusion model learn: a denoiser, a score ratio, or a bridge plug-in predictor? At the level of jump rates, these are one object in different coordinates, and reading a neural network in the wrong coordinate changes the process being trained and sampled. Starting with a rigorous derivation of the continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC) ELBO for any noising process, boundary terms included, we prove the \emph{Oracle Distance} theorem: the negative ELBO is exactly equal to the data entropy plus the path KL from the oracle reverse process to the learned one, not merely a bound. Its unique optimizer is therefore the conditional expectation of the true reverse jump rate given the current noisy state, and its irreducible cost is the rate at which the forward process $Z_t$ destroys information about the clean data $Z_0$, $-\tfrac{d}{dt}I(Z_0; Z_t)$, so every noising process shares the same best achievable negative ELBO: the data entropy. For sequences with token-factorizing noise, the oracle projection yields three exact coordinates for the optimizer: denoiser, cavity (bridge plug-in), and score, with closed-form conversions among them. This framework identifies which law each loss in the literature actually optimizes, recovering MDM, UDM, SEDD, and GIDD as special cases; explains why denoiser and cavity coincide for masked diffusion but not for uniform diffusion; proves that a denoiser parameterization makes the uniform ELBO diverge at initialization while the bridge plug-in stays finite; and calibrates ELBO implementations exactly at initialization. Every identity is verified numerically, without approximation, on an exactly solvable model.

</details>


### [562] [Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05394)
*Shiyuan Feng,Huan-ang Gao,Haohan Chi,Hanlin Wu,Zhilong Zhang,Zheng Jiang,Bingxiang He,Wei-Ying Ma,Ya-Qin Zhang,Hao Zhou*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: Direct-OPD方法通过将小模型的RL学习成果作为隐式奖励信号，直接迁移到更强的大模型上，避免了在大模型上重新进行昂贵的RL训练。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: RLVR虽然能提升语言模型的推理能力，但在每个新的大模型上重复RL训练成本过高。需要一种方法能够将小模型的RL学习成果迁移到大模型上，避免重复训练。

Method: 提出Direct-OPD方法：比较小模型RL前后的策略，将其对数比率作为密集隐式奖励信号，直接应用于大模型自身的策略上，实现RL学习成果的迁移。

Result: 在8个A100 GPU上仅用4小时，将Qwen3-1.7B在AIME 2024上的表现从48.3%提升到62.4%。优于直接RL方法，支持多个策略转移的顺序组合。

Conclusion: RL学习成果可以跨模型规模重用为隐式奖励信号，而不仅仅是最终模型进行模仿。这为高效利用RL训练成果提供了新途径。

Abstract: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck. We study a weak-to-strong alternative: run RL on a smaller model where rollouts are cheaper, then reuse what that RL run learned to improve a stronger target model. Directly distilling the post-RL weak teacher is not enough, because the teacher's final policy mixes useful RL gains with the limitations of the smaller model. We propose Direct On-Policy Distillation (Direct-OPD), which transfers the teacher's RL-induced policy shift instead. Direct-OPD compares the post-RL teacher with its own pre-RL reference and treats their log-ratio as a dense implicit reward for the student. In plain terms, the checkpoint pair tells us which actions RL made the weak model more or less likely to take, and Direct-OPD applies that signal on the stronger student's own on-policy states. This directly reuses the weak model's RL supervision signal without training an explicit reward model or running sparse-reward RL on the target model. Empirically, Direct-OPD consistently leverages weaker teachers to improve stronger target models; notably, it boosts Qwen3-1.7B from 48.3% to 62.4% on AIME 2024 in just 4 hours on 8 A100 GPUs. It outperforms step-matched direct RL and enables the sequential composition of multiple policy shifts. Our results show that RL outcomes can be reused across model scales as implicit reward signals, not merely as final models to imitate.

</details>


### [563] [SAD-LoRA: Spectral Alignment for Low-Rank Knowledge Distillation](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.04306)
*Omer Tariq,Syed Muhammad Raza,Jeongbae Son*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: SAD-LoRA：一种通过谱对齐蒸馏来显式控制LoRA适配器子空间的方法，提高参数高效压缩中的秩效率


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 传统的输出级知识蒸馏（KD）在将微调教师模型压缩到LoRA适配学生模型时，无法显式控制适配器占据的秩-r权重子空间，这可能导致子空间错位问题

Method: 提出SAD-LoRA（谱对齐蒸馏），从数据加权的学生空间参考更新中选择子空间，并通过在colspan(B)上的可微主角度损失在训练期间保持该子空间。数据加权蒸馏误差可精确分解为子空间错位、子空间内系数不匹配和不可约秩残差

Result: 在具有平坦教师谱的合成问题上，SAD-LoRA将子空间错位项从51%降至接近零，最终子空间对齐从0.49提升到1.00。在RoBERTa-large到RoBERTa-base的蒸馏中，SAD-LoRA提高了秩效率：在r=4时，在6个GLUE任务中的5个任务上匹配或优于最强的谱基线；在r=8时，在SST-2和CoLA上获得最佳结果

Conclusion: SAD-LoRA通过显式子空间对齐显著改善了参数高效压缩，消融研究表明子空间对齐是核心组件，而系数匹配是辅助性的。该方法为知识蒸馏中的子空间控制提供了理论保证和实际改进

Abstract: Distilling a fine-tuned teacher into a LoRA-adapted student is a standard recipe for parameter-efficient compression, but output-level KD does not explicitly control which rank-$r$ weight subspace the adapter occupies. We propose \textbf{SAD-LoRA} (\textbf{S}pectral \textbf{A}lignment \textbf{D}istillation), which selects this subspace from the data-weighted student-space reference update $\DWT\Sigx^{1/2}$ and maintains it during training via a differentiable principal-angle loss on $\colspan(B)$. We show that the data-weighted distillation error decomposes exactly into subspace misalignment, within-subspace coefficient mismatch, and irreducible rank residual; standard KD can affect the first term only indirectly through output gradients. On controlled synthetic problems with a flat teacher spectrum, SAD-LoRA reduces the subspace-misalignment term from $51\%$ to nearly zero and lifts final subspace alignment from $0.49$ to $1.00$. On RoBERTa-large to RoBERTa-base distillation across six GLUE tasks, SAD-LoRA improves rank efficiency: at $r{=}4$, it matches or beats the strongest included spectral baseline on five of six tasks, and at $r{=}8$ it gives the best result on SST-2 and CoLA. Ablations identify subspace alignment as the load-bearing component, while coefficient matching is auxiliary.

</details>


### [564] [Beyond Modality Fusion: Deep Ensembles for Multimodal Classification](https://arxiv.org/abs/2607.05019)
*Ilya Burenko,Dmitry Vetrov*

Main category: cs.LG

TL;DR: 该论文提出了一种无需显式模态融合的多模态分类方法，使用单模态网络的深度集成，在模态不平衡情况下优于现有的晚期融合和混合方法。


<details>
  <summary>Details</summary>
Motivation: 在多模态分类中，当模态不平衡显著时，晚期融合方法通常需要各种正则化技术来平衡学习过程。本研究旨在探索一种更有效的替代方案，即不进行显式模态融合，而是通过集成学习来提升性能。

Method: 提出使用单模态网络的深度集成方法，在参数数量相等的情况下与晚期融合网络进行系统比较。开发了选择每个模态模型数量的启发式方法，避免计算昂贵的穷举搜索。提出了合成多模态框架来控制模态数量和预测强度，并通过拟合双模态数据集的缩放定律来估计集成方法的渐近性能。

Result: 深度集成方法在模态不平衡情况下一致优于最先进的晚期融合方法，也优于评估的中间融合技术和混合方法。在极端模态不平衡和小规模集成时，仅使用强模态模型的集成效果更好；随着集成规模扩大，加入弱模态模型变得有益。这些预测与实证结果一致。

Conclusion: 多模态数据可以通过单模态网络的深度集成进行有效分类，无需显式模态融合。这种方法在参数效率、性能提升和对模态不平衡的鲁棒性方面具有优势，为多模态学习提供了新的视角。

Abstract: In multimodal classification, late-fusion approaches classify concatenated modality-specific features extracted by unimodal neural networks.
  When modality imbalance is pronounced, various regularization techniques have been proposed to balance the learning process and overcome the inferior performance of late-fusion networks.
  In contrast, this work demonstrates that multimodal data can be effectively classified without any explicit modality fusion, using deep ensembles of unimodal networks.
  We systematically compare deep ensembles to late-fusion networks at equal parameter count and show that ensembles consistently outperform state-of-the-art late-fusion methods designed to address modality imbalance.
  This advantage also holds over intermediate-fusion techniques we evaluated and over hybrid methods that combine unimodal and multimodal predictions.
  We propose and empirically validate a method for selecting the number of models per modality in an ensemble, avoiding computationally expensive exhaustive search.
  Under extreme modality imbalance and small ensemble sizes, the heuristic indicates that ensembles of unimodal models trained solely on the stronger modality are preferable; as the ensemble scales up, incorporating models from the weaker modality becomes beneficial.
  Both predictions align with our empirical findings.
  To systematically explore the challenges of optimizing multimodal models, we propose a synthetic multimodal framework that allows control over both the number of modalities and their predictive strength; our findings are consistent across synthetic and real-world datasets.
  Finally, by fitting scaling laws to bimodal datasets, we estimate the asymptotic performance of ensembles.

</details>
